NULL THEN 0 ELSE pivot_result.ZLV10117 END + CASE WHEN pivot_result.ZLV10118 IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE pivot_result.ZLV10118 END ) AS 'Total' FROM ( SELECT AAA.ProgressType , count(AAA.TrackingProgress) AS TrackingProgressCNT , AAA.TrackingProgress FROM ( select A.* , TIA1.PlainText AS EffectiveDate , TIA2.PlainText AS TrackingProgress , CASE WHEN Convert(date,TIA1.PlainText) < DATEADD(DAY, -1, CONVERT(DATE, CONVERT(VARCHAR(6), GETDATE(), 112) + '01')) THEN 'PT_OVER' ELSE 'PT_UNDER' END AS ProgressType , TATL.Value AS TrackingProgressNM
from ITEMTREE A Left join XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR TIA1 ON A.ItemID = TIA1.ItemID AND TIA1.AttrTypeCode = 'ZAT1040' AND TIA1.LanguageID = #{languageID} Left join XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR TIA2 ON A.ItemID = TIA2.ItemID AND TIA2.AttrTypeCode = 'ZAT1011' AND TIA2.LanguageID = #{languageID} left join XBOLTADM.TB_ATTR_TYPE_LOV TATL ON TATL.AttrTypeCode = 'ZAT1011' and TATL.LovCode = TIA2.PlainText AND TATL.LanguageID = #{languageID} INNER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR PTIA ON A.P_itemID = PTIA.ItemID AND PTIA.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00001' AND PTIA.LanguageID = #{languageID} WHERE A.ClassCode = 'CL13003' ) AAA Group by AAA.ProgressType, AAA.TrackingProgress ) AAA2 PIVOT ( sum(AAA2.TrackingProgressCNT) FOR AAA2.TrackingProgress IN ([ZLV10111],[ZLV10112],[ZLV10113],[ZLV10114],[ZLV10115],[ZLV10116],[ZLV10117],[ZLV10118]) ) AS pivot_result

SELECT STS.SL1_Identifier , TIA.PlainText AS SL1_name , CASE WHEN STS.[01] IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE STS.[01] END AS ITSYS01 , CASE WHEN STS.[02] IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE STS.[02] END AS ITSYS02 , CASE WHEN STS.[03] IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE STS.[03] END AS ITSYS03 , CASE WHEN STS.[04] IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE STS.[04] END AS ITSYS04 , CASE WHEN STS.[05] IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE STS.[05] END AS ITSYS05 , CASE WHEN STS.[06] IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE STS.[06] END AS ITSYS06 , CASE WHEN STS.[07] IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE STS.[07] END AS ITSYS07 , CASE WHEN STS.[08] IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE STS.[08] END AS ITSYS08 , CASE WHEN STS.[09] IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE STS.[09] END AS ITSYS09 , CASE WHEN STS.[10] IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE STS.[10] END AS ITSYS10 , CASE WHEN STS.[11] IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE STS.[11] END AS ITSYS11 , CASE WHEN STS.[12] IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE STS.[12] END AS ITSYS12
, CASE WHEN STS.[01] IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE STS.[01] END + CASE WHEN STS.[02] IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE STS.[02] END + CASE WHEN STS.[03] IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE STS.[03] END + CASE WHEN STS.[04] IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE STS.[04] END + CASE WHEN STS.[05] IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE STS.[05] END + CASE WHEN STS.[06] IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE STS.[06] END + CASE WHEN STS.[07] IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE STS.[07] END + CASE WHEN STS.[08] IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE STS.[08] END + CASE WHEN STS.[09] IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE STS.[09] END + CASE WHEN STS.[10] IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE STS.[10] END + CASE WHEN STS.[11] IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE STS.[11] END + CASE WHEN STS.[12] IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE STS.[12] END AS TotalCNT
from ( select * from ( select AA.PL1_Identifier, AA.SL1_Identifier , count(AA.SL1_Identifier) S_CNT from( select PH.ItemID AS PL1_itemID , PL1.Identifier AS PL1_Identifier , A.ItemID AS P_ItemID , A.Identifier AS P_Identifier , A.ClassCode AS P_ClassCode
, SL1.ItemID AS SL1_ItemID , SL1.Identifier AS SL1_Identifier , S.ItemID AS S_ItemID , s.Identifier AS S_Identifier from XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM A inner join XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM CN ON CN.ItemTypeCode = 'CN00104' AND A.ItemID = CN.FromItemID inner join XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM S ON CN.ToItemID = S.ItemID and Left(S.Identifier,3) != 'S99'
Left join [XBOLTADM].[TW_PROCESS] PH ON PH.ItemID = A.ItemID AND PH.ItemTypeCode = 'OJ00001' and PH.ItemTypeCode = A.ItemTypeCode Left join XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM PL1 ON PL1.ItemID = PH.L1ItemID
Left join XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM SL1 ON SL1.ItemID = XBOLTADM.fn_GetParentItemID(S.ItemID, 2) WHERE A.Deleted = 0 AND S.Deleted = 0 AND SL1.Identifier is not null AND A.ClassCode = 'CL01006' ) AA group by AA.PL1_Identifier, AA.SL1_Identifier ) BB PIVOT ( sum(BB.S_CNT) FOR BB.PL1_Identifier IN ([01],[02],[03],[04],[05],[06],[07],[08],[09],[10],[11],[12]) ) AS pivot_result ) STS Left join XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM TI ON STS.SL1_Identifier = TI.Identifier Left join XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR TIA ON TIA.ItemID = TI.ItemID and TIA.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00001' and TIA.LanguageID = 1042

SELECT T1.ItemID FROM XBOLTADM.TW_PROCESS T1, XBOLTADM.TB_FILE T2 WHERE T1.ItemID = T2.DocumentID AND T2.DocCategory = 'ITM' AND T1.ItemClassCode = 'CL01005'
AND T1.L1ItemID = #{L1ItemID}

SELECT COUNT(B.L1ItemID) AS CNT, B.L1ItemID From XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM A Left join XBOLTADM.TW_PROCESS B ON A.ItemID = B.ItemID where CategoryCode = 'OJ' And ClassCode = 'CL01006' and B.L1ItemID is not null
AND A.Deleted = #{deleted}
AND A.Status in (${status})
group by B.L1ItemID

select isnull(L1.Identifier,TI.Identifier) AS L1Code , isnull(TI.Identifier,'') as Identifier , CLS.Name AS Level , AT01.PlainText AS AT01 , REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(AT03.PlainText, CHAR(11), ''), char(9), ' '), char(10), ' '), char(13), ' ') AS AT03 , AT17.PlainText AS AT17 , AT15.PlainText As AT15 , AT16.PlainText As AT16 , REPLACE(AT09.PlainText, CHAR(11), '') As AT09 , ZAT04.PlainText AS ZAT04 , LOVZAT05.Value AS LOVZAT05 , REPLACE(AT80.PlainText, CHAR(11), '') AS AT80 , ZAT3013.PlainText AS ZAT3013 , REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(AT08.PlainText, CHAR(11), ''), char(9), ' '), char(10), ' '), char(13), ' ') As AT08 , AT13.PlainText As AT13 , AUTHOR.name AS Owner , TTT.name AS OwnerTeamName , LastUser.name AS LastUpdateUser , CONVERT(CHAR(10),CONVERT(datetime, TI.LastUpdated ),21) as LastUpdated , case when (select count(*) from XBOLTADM.TB_TEAM_ROLE WHERE ItemID = TI.ItemID) > 0 then 0 else 1 end AS RASIC
, ( Select count(*) As CNT From XBOLTADM.TB_ELEMENT TE
LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_MODEL TM On TM.ModelID = TE.ModelID Where TE.ModelID = (select top 1 ModelID from XBOLTADM.TB_MODEL where ItemID = TI.ItemID and ModelTypeCode = 'MT001' and MTCategory = 'BAS' order by LastUpdated) And TE.SymTypeCode in (Select SymTypeCode From XBOLTADM.TB_SYMTYPE_ALLOCATION Where ModelTypeCode ='MT001' and MdlIF='Y') And TM.ModelTypeCode = 'MT001'
And (Select COUNT(TB.ItemID) From (Select ItemID from XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM Where ItemID = TI.ItemID) TB Where TB.ItemID in( Select ObjectID From XBOLTADM.TB_ELEMENT Where ModelID = ( Select Top 1 ModelID From XBOLTADM.TB_MODEL Where ItemID = TE.ObjectID And MTCategory = 'BAS'))) >= 0 ) AS connectionOutbound , ( Select count(*) As CNT From XBOLTADM.TB_ELEMENT TE
LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_MODEL TM On TM.ModelID = TE.ModelID Where TE.ModelID = (select top 1 ModelID from XBOLTADM.TB_MODEL where ItemID = TI.ItemID and ModelTypeCode = 'MT001' and MTCategory = 'BAS' order by LastUpdated) And TE.SymTypeCode in (Select SymTypeCode From XBOLTADM.TB_SYMTYPE_ALLOCATION Where ModelTypeCode ='MT001' and MdlIF='Y') And TM.ModelTypeCode = 'MT001'
And (Select COUNT(TB.ItemID) From (Select ItemID from XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM Where ItemID = TI.ItemID) TB Where TB.ItemID in( Select ObjectID From XBOLTADM.TB_ELEMENT Where ModelID = ( Select Top 1 ModelID From XBOLTADM.TB_MODEL Where ItemID = TE.ObjectID And MTCategory = 'BAS'))) = 0 ) AS connectionOutboundInconsistent
,( Select Count(TM.ItemID) AS CNT From XBOLTADM.TB_MODEL TM LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ELEMENT TE On TE.ObjectID = TI.ItemID Where TM.ModelID = TE.ModelID And TM.ModelTypeCode = 'MT001' And XBOLTADM.fn_GetExistObjectFromElement(TM.ItemID, (select top 1 ModelID from XBOLTADM.TB_MODEL where ItemID = TI.ItemID and ModelTypeCode = 'MT001' and MTCategory = 'BAS' order by LastUpdated)) >= 0 And TM.MTCategory IN ('BAS') ) AS connectionInbound ,( Select Count(TM.ItemID) AS CNT From XBOLTADM.TB_MODEL TM LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ELEMENT TE On TE.ObjectID = TI.ItemID Where TM.ModelID = TE.ModelID And TM.ModelTypeCode = 'MT001' And XBOLTADM.fn_GetExistObjectFromElement(TM.ItemID, (select top 1 ModelID from XBOLTADM.TB_MODEL where ItemID = TI.ItemID and ModelTypeCode = 'MT001' and MTCategory = 'BAS' order by LastUpdated)) = 0 And TM.MTCategory IN ('BAS') ) AS connectionInboundInconsistent
, case when TI.classcode = 'CL01005' and TI.status = 'NEW1' then '1' else '0' end AS L4Status from XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM TI inner join XBOLTADM.TW_PROCESS TP ON TI.ItemID = TP.ItemID Left JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM L1 ON L1.ItemID = TP.L1ItemID LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR AS AT01 ON AT01.ItemID = TI.ItemID AND AT01.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND AT01.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00001' LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR AS AT03 ON AT03.ItemID = TI.ItemID AND AT03.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND AT03.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00003' LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR AS AT09 ON AT09.ItemID = TI.ItemID AND AT09.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND AT09.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00009' LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR AS AT17 ON AT17.ItemID = TI.ItemID AND AT17.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND AT17.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00017' LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR AS AT80 ON AT80.ItemID = TI.ItemID AND AT80.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND AT80.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00080'
LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR AS ZAT04 ON ZAT04.ItemID = TI.ItemID AND ZAT04.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND ZAT04.AttrTypeCode = 'ZAT0004' LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR AS ZAT05 ON ZAT05.ItemID = TI.ItemID AND ZAT05.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND ZAT05.AttrTypeCode = 'ZAT0005'
LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ATTR_TYPE_LOV AS LOVZAT05 ON LOVZAT05.AttrTypeCode = 'ZAT0005' and LOVZAT05.LovCode = ZAT05.LovCode
LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR AS ZAT3013 ON ZAT3013.ItemID = TI.ItemID AND ZAT3013.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND ZAT3013.AttrTypeCode = 'ZAT3013' LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR AS AT08 ON AT08.ItemID = TI.ItemID AND AT08.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND AT08.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00008' LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR AS AT15 ON AT15.ItemID = TI.ItemID AND AT15.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND AT15.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00015' LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR AS AT16 ON AT16.ItemID = TI.ItemID AND AT16.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND AT16.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00016' LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR AS AT13 ON AT13.ItemID = TI.ItemID AND AT13.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND AT13.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00013' LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_MEMBER AS AUTHOR ON AUTHOR.MemberID = TI.AuthorID LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_MEMBER AS LastUser ON LastUser.MemberID = TI.LastUser LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_TEAM_TXT AS TTT ON TTT.TeamID = TI.OwnerTeamID and TTT.LanguageID = #{languageID} LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_DICTIONARY AS CLS ON CLS.TypeCode = TI.ClassCode AND CLS.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND CLS.Category = 'CLS'
WHERE TI.Deleted != 1
AND TI.ClassCode in ('CL01001','CL01002','CL01003','CL01004','CL01005','CL01006')
AND TI.ClassCode in ('CL05001','CL05002','CL05003','CL05004','CL05005','CL05006')
AND TI.ClassCode in ('CL01001','CL01002','CL01003','CL01004','CL01005','CL01006')
order by L1Code, TI.Identifier

select ROW_NUMBER()OVER(ORDER BY TT.L1Code, TT.Identifier) AS RNUM , TT.* from ( select isnull(L1.Identifier,TI.Identifier) AS L1Code , isnull(TI.Identifier,'') as Identifier , CLS.Name AS Level , AT01.PlainText AS AT01 , REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(AT03.PlainText, CHAR(11), ''), char(9), ' '), char(10), ' '), char(13), ' ') AS AT03 , AT17.PlainText AS AT17 , AT15.PlainText As AT15 , AT16.PlainText As AT16 , REPLACE(AT09.PlainText, CHAR(11), '') As AT09 , ZAT04.PlainText AS ZAT04 , LOVZAT05.Value AS LOVZAT05 , REPLACE(AT80.PlainText, CHAR(11), '') AS AT80 , ZAT3013.PlainText AS ZAT3013 , REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(AT08.PlainText, CHAR(11), ''), char(9), ' '), char(10), ' '), char(13), ' ') As AT08 , AT13.PlainText As AT13 , AUTHOR.name AS Owner , TTT.name AS OwnerTeamName , LastUser.name AS LastUpdateUser , CONVERT(CHAR(10),CONVERT(datetime, TI.LastUpdated ),21) as LastUpdated , case when (select count(*) from XBOLTADM.TB_TEAM_ROLE WHERE ItemID = TI.ItemID) > 0 then 0 else 1 end AS RASIC
, ( Select count(*) As CNT From XBOLTADM.TB_ELEMENT TE
LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_MODEL TM On TM.ModelID = TE.ModelID Where TE.ModelID = (select top 1 ModelID from XBOLTADM.TB_MODEL where ItemID = TI.ItemID and ModelTypeCode = 'MT001' and MTCategory = 'BAS' order by LastUpdated) And TE.SymTypeCode in (Select SymTypeCode From XBOLTADM.TB_SYMTYPE_ALLOCATION Where ModelTypeCode ='MT001' and MdlIF='Y') And TM.ModelTypeCode = 'MT001'
And (Select COUNT(TB.ItemID) From (Select ItemID from XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM Where ItemID = TI.ItemID) TB Where TB.ItemID in( Select ObjectID From XBOLTADM.TB_ELEMENT Where ModelID = ( Select Top 1 ModelID From XBOLTADM.TB_MODEL Where ItemID = TE.ObjectID And MTCategory = 'BAS'))) >= 0 ) AS connectionOutbound , ( Select count(*) As CNT From XBOLTADM.TB_ELEMENT TE
LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_MODEL TM On TM.ModelID = TE.ModelID Where TE.ModelID = (select top 1 ModelID from XBOLTADM.TB_MODEL where ItemID = TI.ItemID and ModelTypeCode = 'MT001' and MTCategory = 'BAS' order by LastUpdated) And TE.SymTypeCode in (Select SymTypeCode From XBOLTADM.TB_SYMTYPE_ALLOCATION Where ModelTypeCode ='MT001' and MdlIF='Y') And TM.ModelTypeCode = 'MT001'
And (Select COUNT(TB.ItemID) From (Select ItemID from XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM Where ItemID = TI.ItemID) TB Where TB.ItemID in( Select ObjectID From XBOLTADM.TB_ELEMENT Where ModelID = ( Select Top 1 ModelID From XBOLTADM.TB_MODEL Where ItemID = TE.ObjectID And MTCategory = 'BAS'))) = 0 ) AS connectionOutboundInconsistent
,( Select Count(TM.ItemID) AS CNT From XBOLTADM.TB_MODEL TM LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ELEMENT TE On TE.ObjectID = TI.ItemID Where TM.ModelID = TE.ModelID And TM.ModelTypeCode = 'MT001' And XBOLTADM.fn_GetExistObjectFromElement(TM.ItemID, (select top 1 ModelID from XBOLTADM.TB_MODEL where ItemID = TI.ItemID and ModelTypeCode = 'MT001' and MTCategory = 'BAS' order by LastUpdated)) >= 0 And TM.MTCategory IN ('BAS') ) AS connectionInbound ,( Select Count(TM.ItemID) AS CNT From XBOLTADM.TB_MODEL TM LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ELEMENT TE On TE.ObjectID = TI.ItemID Where TM.ModelID = TE.ModelID And TM.ModelTypeCode = 'MT001' And XBOLTADM.fn_GetExistObjectFromElement(TM.ItemID, (select top 1 ModelID from XBOLTADM.TB_MODEL where ItemID = TI.ItemID and ModelTypeCode = 'MT001' and MTCategory = 'BAS' order by LastUpdated)) = 0 And TM.MTCategory IN ('BAS') ) AS connectionInboundInconsistent
, case when TI.classcode = 'CL01005' and TI.status = 'NEW1' then '1' else '0' end AS L4Status from XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM TI inner join XBOLTADM.TW_PROCESS TP ON TI.ItemID = TP.ItemID Left JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM L1 ON L1.ItemID = TP.L1ItemID LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR AS AT01 ON AT01.ItemID = TI.ItemID AND AT01.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND AT01.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00001' LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR AS AT03 ON AT03.ItemID = TI.ItemID AND AT03.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND AT03.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00003' LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR AS AT09 ON AT09.ItemID = TI.ItemID AND AT09.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND AT09.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00009' LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR AS AT17 ON AT17.ItemID = TI.ItemID AND AT17.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND AT17.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00017' LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR AS AT80 ON AT80.ItemID = TI.ItemID AND AT80.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND AT80.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00080'
LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR AS ZAT04 ON ZAT04.ItemID = TI.ItemID AND ZAT04.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND ZAT04.AttrTypeCode = 'ZAT0004' LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR AS ZAT05 ON ZAT05.ItemID = TI.ItemID AND ZAT05.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND ZAT05.AttrTypeCode = 'ZAT0005'
LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ATTR_TYPE_LOV AS LOVZAT05 ON LOVZAT05.AttrTypeCode = 'ZAT0005' and LOVZAT05.LovCode = ZAT05.LovCode
LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR AS ZAT3013 ON ZAT3013.ItemID = TI.ItemID AND ZAT3013.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND ZAT3013.AttrTypeCode = 'ZAT3013' LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR AS AT08 ON AT08.ItemID = TI.ItemID AND AT08.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND AT08.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00008' LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR AS AT15 ON AT15.ItemID = TI.ItemID AND AT15.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND AT15.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00015' LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR AS AT16 ON AT16.ItemID = TI.ItemID AND AT16.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND AT16.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00016' LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR AS AT13 ON AT13.ItemID = TI.ItemID AND AT13.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND AT13.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00013' LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_MEMBER AS AUTHOR ON AUTHOR.MemberID = TI.AuthorID LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_MEMBER AS LastUser ON LastUser.MemberID = TI.LastUser LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_TEAM_TXT AS TTT ON TTT.TeamID = TI.OwnerTeamID and TTT.LanguageID = #{languageID} LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_DICTIONARY AS CLS ON CLS.TypeCode = TI.ClassCode AND CLS.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND CLS.Category = 'CLS'
WHERE TI.Deleted != 1
AND TI.ClassCode in ('CL01001','CL01002','CL01003','CL01004','CL01005','CL01006')
AND TI.ClassCode in ('CL05001','CL05002','CL05003','CL05004','CL05005','CL05006')
AND TI.ClassCode in ('CL01001','CL01002','CL01003','CL01004','CL01005','CL01006')
) TT order by TT.L1Code, TT.Identifier

SELECT Distinct T1.ItemID FROM XBOLTADM.TW_PROCESS T1, XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM T2 inner join XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM S ON T2.ToItemID = S.ItemID and Left(S.Identifier,3) != 'S99' WHERE T1.ItemID in (T2.FromItemID , T2.ToItemID) AND T2.ItemTypeCode = #{ItemTypeCode} AND T1.ItemClassCode = 'CL01006'
AND T1.L1ItemID = #{L1ItemID}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO XBOLTADM.Z_Employee ( GIM_ID, GIM_COMPANY_CODE, GIM_EMP_NO, GIM_EMP_NAME, GIM_EMP_ENG_NAME, GIM_EMP_FIRST_NAME, GIM_EMP_LAST_NAME, GIM_ORG_CODE, GIM_ORG_NAME, GIM_ORG_ENG_NAME, GIM_WP_CODE, GIM_WP_NAME, GIM_WP_ENG_NAME, GIM_ORG_GRD_NAME, GIM_ASGN_GRD_CODE, GIM_ASGN_FLAG, GIM_ASGN_CODE, GIM_ASGN_NAME, GIM_ASGN_ENG_NAME, GIM_JOB_CODE, GIM_JOB_NAME, GIM_JOB_ENG_NAME, GIM_POS_CODE, GIM_POS_NAME, GIM_POS_ENG_NAME, GIM_POS_LEVEL, GIM_GRADE_CODE, GIM_GRADE_NAME, GIM_GRADE_ENG_NAME, GIM_OCC_GRP_CODE, GIM_OCC_GRP_NAME, GIM_OCC_GRP_ENG_NAME, GIM_JOB_TITLE_CODE, GIM_JOB_TITLE_NAME, GIM_JOB_TITLE_ENG_NAME, GIM_BIZ_ADD_FLAG, GIM_USER_COMP_TYPE, GIM_USER_TYPE, GIM_RET_FLAG, GIM_RET_DATE, GIM_EXPIRE_DATE, GIM_LOCK_DATE, GIM_DELETE_DATE, GIM_APPO_DATE, GIM_HIRE_DATE, GIM_TEL_NO, GIM_CORP_TEL_NO, GIM_MOBILE, GIM_FAX, GIM_EMAIL, GIM_BIRTH_DAY, GIM_SEX_FLAG, GIM_TAKEOFF_FLAG, GIM_CHARGE_JOB, GIM_CHARGE_JOB_DTL, GIM_COMM_ORG_CODE, GIM_MESNG_FLAG, GIM_MESNG_ID, GIM_MESNG_COM_ACL, GIM_PICTURE_LINK_URL, GIM_PHOTO_LINK_URL, GIM_HOT_LINE, GIM_TEL_LINK_TYPE, GIM_ORG_TEAM_CODE, GIM_ORIGINAL_ORG_CODE, GIM_CUSTOM_ATTR1, GIM_CUSTOM_ATTR2, GIM_CUSTOM_ATTR3, GIM_CUSTOM_ATTR4, GIM_CUSTOM_ATTR5, GIM_CUSTOM_ATTR6, GIM_CUSTOM_ATTR7, GIM_CUSTOM_ATTR8, GIM_CUSTOM_ATTR9, GIM_WORK_TYPE, GIM_WORK_DATE, KHR_C_CD, KHR_EMP_ID, KHR_EMP_NM, KHR_ENG_EMP_NM, KHR_CHN_EMP_NM, KHR_STAT_CD, KHR_STAT_NM, KHR_BIZPL_CD, KHR_BIZPL_NM, KHR_BIRTH_YMD, KHR_ENTER_YMD, KHR_GRP_YMD, KHR_RETIRE_YMD, KHR_LAST_MOVE_YMD, KHR_LAST_PROM_YMD, LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR AS AT30 on AT30.ItemID = TI.ItemID AND AT30.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND AT30.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00030' LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR AS AT37 on AT37.ItemID = TI.ItemID AND AT37.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND AT37.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00037' LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ATTR_TYPE_LOV AS LOVAT37 ON LOVAT37.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00037' and LOVAT37.LovCode = AT37.LovCode

LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_MEMBER AS AUTHOR ON AUTHOR.MemberID = TI.AuthorID LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_MEMBER AS LastUser ON LastUser.MemberID = TI.LastUser LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_TEAM_TXT AS TTT ON TTT.TeamID = TI.OwnerTeamID and TTT.LanguageID = #{languageID} LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_TEAM_TXT AS TTT2 ON TTT2.TeamID = TI.OwnerTeamID and TTT2.LanguageID = #{languageID} LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_DICTIONARY AS CLS ON CLS.TypeCode = TI.ClassCode AND CLS.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND CLS.Category = 'CLS'

Select * From XBOLTADM.Z_PROC_STAT

WITH ItemMaster(MyItemID) AS ( SELECT ToItemID AS MyItemID FROM XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM ITM WHERE ITM.FromItemID = #{s_itemID} AND ITM.CategoryCode = 'ST1' AND ITM.Deleted != '1' AND (Select Deleted From XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM Where ItemID = ITM.ToItemID ) != '1' UNION ALL SELECT ITM_L.ToItemID AS MyItemID FROM XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM ITM_L, ItemMaster LCTE, XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM ITM WHERE ITM_L.Deleted != '1' AND ITM_L.CategoryCode = 'ST1' AND ITM_L.FromItemID = LCTE.MyItemID AND ITM.ItemID = ITM_L.ToItemID ) , ItemStructure(MyItemID) AS ( SELECT ItemID AS MyItemID FROM XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM WHERE ItemID = #{s_itemID} UNION ALL SELECT MyItemID FROM ItemMaster ) SELECT Distinct Row_Number()OVER(ORDER BY TI.Identifier ) as RNUM , ITM_STR.MyItemID AS ItemID , TI.Identifier As Identifier, ISNULL(TIA1.PlainText, '') AS ItemName , TI.ClassCode AS ClassCode, ISNULL(TDC.Name,'') AS ClassName , ISNULL(TEAM1.Name, '') AS CompanyName, ISNULL(TEAM2.Name, '') AS OwnerTeamName , ISNULL(TM.Name,'') + Case When ISNULL(TM.NameEN,'') != '' Then '(' + ISNULL(TM.NameEN,'') + ')' Else '' End AS AuthorName , Convert(nvarchar(20),TI.LastUpdated, 111) AS LastUpdated , Convert(nvarchar(20),TI.CreationTime, 111) AS CreationTime , TDS.Name AS StatusName , Case TI.Status When 'NEW1' Then '' + TDS.Name + '' When 'MOD1' Then '' + TDS.Name + '' When 'MOD2' Then '' + TDS.Name + '' ELSE '' + TDS.Name + '' END AS ItemStatusText , ISNULL(TIAZ1.PlainText, '') AS ZAT4001 , ISNULL(TIAZ2.PlainText, '') AS ZAT4002 , ISNULL(TIAZ3.PlainText, '') AS ZAT4003 , ISNULL(TIAZ4.PlainText, '') AS ZAT4004 , ISNULL(TIAZ5.PlainText, '') AS ZAT4005 , ISNULL(TIAZ6.PlainText, '') AS ZAT4006 , ISNULL(TIAZ8.PlainText, '') AS ZAT4008 , ISNULL(TIAZ9.PlainText, '') AS ZAT4009 , ISNULL(TATL2.Value, '') AS AT15001 , ISNULL(TATL3.Value, '') AS AT15002 , ISNULL(TIAZ12.PlainText, '') AS ZAT4012 , ISNULL(TIAZ13.PlainText, '') AS ZAT4013 , ISNULL(TATL1.Value,'') AS ZAT4014 , ISNULL(TM2.Name, '') AS ZAT4015 , ISNULL(TATL4.Value, '') AS AT15003 FROM ItemStructure ITM_STR INNER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM TI ON TI.CategoryCode = 'OJ'AND TI.ItemID = ITM_STR.MyItemID LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_DICTIONARY TDC ON TDC.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND TI.ClassCode = TDC.TypeCode And TDC.Category = 'CLS' LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_TEAM_TXT TEAM1 ON TEAM1.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND TEAM1.TeamID = TI.CompanyID LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_TEAM_TXT TEAM2 ON TEAM2.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND TEAM2.TeamID = TI.OwnerTeamID LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_MEMBER TM ON TM.MemberID = TI.AuthorID LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_DICTIONARY TDS ON TDS.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND TDS.TypeCode = TI.Status AND TDS.Category = 'ITMSTS' LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR TIA1 ON TIA1.ItemID = TI.ItemID And TIA1.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00001' And TIA1.LanguageID = #{languageID} LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR TIAZ1 ON TIAZ1.ItemID = TI.ItemID And TIAZ1.AttrTypeCode = 'ZAT4001' And TIAZ1.LanguageID = #{languageID} LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR TIAZ2 ON TIAZ2.ItemID = TI.ItemID And TIAZ2.AttrTypeCode = 'ZAT4002' And TIAZ2.LanguageID = #{languageID} LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR TIAZ3 ON TIAZ3.ItemID = TI.ItemID And TIAZ3.AttrTypeCode = 'ZAT4003' And TIAZ3.LanguageID = #{languageID} LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR TIAZ4 ON TIAZ4.ItemID = TI.ItemID And TIAZ4.AttrTypeCode = 'ZAT4004' And TIAZ4.LanguageID = #{languageID} LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR TIAZ5 ON TIAZ5.ItemID = TI.ItemID And TIAZ5.AttrTypeCode = 'ZAT4005' And TIAZ5.LanguageID = #{languageID} LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR TIAZ6 ON TIAZ6.ItemID = TI.ItemID And TIAZ6.AttrTypeCode = 'ZAT4006' And TIAZ6.LanguageID = #{languageID} LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR TIAZ8 ON TIAZ8.ItemID = TI.ItemID And TIAZ8.AttrTypeCode = 'ZAT4008' And TIAZ8.LanguageID = #{languageID} LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR TIAZ9 ON TIAZ9.ItemID = TI.ItemID And TIAZ9.AttrTypeCode = 'ZAT4009' And TIAZ9.LanguageID = #{languageID} LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR TIA151 ON TIA151.ItemID = TI.ItemID And TIA151.AttrTypeCode = 'AT15001' And TIA151.LanguageID = #{languageID} LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR TIA152 ON TIA152.ItemID = TI.ItemID And TIA152.AttrTypeCode = 'AT15002' And TIA152.LanguageID = #{languageID} LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR TIA153 ON TIA153.ItemID = TI.ItemID And TIA153.AttrTypeCode = 'AT15003' And TIA153.LanguageID = #{languageID} LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ATTR_TYPE_LOV TATL2 ON TATL2.AttrTypeCode = TIA151.AttrTypeCode AND TATL2.LanguageID = #{defaultLang} And TATL2.LovCode = TIA151.LovCode LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ATTR_TYPE_LOV TATL3 ON TATL3.AttrTypeCode = TIA152.AttrTypeCode AND TATL3.LanguageID = #{defaultLang} And TATL3.LovCode = TIA152.LovCode LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ATTR_TYPE_LOV TATL4 ON TATL4.AttrTypeCode = TIA153.AttrTypeCode AND TATL4.LanguageID = #{defaultLang} And TATL4.LovCode = TIA153.LovCode LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR TIAZ12 ON TIAZ12.ItemID = TI.ItemID And TIAZ12.AttrTypeCode = 'ZAT4012' And TIAZ12.LanguageID = #{languageID} LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR TIAZ13 ON TIAZ13.ItemID = TI.ItemID And TIAZ13.AttrTypeCode = 'ZAT4013' And TIAZ13.LanguageID = #{languageID} LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR TIAZ14 ON TIAZ14.ItemID = TI.ItemID And TIAZ14.AttrTypeCode = 'ZAT4014' And TIAZ14.LanguageID = #{languageID} LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR TIAZ15 ON TIAZ15.ItemID = TI.ItemID And TIAZ15.AttrTypeCode = 'ZAT4015' And TIAZ15.LanguageID = #{languageID} LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR TIAZ10D ON CONVERT(VARCHAR(10),TIAZ10D.ItemID) = TIAZ10D.PlainText And TIAZ10D.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00001' And TIAZ10D.LanguageID = #{languageID} LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ATTR_TYPE_LOV TATL1 ON TATL1.AttrTypeCode = TIAZ14.AttrTypeCode AND TATL1.LanguageID = #{defaultLang} And TATL1.LovCode = TIAZ14.LovCode LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_MY_ITEM TMI ON TMI.ItemID = TI.ItemID And TMI.AssignmentType = 'CNGROLETP' And TMI.RoleType = 'R' And TMI.OrderNum = 1 LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_MEMBER TM2 ON CONVERT(VARCHAR(10),TM2.MemberID) = TMI.MemberID WHERE TI.ClassCode IN (#{classCode}) ORDER BY TI.Identifier
{CALL XBOLTADM.${dbFuncCode} (#{resetItemAttrCode}) }

Select Top 1 KPI.Creator , ISNULL( ISNULL(KPI.Creator,TTR.RoleManagerID), TT.RoleManagerID ) AS RoleManagerID
, Case When ISNULL(KPI.Creator,TTR.RoleManagerID) != '' Then
ISNULL(TM.NAME,ISNULL(TM1.Name,'N/A')) + Case When ISNULL(TM.NameEN,'') != '' Then '(' + ISNULL(TM.NameEN,'') + ')' When ISNULL(TM1.NameEN,'') != '' Then '(' + ISNULL(TM1.NameEN,'') + ')' Else '' End
Else
ISNULL(TM2.NAME,'N/A') + Case When ISNULL(TM2.NameEN,'') != '' Then '(' + ISNULL(TM2.NameEN,'') + ')' Else '' End
End As RoleManagerNM
From XBOLTADM.Z_KPI_VALUE KPI LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_MEMBER TM ON TM.MemberID = KPI.Creator LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_TEAM_ROLE TTR ON TTR.ItemID = KPI.KPIItemID And TTR.TeamID = KPI.TeamID And TTR.TeamRoleCat = 'TEAMROLETP' AND TTR.Assigned != 0 LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_MEMBER TM1 ON TM1.MemberID =TTR.RoleManagerID LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_TEAM TT ON TT.TeamID = KPI.TeamID LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_MEMBER TM2 ON TM2.MemberID = TT.RoleManagerID Where KPI.ObjectID = #{objectID} And KPI.KPIItemID = #{kpiItemID} And KPI.TeamID = #{teamID}
mapper.delete: TRUNCATE TABLE XBOLTADM.Z_PAL_DEPT TRUNCATE TABLE XBOLTADM.Z_PAL_EMP
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO XBOLTADM.Z_PAL_DEPT ( DEPT_CD, PDEPT_CD , CDEPT_CD , CDEPT_NM, DEPT_NM, DEPT_NM_EN, MGT_EMP_NO, ACTIVE, SORT_NO ) VALUES ( #{DEPT_CD}, #{PDEPT_CD}, #{CDEPT_CD}, #{CDEPT_NM}, #{DEPT_NM}, #{DEPT_NM_E}, #{MGT_EMP_NO}, #{ACTIVE}, #{SORT_NO} )

INSERT INTO XBOLTADM.Z_PAL_EMP ( EMP_NO, DEPT_CD, GW_ID, EMP_NM, EMP_NM_EN, POSITION, JOIN_DT, JOB_CD, JOB_NM, EMAIL, USE_FG, DEF_LANG ) VALUES ( #{EMP_NO}, #{DEPT_CD}, #{GW_ID}, #{EMP_NM}, #{EMP_NM_EN}, #{POSITION}, #{JOIN_DT}, #{JOB_CD}, #{JOB_NM}, #{EMAIL}, #{USE_FG}, #{DEF_LANG} )
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM XBOLTDLM.IM_SYNC_EMP WHERE USERID = '' OR USERID = 'NULL' OR USERID IS NULL DELETE FROM XBOLTDLM.IM_SYNC_EMP_DEPT WHERE USERID = '' OR USERID = 'NULL' OR USERID IS NULL
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO XBOLTDLM.IM_SYNC_ORG ( DEPTCODE, DEPTNAME, DEPTENNAME, PARENTDEPTCODE, PARENTDEPTNAME, FULLDEPTCODE, FULLDEPTNAME, DEPTORDER, STATUS, COMPANYCODE, COMPANYNAME, COUNTRYCODE, COUNTRYNAME ) VALUES ( #{DEPTCODE}, #{DEPTNAME}, #{DEPTENNAME}, #{PARENTDEPTCODE}, #{PARENTDEPTNAME}, #{FULLDEPTCODE}, #{FULLDEPTNAME}, #{DEPTORDER}, #{STATUS}, #{COMPANYCODE}, #{COMPANYNAME}, #{COUNTRYCODE}, #{COUNTRYNAME}
)

INSERT INTO XBOLTDLM.IM_SYNC_EMP_DEPT ( USERID, DEPTCODE, EMPNO, TYPE, STATUS
) VALUES ( #{USERID}, #{DEPTCODE}, #{EMPNO}, #{TYPE}, #{STATUS} )
mapper.select: { CALL XBOLTADM.HR_IF_STD }

SELECT TI.Identifier, PlainText, TI.ItemID FROM XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM TI LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR TIA ON TI.ItemID = TIA.ItemID AND TIA.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND AttrTypeCode = 'AT00001' WHERE TI.ClassCode = 'CL01001' ORDER BY Identifier

SELECT TMT.Name AS TeamName,COUNT(DISTINCT TI.ItemID) L4Count , Team.TeamID , COUNT(DISTINCT TI.ItemID) - COUNT(DISTINCT TI.DimItemID) AS 일반, COUNT(DISTINCT TI.DimItemID) AS 중요, TEAM.TeamCode AS TeamCode FROM XBOLTADM.TB_TEAM TEAM LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_TEAM_TXT TMT ON TMT.TeamID = TEAM.TeamID AND TMT.LanguageID = #{sessionCurrLangType} INNER JOIN (SELECT ITM.ItemID, ITM.OwnerTeamID AS TeamID, IDM.ItemID As DimItemID FROM XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM ITM LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_DIM IDM on IDM.dimtypeID = 123720 And IDM.ItemID = ITM.ItemID And IDM.DimValueID = 'CP1' WHERE ITM.ClassCode = 'CL01005' AND ITM.Status != 'DEL1' And Left(ITM.Identifier, 2) != 'TB' AND ISNULL(ITM.Identifier,'') != '' AND ITM.Deleted != '1' UNION Select TMR.ItemID, TMR.TeamID, IDM.ItemID AS DimItemID FROM XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM ITM LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_DIM IDM ON IDM.DimTypeID = 123720 And IDM.ItemID = ITM.ItemID And IDM.DimValueID = 'CP1' , XBOLTADM.TB_TEAM_ROLE TMR WHERE ITM.ItemID = TMR.ItemID And ITM.ClassCode = 'CL01005' AND ITM.Status != 'DEL1' And Left(ITM.Identifier, 2) != 'TB' AND ISNULL(ITM.Identifier,'') != '' AND ITM.Deleted != '1' ) TI ON TI.TeamID = TEAM.TeamID GROUP BY TMT.Name, Team.TeamID, TEAM.TeamCode Order By TMT.Name

SELECT STRING_AGG(CONCAT('MAX(', REPLACE(TRIM(TeamName),' ',''), ') AS ', REPLACE(TRIM(TeamName),' ','') ), ', ') FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT TMT.Name AS TeamName FROM XBOLTADM.TB_TEAM TEAM LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_TEAM_TXT TMT ON TMT.TeamID = TEAM.TeamID AND TMT.LanguageID = #{sessionCurrLangType} INNER JOIN (SELECT ITM.ItemID, ITM.OwnerTeamID AS TeamID FROM XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM ITM LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_DIM IDM ON IDM.DimTypeID = 123720 And IDM.ItemID = ITM.ItemID And IDM.DimValueID = 'CP1' WHERE ITM.ClassCode = 'CL01005' AND ITM.Status != 'DEL1' And Left(ITM.Identifier, 2) != 'TB' AND ISNULL(ITM.Identifier,'') != '' AND ITM.Deleted != '1' UNION Select TMR.ItemID, TMR.TeamID FROM XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM ITM LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_DIM IDM ON IDM.DimTypeID = 123720 And IDM.ItemID = ITM.ItemID And IDM.DimValueID = 'CP1' , XBOLTADM.TB_TEAM_ROLE TMR WHERE ITM.ItemID = TMR.ItemID And ITM.ClassCode = 'CL01005' AND ITM.Status != 'DEL1' and Left(ITM.Identifier, 2) != 'TB' AND ISNULL(ITM.Identifier,'') != '' AND ITM.Deleted != '1' AND TMR.Assigned != '0' ) TI ON TI.TeamID = TEAM.TeamID
GROUP BY TMT.Name, Team.TeamID ) AS TeamTable

SELECT DISTINCT REPLACE(TRIM(TMT.Name),' ','') AS TeamName, TEAM.TeamCode, TMT.Name AS TeamNameForGrid FROM XBOLTADM.TB_TEAM TEAM LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_TEAM_TXT TMT ON TMT.TeamID = TEAM.TeamID AND TMT.LanguageID = #{sessionCurrLangType} INNER JOIN (SELECT ITM.ItemID, ITM.OwnerTeamID AS TeamID FROM XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM ITM LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_DIM IDM ON IDM.DimTypeID =123720 And IDM.ItemID = ITM.ItemID And IDM.DimValueID = 'CP1' WHERE ITM.ClassCode = 'CL01005' AND ITM.Status != 'DEL1' And Left(ITM.Identifier, 2) != 'TB' AND ISNULL(ITM.Identifier,'') != '' AND ITM.Deleted != '1' UNION Select TMR.ItemID, TMR.TeamID FROM XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM ITM LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_DIM IDM ON IDM.DimTypeID = 123720 And IDM.ItemID = ITM.ItemID And IDM.DimValueID = 'CP1' ,XBOLTADM.TB_TEAM_ROLE TMR WHERE ITM.ItemID = TMR.ItemID And ITM.ClassCode = 'CL01005' AND ITM.Status != 'DEL1' And Left(ITM.Identifier, 2) != 'TB' AND ISNULL(ITM.Identifier,'') != '' AND ITM.Deleted != '1' AND TMR.Assigned != '0' ) TI ON TI.TeamID = TEAM.TeamID

SELECT '중요' AS Type1, '변경중' AS Type2, ${teamColumnName} , ${teamColumnSumName} AS Total, 1 AS id FROM ( SELECT REPLACE(TRIM(TMT.Name),' ','') AS TeamName, Team.TeamID AS TeamID, COUNT(DISTINCT TI.ItemID) AS L4Count, Count(DISTINCT TI3.ItemID) AS CriticalCNG, Count(DISTINCT TI2.ItemID) AS CriticalREL,
Count(DISTINCT TI5.ItemID) - COUNT(DISTINCT TI3.ItemID) AS GeneralCNG, Count(DISTINCT TI4.ItemID) - COUNT(DISTINCT TI2.ItemID) AS GeneralREL, COUNT(*) AS Type1, COUNT(*) AS Type2 FROM XBOLTADM.TB_TEAM TEAM LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_TEAM_TXT TMT ON TMT.TeamID = TEAM.TeamID AND TMT.LanguageID = #{sessionCurrLangType} INNER JOIN (SELECT ITM.ItemID, ITM.OwnerTeamID AS TeamID, ITM.Status, IDM.ItemID AS DimItemID FROM XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM ITM LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_DIM IDM ON IDM.DimTypeID = 123720 And IDM.ItemID = ITM.ItemID And IDM.DimValueID = 'CP1' WHERE ITM.ClassCode = 'CL01005' AND ITM.Status != 'DEL1' And Left(ITM.Identifier, 2) != 'TB' AND ISNULL(ITM.Identifier,'') != '' AND ITM.Deleted != '1' UNION Select TMR.ItemID, TMR.TeamID, ITM.Status, IDM.ItemID AS DimItemID FROM XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM ITM LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_DIM IDM ON IDM.DimtypeID = 123720 And IDM.ItemID = ITM.ItemID And IDM.DimValueID = 'CP1' , XBOLTADM.TB_TEAM_ROLE TMR WHERE ITM.ItemID = TMR.ItemID And ITM.ClassCode = 'CL01005' AND ITM.Status != 'DEL1' And Left(ITM.Identifier, 2) != 'TB' AND ISNULL(ITM.Identifier,'') != '' AND ITM.Deleted != '1' AND TMR.Assigned != '0' ) TI ON TI.TeamID = TEAM.TeamID
LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.Tb_ITEM TI2 ON TI2.ItemID = TI.DimItemID And TI2.Status = 'REL' LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.Tb_ITEM TI3 ON TI3.ItemID = TI.DimItemID And TI3.Status != 'REL'
LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.Tb_ITEM TI4 ON TI4.ItemID = TI.ItemID And TI4.Status = 'REL' LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.Tb_ITEM TI5 ON TI5.ItemID = TI.ItemID And TI5.Status != 'REL'
GROUP BY TMT.Name, Team.TeamID ) AS TeamTable PIVOT ( MAX(CriticalCNG) FOR TeamName IN ( ${pivotColumnName} ) ) AS TeamResult
Union All
SELECT '중요' AS Type1, '릴리즈' AS Type2, ${teamColumnName} , ${teamColumnSumName} AS Total, 2 AS id FROM ( SELECT REPLACE(TRIM(TMT.Name),' ','') AS TeamName, Team.TeamID AS TeamID, COUNT(DISTINCT TI.ItemID) AS L4Count, Count(DISTINCT TI3.ItemID) AS CriticalCNG, Count(DISTINCT TI2.ItemID) AS CriticalREL, Count(DISTINCT TI5.ItemID) - COUNT(DISTINCT TI3.ItemID) AS GeneralCNG, Count(DISTINCT TI4.ItemID) - COUNT(DISTINCT TI2.ItemID) AS GeneralREL, COUNT(*) AS Type1, COUNT(*) AS Type2 FROM XBOLTADM.TB_TEAM TEAM LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_TEAM_TXT TMT ON TMT.TeamID = TEAM.TeamID AND TMT.LanguageID = #{sessionCurrLangType} INNER JOIN (SELECT ITM.ItemID, ITM.OwnerTeamID AS TeamID, ITM.Status, IDM.ItemID AS DimItemID FROM XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM ITM LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_DIM IDM ON IDM.DimTypeID = 123720 And IDM.ItemID = ITM.ItemID And IDM.DimvalueID = 'CP1' WHERE ITM.ClassCode = 'CL01005' AND ITM.Status != 'DEL1' And Left(ITM.Identifier, 2) != 'TB' AND ISNULL(ITM.Identifier,'') != '' AND ITM.Deleted != '1' UNION Select TMR.ItemID, TMR.TeamID, ITM.Status, IDM.ItemID AS DimItemID FROM XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM ITM LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_DIM IDM ON IDM.DimTypeID =123720 And IDM.ItemId = ITM.ItemID And IDM.DimvalueID = 'CP1' , XBOLTADM.TB_TEAM_ROLE TMR WHERE ITM.ItemID = TMR.ItemID And ITM.ClassCode = 'CL01005' AND ITM.Status != 'DEL1' And Left(ITM.Identifier, 2) != 'TB' AND ISNULL(ITM.Identifier,'') != '' AND ITM.Deleted != '1' AND TMR.Assigned != '0' ) TI ON TI.TeamID = TEAM.TeamID LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.Tb_ITEM TI2 ON TI2.ItemID = TI.DimItemID And TI2.Status = 'REL' LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.Tb_ITEM TI3 ON TI3.ItemID = TI.DimItemID And TI3.Status != 'REL'
LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.Tb_ITEM TI4 ON TI4.ItemID = TI.ItemID And TI4.Status = 'REL' LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.Tb_ITEM TI5 ON TI5.ItemID = TI.ItemID And TI5.Status != 'REL'
GROUP BY TMT.Name, Team.TeamID ) AS TeamTable PIVOT ( MAX(CriticalREL) FOR TeamName IN (${pivotColumnName}) ) AS TeamResult
Union All
SELECT '일반' AS Type1, '변경중' AS Type2, ${teamColumnName} , ${teamColumnSumName} AS Total, 3 AS id FROM ( SELECT REPLACE(TRIM(TMT.Name),' ','') AS TeamName, Team.TeamID AS TeamID, COUNT(DISTINCT TI.ItemID) AS L4Count, Count(DISTINCT TI3.ItemID) AS CriticalCNG, Count(DISTINCT TI2.ItemID) AS CriticalREL, Count(DISTINCT TI5.ItemID) - COUNT(DISTINCT TI3.ItemID) AS GeneralCNG, Count(DISTINCT TI4.ItemID) - COUNT(DISTINCT TI2.ItemID) AS GeneralREL, COUNT(*) AS Type1, COUNT(*) AS Type2 FROM XBOLTADM.TB_TEAM TEAM LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_TEAM_TXT TMT ON TMT.TeamID = TEAM.TeamID AND TMT.LanguageID = #{sessionCurrLangType} INNER JOIN (SELECT ITM.ItemID, ITM.OwnerTeamID AS TeamID, itm.status, IDM.ItemID AS DimItemID FROM XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM ITM LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_DIM IDM ON IDM.DimTypeID = 123720 And IDM.ItemID = ITM.ItemID And IDM.DimvalueID = 'CP1' WHERE ITM.ClassCode = 'CL01005' AND ITM.Status != 'DEL1' and Left(ITM.Identifier, 2) != 'TB' AND ISNULL(ITM.Identifier,'') != '' AND ITM.Deleted != '1' UNION Select TMR.ItemID, TMR.TeamID, ITM.Status, IDM.ItemID AS DimItemID FROM XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM ITM LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_DIM IDM ON IDM.DimTypeID = 123720 And IDM.ItemID = ITM.ItemID And IDM.DimValueID = 'CP1' , XBOLTADM.TB_TEAM_ROLE TMR WHERE ITM.ItemID = TMR.ItemID And ITM.ClassCode = 'CL01005' AND ITM.Status != 'DEL1' And Left(ITM.Identifier, 2) != 'TB' AND ISNULL(ITM.Identifier,'') != '' AND ITM.Deleted != '1' AND TMR.Assigned != '0' ) TI ON TI.TeamID = TEAM.TeamID LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.Tb_ITEM TI2 ON TI2.ItemID = TI.DimItemID And TI2.Status = 'REL' LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.Tb_ITEM TI3 ON TI3.ItemID = TI.DimItemID And TI3.Status != 'REL' LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.Tb_ITEM TI4 ON TI4.ItemID = TI.ItemID And TI4.Status = 'REL' LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.Tb_ITEM TI5 ON TI5.ItemID = TI.ItemID And TI5.Status != 'REL'
GROUP BY TMT.Name, Team.TeamID ) AS TeamTable PIVOT ( MAX(GeneralCNG) FOR TeamName IN (${pivotColumnName}) ) AS TeamResult
Union All
SELECT '일반' AS Type1, '릴리즈' AS Type2, ${teamColumnName} , ${teamColumnSumName} AS Total, 4 AS id FROM ( SELECT REPLACE(TRIM(TMT.Name),' ','') AS TeamName, Team.TeamID AS TeamID, COUNT(DISTINCT TI.ItemID) AS L4Count, Count(DISTINCT TI3.ItemID) AS CriticalCNG, Count(DISTINCT TI2.ItemID) AS CriticalREL, Count(DISTINCT TI5.ItemID) - COUNT(DISTINCT TI3.ItemID) AS GeneralCNG, Count(DISTINCT TI4.ItemID) - COUNT(DISTINCT TI2.ItemID) AS GeneralREL, COUNT(*) AS Type1, COUNT(*) AS Type2 FROM XBOLTADM.TB_TEAM TEAM LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_TEAM_TXT TMT ON TMT.TeamID = TEAM.TeamID AND TMT.LanguageID = #{sessionCurrLangType} INNER JOIN (SELECT ITM.ItemID, ITM.OwnerTeamID AS TeamID, ITM.Status, IDM.ItemID AS DimItemID FROM XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM ITM LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_DIM IDM ON IDM.DimTypeID = 123720 And IDM.ItemID = ITM.ItemID And IDM.DimvalueID = 'CP1' WHERE ITM.ClassCode = 'CL01005' AND ITM.Status != 'DEL1' And Left(ITM.Identifier, 2) != 'TB' AND ISNULL(ITM.Identifier,'') != '' AND ITM.Deleted != '1' UNION Select TMR.ItemID, TMR.TeamID, ITM.Status, IDM.ItemID AS DimItemID FROM XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM ITM LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_DIM IDM ON IDM.DimTypeID = 123720 And IDM.ItemID = ITM.ItemID And IDM.DimvalueID = 'CP1' , XBOLTADM.TB_TEAM_ROLE TMR WHERE ITM.ItemID = TMR.ItemID And ITM.ClassCode = 'CL01005' AND ITM.Status != 'DEL1' And Left(ITM.Identifier, 2) != 'TB' AND ISNULL(ITM.Identifier,'') != '' AND ITM.Deleted != '1' AND TMR.Assigned != '0' ) TI ON TI.TeamID = TEAM.TeamID LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.Tb_ITEM TI2 ON TI2.ItemID = TI.DimItemID And TI2.Status = 'REL' LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.Tb_ITEM TI3 ON TI3.ItemID = TI.DimItemID And TI3.Status != 'REL' LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.Tb_ITEM TI4 ON TI4.ItemID = TI.ItemID And TI4.Status = 'REL' LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.Tb_ITEM TI5 ON TI5.ItemID = TI.ItemID And TI5.Status != 'REL'
GROUP BY TMT.Name, Team.TeamID ) AS TeamTable PIVOT ( MAX(GeneralREL) FOR TeamName IN (${pivotColumnName}) ) AS TeamResult
Union All
SELECT 'Total' AS Type1, '' AS Type2, ${teamColumnName} , ${teamColumnSumName} AS Total, 5 AS id FROM ( SELECT REPLACE(TRIM(TMT.Name),' ','') AS TeamName, Team.TeamID AS TeamID, COUNT(DISTINCT TI.ItemID) AS L4Count, Count(DISTINCT TI3.ItemID) AS CriticalCNG, Count(DISTINCT TI2.ItemID) AS CriticalREL, Count(DISTINCT TI5.ItemID) - COUNT(DISTINCT TI3.ItemID) AS GeneralCNG, Count(DISTINCT TI4.ItemID) - COUNT(DISTINCT TI2.ItemID) AS GeneralREL, COUNT(*) AS Type1, COUNT(*) AS Type2 FROM XBOLTADM.TB_TEAM TEAM LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_TEAM_TXT TMT ON TMT.TeamID = TEAM.TeamID AND TMT.LanguageID = #{sessionCurrLangType} INNER JOIN (SELECT ITM.ItemID, ITM.OwnerTeamID AS TeamID, ITM.Status, IDM.ItemID AS DimItemID FROM XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM ITM LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_DIM IDM ON IDM.DimTypeID =123720 And IDM.ItemID = ITM.ItemID And IDM.DimvalueID = 'CP1' WHERE ITM.ClassCode = 'CL01005' AND ITM.Status != 'DEL1' And Left(ITM.Identifier, 2) != 'TB' AND ISNULL(ITM.Identifier,'') != '' AND ITM.Deleted != '1' UNION Select TMR.ItemID, TMR.TeamID, ITM.Status, IDM.ItemID AS DimItemID FROM XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM ITM LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_DIM IDM ON IDM.DimTypeID =123720 And IDM.ItemID = ITM.ItemID And IDM.DimValueID = 'CP1' , XBOLTADM.TB_TEAM_ROLE TMR WHERE ITM.ItemID = TMR.ItemID And ITM.ClassCode = 'CL01005' AND ITM.Status != 'DEL1' And Left(ITM.Identifier, 2) != 'TB' AND ISNULL(ITM.Identifier,'') != '' AND ITM.Deleted != '1' AND TMR.Assigned != '0' ) TI ON TI.TeamID = TEAM.TeamID LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.Tb_ITEM TI2 ON TI2.ItemID = TI.DimItemID And TI2.Status = 'REL' LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.Tb_ITEM TI3 ON TI3.ItemID = TI.DimItemID And TI3.Status != 'REL' LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.Tb_ITEM TI4 ON TI4.ItemID = TI.ItemID And TI4.Status = 'REL' LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.Tb_ITEM TI5 ON TI5.ItemID = TI.ItemID And TI5.Status != 'REL' GROUP BY TMT.Name, Team.TeamID ) AS TeamTable PIVOT ( MAX(L4Count) FOR TeamName IN (${pivotColumnName}) ) AS TeamResult

SELECT PRSUM.itemID AS ItemID, ISNULL(L1ID.Identifier, ITM.Identifier) AS L1Code, ITM.Identifier AS Code, ATRL1.PlainText AS L1, ATRL2.PlainText AS L2, ATRL3.PlainText AS L3, ATRNM.PlainText AS L4, CLS.Name AS Level , TD.Name AS STATUS, REPLACE(ATRDESC.PlainText, CHAR(11), '') AS Description, ISNULL(ATRSTD.PlainText,'') AS OPSTD , ISNULL(ATRISU.PlainText,'') AS ISSUES , ISNULL(ATLOV.Value,'') As Frequency,
ISNULL(ATRTIME.PlainText ,'') AS TKTIME,
ISNULL((SELECT CASE WHEN IDM.DimValueID ='CP1' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS TYPE FROM XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_DIM IDM WHERE IDM.ItemID = ITM.ItemID AND IDM.DimValueID ='CP1' AND IDM.DimTypeID ='123720' ),'N')AS 'CProc',
ISNULL((SELECT STRING_AGG(DIV.Name,',') FROM XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_DIM AS DIM INNER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_DIM_VALUE_TXT AS DIV ON DIM.DimValueID = DIV.DimValueID WHERE DIM.ItemID = ITM.ItemID AND DIV.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND DIV.DimTypeID = '120624' AND DIV.DimValueID NOT LIKE'%ZM%' ),'') AS DIVISION, TOT.Name AS OwnerTeamName, AUTHOR.name AS Owner, ISNULL (( SELECT STRING_AGG(TT.Name, ', ') AS 'Name' FROM XBOLTADM.TB_TEAM_ROLE AS TR1 inner JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_TEAM_TXT AS TT ON TT.TeamID = TR1.TeamID WHERE TR1.ItemID = ITM.ItemID and TR1.TeamRoleType = 'EXE' and TT.LanguageID = #{languageID} and tt.Name NOT LIKE '%PE영업팀%' ),' ' ) AS 'ExeDept', ISNULL (( SELECT STRING_AGG(TT.Name, ', ') AS 'Name' FROM XBOLTADM.TB_TEAM_ROLE AS TR2 inner JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_TEAM_TXT AS TT ON TT.TeamID = TR2.TeamID WHERE TR2.ItemID = ITM.ItemID and TR2.TeamRoleType = 'REL' and TT.LanguageID = #{languageID} and tt.Name NOT LIKE '%PE영업팀%' ),' ' ) AS 'RelDept' FROM XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM AS STR LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM AS ITM ON ITM.ItemID = STR.ToItemID LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_DICTIONARY AS CLS ON CLS.TypeCode = ITM.ClassCode AND CLS.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND CLS.Category = 'CLS' Inner Join XBOLTADM.TW_PROCESS AS PRSUM ON PRSUM.ItemID = ITM.ItemID Inner Join XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM AS L1ID ON L1ID.ItemID = PRSUM.L1ItemID LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR AS ATRL1 ON ATRL1.LanguageID =#{languageID} AND ATRL1.ItemID= PRSUM.L1ItemID AND ATRL1.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00001' LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR AS ATRL2 ON ATRL2.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND ATRL2.ItemID= PRSUM.L2ItemID AND ATRL2.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00001' LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR AS ATRL3 ON ATRL3.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND ATRL3.ItemID= PRSUM.L3ItemID AND ATRL3.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00001' LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR AS ATRL4 ON ATRL4.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND ATRL4.ItemID= PRSUM.L4ItemID AND ATRL4.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00001' LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR AS ATRNM ON ATRNM.ItemID = ITM.ItemID AND ATRNM.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND ATRNM.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00001' LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR AS ATRDESC ON ATRDESC.ItemID = ITM.ItemID AND ATRDESC.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND ATRDESC.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00003' LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR AS ATRINPUT ON ATRINPUT.ItemID = ITM.ItemID AND ATRINPUT.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND ATRINPUT.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00015'LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR AS ATROUTPUT ON ATROUTPUT.ItemID = ITM.ItemID AND ATROUTPUT.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND ATROUTPUT.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00016'LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_TEAM_TXT AS TOT ON ITM.OwnerTeamID = TOT.TeamID AND TOT.LanguageID = #{languageID} LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR AS ATRSTD ON ATRSTD.ItemID = ITM.ItemID AND ATRSTD.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND ATRSTD.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00008' LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR AS ATRISU ON ATRISU.ItemID = ITM.ItemID AND ATRISU.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND ATRISU.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00006' LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR AS ATRFREQ ON ATRFREQ.ItemID = ITM.ItemID AND ATRFREQ.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND ATRFREQ.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00009' LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ATTR_TYPE_LOV AS ATLOV ON ATLOV.LovCode = ATRFREQ.LovCode AND ATLOV.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00009'LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR AS ATRTIME ON ATRTIME.ItemID = ITM.ItemID AND ATRTIME.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND ATRTIME.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00088' LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_CHANGE_SET AS CS ON ITM.CurChangeSet = CS.ChangeSetID LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_MEMBER AS AUTHOR ON AUTHOR.MemberID = ITM.AuthorID LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_DICTIONARY TD on ITM.Status = TD.TypeCode AND TD.Category = 'ITMSTS' AND TD.LanguageID = #{languageID} Where STR.CategoryCode = 'ST1' And ITM.ItemTypeCode = 'OJ00001' AND ITM.ClassCode Not In ('CL01007', 'CL01008','CL01006') AND ITM.Deleted != 1 AND ITM.ClassCode in ('CL01005') AND ITM.Identifier IS NOT NULL Order by L1Code, Code

SELECT COUNT(*) AS value, PlainText label, IA.ItemID AS ItemID FROM XBOLTADM.TW_PROCESS TP INNER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR IA ON TP.L1ItemID=IA.ItemID AND IA.AttrTypeCode='AT00001' AND IA.ClassCode='CL01001' AND IA.LanguageID=#{sessionCurrLangType} INNER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM ITM ON ITM.ItemID = TP.ItemID INNER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_CHANGE_SET CS ON CS.ChangeSetID = ITM.CurChangeSet INNER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM AS ITM2 ON ITM2.ItemID = IA.ItemID WHERE TP.ItemClassCode=#{ClassCode} AND CS.ChangeType !='DEL' GROUP BY TP.ItemClassCode, PlainText, IA.ItemID,ITM2.Identifier ORDER BY ITM2.Identifier

SELECT COUNT(*) AS value , IA.PlainText AS label , IA.ItemID AS ItemID , IA.PlainText AS id , '' AS color , IA.PlainText + ' ' + CAST(COUNT(*) AS Varchar) AS label2 FROM XBOLTADM.TW_PROCESS TP INNER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR IA ON TP.L1ItemID=IA.ItemID AND IA.AttrTypeCode='AT00001' AND IA.ClassCode='CL01001' AND IA.LanguageID=#{sessionCurrLangType} INNER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR TIA ON TP.L1ItemID=TIA.ItemID AND TIA.AttrTypeCode='AT00002' AND TIA.ClassCode='CL01001' AND TIA.LanguageID=#{sessionCurrLangType} WHERE TP.ItemClassCode=#{ClassCode} GROUP BY TP.ItemClassCode, IA.PlainText, IA.ItemID

WITH ItemMaster(MyItemID) AS ( SELECT ITM.ItemID AS MyItemID FROM XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM ITM WHERE ITM.ParentID = #{strItemID} AND ITM.CategoryCode = #{categoryCode} AND ITM.Deleted != '1' AND (Select Deleted From XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM Where ItemID = ITM.ToItemID ) != '1' UNION ALL SELECT ITM_L.ItemID AS MyItemID FROM XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM ITM_L, ItemMaster LCTE, XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM ITM WHERE ITM_L.Deleted != '1' AND ITM_L.CategoryCode = #{categoryCode} AND ITM_L.ParentID = LCTE.MyItemID AND ITM.ItemID = ITM_L.ToItemID ) , ItemStructure(MyItemID) AS ( SELECT ItemID AS MyItemID FROM XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM WHERE ItemID = #{s_itemID} UNION ALL SELECT MyItemID FROM ItemMaster ) Select Distinct Row_Number()OVER(ORDER BY TITO.Identifier ) AS RNUM , TF.FileRealName , TF.FileName , TIH.L0ItemID, TIH.L1ItemID, TIH.L2ItemID, TIH.L3ItemID, TIH.L4ItemID, TIH.L5ItemID , ISNULL(TIAL0.PlainText,'') AS L0ItemName , ISNULL(TIAL1.PlainText,'') AS L1ItemName , ISNULL(TIAL2.PlainText,'') AS L2ItemName , ISNULL(TIAL3.PlainText,'') AS L3ItemName , ISNULL(TIAL4.PlainText,'') AS L4ItemName , ISNULL(TIAL5.PlainText,'') AS L5ItemName , TDC.Name AS ClassName , TITO.Identifier , TIA.PlainText AS ItemName , Convert(nvarchar(10),CONVERT(datetime,TF.LastUpdated),120) AS LastUpdated , TF.DocumentID , TF.Seq , ISNULL(TM.Name,'') + Case When ISNULL(TM.NameEN,'') != '' Then '(' + ISNULL(TM.NameEN,'') + ')' Else '' End As RegUserName , ISNULL(TM2.Name,'') + Case When ISNULL(TM2.NameEN,'') != '' Then '(' + ISNULL(TM2.NameEN,'') + ')' Else '' End As LastUser , TF.DownCNT , TL.LanguageCode , ITM_STR.MyItemID AS StrItemID , ISNULL(TIA2.PlainText,'') AS ItemNo , ISNULL(TFT.FilePath,'') AS FilePath , TI.ToItemID AS MstItemID , TF.FilePath AS ExtFileURL , TI.ToItemID , TISH.L0ItemID AS L0StrItemID, TISH.L1ItemID AS L1StrItemID, TISH.L2ItemID AS L2StrItemID, TISH.L3ItemID AS L3StrItemID, TISH.L4ItemID AS L4StrItemID, TISH.L5ItemID AS L5StrItemID FROM ItemStructure ITM_STR, XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM TI, XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM TITO LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR TIA ON TIA.ItemID = TITO.ItemID and TIA.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00001' And TIA.LanguageID = #{languageID} LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR TIA2 ON TIA2.ItemID = TITO.ItemID and TIA2.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00000' And TIA2.LanguageID = #{languageID} INNER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_FILE TF ON TF.DocumentID = TITO.ItemID LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_FLTP TFT ON TFT.FltpCode = TF.FltpCode LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TW_ITEM_HIER TIH ON TIH.ItemID = TITO.ItemID LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TW_ITEM_STR_HIER TISH ON TISH.StrItemID = TIH.StrItemID
LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR TIAL0 ON TIAL0.ItemID = TIH.L0ItemID And TIAL0.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00001' And TIAL0.LanguageID = #{languageID} LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR TIAL1 ON TIAL1.ItemID = TIH.L1ItemID And TIAL1.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00001' And TIAL1.LanguageID = #{languageID} LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR TIAL2 ON TIAL2.ItemID = TIH.L2ItemID And TIAL2.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00001' And TIAL2.LanguageID = #{languageID} LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR TIAL3 ON TIAL3.ItemID = TIH.L3ItemID And TIAL3.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00001' And TIAL3.LanguageID = #{languageID} LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR TIAL4 ON TIAL4.ItemID = TIH.L4ItemID And TIAL4.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00001' And TIAL4.LanguageID = #{languageID} LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR TIAL5 ON TIAL5.ItemID = TIH.L5ItemID And TIAL5.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00001' And TIAL5.LanguageID = #{languageID}
LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_DICTIONARY TDC ON TDC.TypeCode = TITO.ClassCode And TDC.Category = 'CLS' And TDC.LanguageID = #{languageID} LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_CHANGE_SET TCS ON TITO.CurChangeSet = TCS.ChangeSetID LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_LANGUAGE TL On TL.LanguageID = TF.LanguageID LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_MEMBER TM on TF.RegMemberID = TM.MemberID LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_MEMBER TM2 on TF.LastUser = TM2.MemberID
Where ITM_STR.MyItemID = TI.ItemID And TITO.ItemID = TI.ToItemID
AND TITO.Identifier Like '%'+#{identifier}+'%'
AND TIA.PlainText Like '%'+#{itemName}+'%'
AND TIA2.PlainText Like '%'+#{AT00000}+'%'
AND ISNULL(TIAL1.PlainText,'') Like '%'+#{L1}+'%'
AND ISNULL(TIAL2.PlainText,'') Like '%'+#{L2}+'%'
AND ISNULL(TIAL3.PlainText,'') Like '%'+#{L3}+'%'
AND ISNULL(TIAL4.PlainText,'') Like '%'+#{L4}+'%'
AND ISNULL(TIAL5.PlainText,'') Like '%'+#{L5}+'%'
And TI.ProjectID IN (${csrIDs})
Order By TITO.Identifier

Select Top 1 ISNULL(Identifier,'') AS docCode From XBOLTADM.Tb_ITEM Where Identifier = SUBSTRING(#{docID}, ${docCodeLen}, Len(Identifier)) And ISNULL(Identifier,'') != '' And Deleted != 1 And ClassCode = #{classCode}

SELECT TI.ItemID, TI.CategoryCode, TI.ItemTypeCode, TI.ClassCode, TI.ParentID , TI.ToItemID, TI2.ProjectID , TI2.Identifier AS docID , ISNULL(TIA.PlainText,'') AS DocName , TI.StructureID FROM XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM TI LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.Tb_ITEM TI2 ON TI2.ItemID = TI.ToItemID And TI2.Deleted != 1 LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR TIA ON TIA.ItemID = TI.ToItemID And TIA.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00001' And TIA.LanguageID = #{languageID} WHERE TI.ParentID = #{itemID} And TI.ClassCode = 'STL1606'
And TI.Deleted != '1' ORDER BY TI.ItemID

SELECT DISTINCT ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( ORDER BY SUBSTRING( FileRealName, CHARINDEX('@', FileRealName) + 1, CHARINDEX('.', FileRealName, CHARINDEX('@', FileRealName)) - CHARINDEX('@', FileRealName) - 1 ) ) AS RNUM, FileRealName AS DocumentName, LEFT(FileRealName, CHARINDEX('@', FileRealName) - 1) AS NewIdentifier, Seq,
SUBSTRING( FileRealName, CHARINDEX('@', FileRealName) + 1, LEN(FileRealName) - CHARINDEX('.', REVERSE(FileRealName)) + 1 - CHARINDEX('@', FileRealName) - 1 ) AS PlainText,
ISNULL(Status, '') AS AT00000 FROM XBOLTADM.TB_FILE WHERE DocumentID = #{itemID} AND FileRealName LIKE '%@%'

Select ISNULL(TI.Identifier,'') AS Identifier, TI2.StructureID AS StructureID From XBOLTADM.Tb_ITEM TI LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.Tb_ITEM TI2 ON TI2.ToItemID = TI.ItemID And TI2.CategoryCode = 'ST2' And TI2.Deleted != 1 Where TI.Identifier = SUBSTRING(#{docCode}, 1, Len(TI.Identifier)) And ISNULL(TI.Identifier,'') != '' And TI.Deleted != 1 And TI.ClassCode = #{itemClassCode}

WITH RecursiveCTE AS ( SELECT ItemID, ParentID, Level, ClassCode FROM XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM WHERE ItemID = #{strItemID} UNION ALL
SELECT TI.ItemID, TI.ParentID, TI.Level, TI.ClassCode FROM XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM TI INNER JOIN RecursiveCTE CTE ON TI.ItemID = CTE.ParentID ) SELECT CASE WHEN ITM.ClassCode = 'STL1601' THEN #{strItemID} ELSE ITM.ParentID END AS PRE_TREE_ID, ITM.ItemID AS TREE_ID, ITM.Level AS Level, CASE ARC.WID WHEN '1' THEN (CASE WHEN ARC.IDFilter IS NULL THEN ISNULL(Obj.Identifier,'') ELSE RIGHT(ISNULL(Obj.Identifier,''),ARC.IDFilter) END) + ' ' + ISNULL(TIA.PlainText, 'Untitled') WHEN '2' THEN ISNULL(TIA.PlainText, 'Untitled') + ' ' + ISNULL(Obj.Identifier,'') WHEN '3' THEN (CASE WHEN ARC.IDFilter IS NULL THEN ISNULL(ITM.Identifier,Obj.Identifier) ELSE RIGHT(ISNULL(ITM.Identifier,Obj.Identifier),ARC.IDFilter) END) + ' ' + ISNULL(TIA.PlainText, 'Untitled') ELSE ISNULL(TIA.PlainText, 'Untitled') END AS TREE_NM, ITM.SortNum, ITM.ClassCode, TIC.Icon AS ClassIcon, #{folderItemID} AS FolderItemID FROM RecursiveCTE CTE, XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM ITM , XBOLTADM.TB_ARC ARC, XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM Obj LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_Item_Attr TIA ON TIA.ItemID = Obj.ItemID ANd TIA.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00001' And TIA.LanguageID = #{languageID} LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_Item_Class TIC ON TIC.ItemClassCode = Obj.ClassCode Where ITM.ItemID = CTE.ITemID And ITM.Deleted != 1 And ITM.ItemID != #{strItemID} And ISNULL(ITM.ParentID,'') != '' And ITM.ClassCode NOT IN ('STL1600','STL1605') AND ARC.ArcCode = 'BEDP002' AND Obj.CategoryCode != 'TOJ' AND ITM.ToItemID = Obj.ItemID

Select Row_Number()OVER(ORDER BY T1.L1Code, T1.Code, T1.Path ) as RNUM, T1.* From ( SELECT ISNULL(L1ID.Identifier, ITM.Identifier) AS L1Code, ISNULL(XBOLTADM.fn_GetMyAbsPathForList( ITM.ItemID ,#{languageID} ),'') AS Path, ITM.Identifier AS Code, ATRNM.PlainText AS Name, CLS.Name AS Level , ATRTITLE.PlainText AS Title, REPLACE(ATRDESC.PlainText, CHAR(11), '') AS Description, REPLACE(ATRGUIDE.PlainText, CHAR(11), '') As Guideline, APPLTYPE.Value As SYSTYPE, MODUALAPP.PlainText As MODUALAPP, ATRFUNREQ.PlainText As FUNREQ, ATRPDA.PlainText As PDA, ATRASIS.PlainText As ASIS, ATRTOBE.PlainText As TOBE, ATRKPI.PlainText As KPI, ATRINPUT.PlainText As Input, ATROUTPUT.PlainText As Output, ATRDEPART.PlainText AS DePartmentInCharge, ATRORG.PlainText As ORG, REPLACE(ATRBUSRULE.PlainText, CHAR(11), '') AS BusinessRule, ATRREMARK.PlainText As REMARK, REPLACE(ATRPI.PlainText, CHAR(11), '') As PINUM, ATRPROG.PlainText As PROG, ATRTCODE.PlainText As TCODE, ATRSPEC.PlainText As SPEC, ATRCHKPOINT.PlainText As CHKPOINT, ATRPROCTYPE.PlainText As PROCTYPE,
AUTHOR.name AS Owner, CONVERT(CHAR(10),CONVERT(datetime,ITM.LastUpdated ),21) as LastUpdated, (select case when count(*) > 0 then '0' else '' end from XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_DIM WHERE ItemID = ITM.ItemID and DimTypeID = '100001' and DimValueID = 'CMM') AS CMM, (select case when count(*) > 0 then '0' else '' end from XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_DIM WHERE ItemID = ITM.ItemID and DimTypeID = '100001' and DimValueID = 'D01') AS D01, (select case when count(*) > 0 then '0' else '' end from XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_DIM WHERE ItemID = ITM.ItemID and DimTypeID = '100001' and DimValueID = 'D02') AS D02, (select case when count(*) > 0 then '0' else '' end from XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_DIM WHERE ItemID = ITM.ItemID and DimTypeID = '100001' and DimValueID = 'D03') AS D03, (select case when count(*) > 0 then '0' else '' end from XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_DIM WHERE ItemID = ITM.ItemID and DimTypeID = '100001' and DimValueID = 'D04') AS D04, (select case when count(*) > 0 then '0' else '' end from XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_DIM WHERE ItemID = ITM.ItemID and DimTypeID = '100003' and DimValueID = 'C101') AS C101, (select case when count(*) > 0 then '0' else '' end from XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_DIM WHERE ItemID = ITM.ItemID and DimTypeID = '100003' and DimValueID = 'C102') AS C102,
ITM.ItemID FROM XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM AS STR LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM AS ITM ON ITM.ItemID = STR.ToItemID LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_DICTIONARY AS CLS ON CLS.TypeCode = ITM.ClassCode AND CLS.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND CLS.Category = 'CLS' Inner Join XBOLTADM.TW_PROCESS AS PRSUM ON PRSUM.ItemID = ITM.ItemID Inner Join XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM AS L1ID ON L1ID.ItemID = PRSUM.L1ItemID LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR AS ATRNM ON ATRNM.ItemID = ITM.ItemID AND ATRNM.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND ATRNM.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00001' LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR AS ATRTITLE ON ATRTITLE.ItemID = ITM.ItemID AND ATRTITLE.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND ATRTITLE.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00002' LEFT OUTER JOIN
XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR AS ATRDESC ON ATRDESC.ItemID = ITM.ItemID AND ATRDESC.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND ATRDESC.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00003' LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR AS ATRGUIDE ON ATRGUIDE.ItemID = ITM.ItemID AND ATRGUIDE.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND ATRGUIDE.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00008' LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR AS ATRAPPLTYPE ON ATRAPPLTYPE.ItemID = ITM.ItemID AND ATRAPPLTYPE.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND ATRAPPLTYPE.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00037'LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ATTR_TYPE_LOV AS APPLTYPE ON APPLTYPE.LovCode = ATRAPPLTYPE.LovCode AND APPLTYPE.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND APPLTYPE.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00037'LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR AS MODUALAPP ON MODUALAPP.ItemID = ITM.ItemID AND MODUALAPP.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND MODUALAPP.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00013'LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR AS ATRFUNREQ ON ATRFUNREQ.ItemID = ITM.ItemID AND ATRFUNREQ.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND ATRFUNREQ.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00048'LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR AS ATRPDA ON ATRPDA.ItemID = ITM.ItemID AND ATRPDA.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND ATRPDA.AttrTypeCode = 'ZAT0001'LEFT OUTER JOIN
XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR AS ATRASIS ON ATRASIS.ItemID = ITM.ItemID AND ATRASIS.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND ATRASIS.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00030'LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR AS ATRTOBE ON ATRTOBE.ItemID = ITM.ItemID AND ATRTOBE.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND ATRTOBE.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00054'LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR AS ATRKPI ON ATRKPI.ItemID = ITM.ItemID AND ATRKPI.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND ATRKPI.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00007'LEFT OUTER JOIN
XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR AS ATRINPUT ON ATRINPUT.ItemID = ITM.ItemID AND ATRINPUT.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND ATRINPUT.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00015'LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR AS ATROUTPUT ON ATROUTPUT.ItemID = ITM.ItemID AND ATROUTPUT.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND ATROUTPUT.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00016'LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR AS ATRDEPART ON ATRDEPART.ItemID = ITM.ItemID AND ATRDEPART.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND ATRDEPART.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00017' LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR AS ATRORG ON ATRORG.ItemID = ITM.ItemID AND ATRORG.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND ATRORG.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00010'LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR AS ATRBUSRULE ON ATRBUSRULE.ItemID = ITM.ItemID AND ATRBUSRULE.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND ATRBUSRULE.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00042'LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR AS ATRREMARK ON ATRREMARK.ItemID = ITM.ItemID AND ATRREMARK.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND ATRREMARK.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00006'LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR AS ATRPROG ON ATRPROG.ItemID = ITM.ItemID AND ATRPROG.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND ATRPROG.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00026'LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR AS ATRTCODE ON ATRTCODE.ItemID = ITM.ItemID AND ATRTCODE.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND ATRTCODE.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00014' LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR AS ATRPI ON ATRPI.ItemID = ITM.ItemID AND ATRPI.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND ATRPI.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00053'LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR AS ATRSPEC ON ATRSPEC.ItemID = ITM.ItemID AND ATRSPEC.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND ATRSPEC.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00052'LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR AS ATRCHKPOINT ON ATRCHKPOINT.ItemID = ITM.ItemID AND ATRCHKPOINT.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND ATRCHKPOINT.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00029'LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR AS ATRPROCTYPE ON ATRPROCTYPE.ItemID = ITM.ItemID AND ATRPROCTYPE.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND ATRPROCTYPE.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00036'LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_MEMBER AS AUTHOR ON AUTHOR.MemberID = ITM.AuthorID Where STR.CategoryCode = 'ST1' And ITM.ItemTypeCode = 'OJ00001' AND ITM.ClassCode Not In ('CL01007', 'CL01008') And ITM.Deleted != 1 ) T1 Order by L1Code, Code, Path

Select Row_Number()OVER(ORDER BY T1.L1Code, T1.Code, T1.Path ) as RNUM, T1.* From ( SELECT ISNULL(L1ID.Identifier, ITM.Identifier) AS L1Code, ISNULL(XBOLTADM.fn_GetMyAbsPathForList( ITM.ItemID ,#{languageID} ),'') AS Path, ITM.Identifier AS Code, ATRNM.PlainText AS Name, CLS.Name AS Level , ATRTITLE.PlainText AS Title, REPLACE(ATRDESC.PlainText, CHAR(11), '') AS Description, REPLACE(ATRGUIDE.PlainText, CHAR(11), '') As Guideline, APPLTYPE.Value As SYSTYPE, MODUALAPP.PlainText As MODUALAPP, ATRFUNREQ.PlainText As FUNREQ, ATRPDA.PlainText As PDA, ATRASIS.PlainText As ASIS, ATRTOBE.PlainText As TOBE, ATRKPI.PlainText As KPI, ATRINPUT.PlainText As Input, ATROUTPUT.PlainText As Output, ATRDEPART.PlainText AS DePartmentInCharge, ATRORG.PlainText As ORG, REPLACE(ATRBUSRULE.PlainText, CHAR(11), '') AS BusinessRule, ATRREMARK.PlainText As REMARK, REPLACE(ATRPI.PlainText, CHAR(11), '') As PINUM, ATRPROG.PlainText As PROG, ATRTCODE.PlainText As TCODE, ATRSPEC.PlainText As SPEC, ATRCHKPOINT.PlainText As CHKPOINT, ATRPROCTYPE.PlainText As PROCTYPE,
AUTHOR.name AS Owner, CONVERT(CHAR(10),CONVERT(datetime,ITM.LastUpdated ),21) as LastUpdated, (select case when count(*) > 0 then '0' else '' end from XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_DIM WHERE ItemID = ITM.ItemID and DimTypeID = '100001' and DimValueID = 'C101') AS C101, (select case when count(*) > 0 then '0' else '' end from XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_DIM WHERE ItemID = ITM.ItemID and DimTypeID = '100001' and DimValueID = 'C102') AS C102, (select case when count(*) > 0 then '0' else '' end from XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_DIM WHERE ItemID = ITM.ItemID and DimTypeID = '100003' and DimValueID = 'CMM') AS CMM, (select case when count(*) > 0 then '0' else '' end from XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_DIM WHERE ItemID = ITM.ItemID and DimTypeID = '100003' and DimValueID = 'D01') AS D01, (select case when count(*) > 0 then '0' else '' end from XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_DIM WHERE ItemID = ITM.ItemID and DimTypeID = '100003' and DimValueID = 'D02') AS D02, (select case when count(*) > 0 then '0' else '' end from XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_DIM WHERE ItemID = ITM.ItemID and DimTypeID = '100003' and DimValueID = 'D03') AS D03, ITM.ItemID FROM XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM AS STR LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM AS ITM ON ITM.ItemID = STR.ToItemID LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_DICTIONARY AS CLS ON CLS.TypeCode = ITM.ClassCode AND CLS.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND CLS.Category = 'CLS' Inner Join XBOLTADM.TW_PROCESS AS PRSUM ON PRSUM.ItemID = ITM.ItemID Inner Join XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM AS L1ID ON L1ID.ItemID = PRSUM.L1ItemID LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR AS ATRNM ON ATRNM.ItemID = ITM.ItemID AND ATRNM.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND ATRNM.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00001' LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR AS ATRTITLE ON ATRTITLE.ItemID = ITM.ItemID AND ATRTITLE.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND ATRTITLE.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00002' LEFT OUTER JOIN
XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR AS ATRDESC ON ATRDESC.ItemID = ITM.ItemID AND ATRDESC.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND ATRDESC.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00003' LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR AS ATRGUIDE ON ATRGUIDE.ItemID = ITM.ItemID AND ATRGUIDE.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND ATRGUIDE.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00008' LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR AS ATRAPPLTYPE ON ATRAPPLTYPE.ItemID = ITM.ItemID AND ATRAPPLTYPE.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND ATRAPPLTYPE.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00037'LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ATTR_TYPE_LOV AS APPLTYPE ON APPLTYPE.LovCode = ATRAPPLTYPE.LovCode AND APPLTYPE.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND APPLTYPE.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00037'LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR AS MODUALAPP ON MODUALAPP.ItemID = ITM.ItemID AND MODUALAPP.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND MODUALAPP.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00013'LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR AS ATRFUNREQ ON ATRFUNREQ.ItemID = ITM.ItemID AND ATRFUNREQ.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND ATRFUNREQ.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00048'LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR AS ATRPDA ON ATRPDA.ItemID = ITM.ItemID AND ATRPDA.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND ATRPDA.AttrTypeCode = 'ZAT0001'LEFT OUTER JOIN
XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR AS ATRASIS ON ATRASIS.ItemID = ITM.ItemID AND ATRASIS.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND ATRASIS.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00030'LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR AS ATRTOBE ON ATRTOBE.ItemID = ITM.ItemID AND ATRTOBE.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND ATRTOBE.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00054'LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR AS ATRKPI ON ATRKPI.ItemID = ITM.ItemID AND ATRKPI.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND ATRKPI.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00007'LEFT OUTER JOIN
XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR AS ATRINPUT ON ATRINPUT.ItemID = ITM.ItemID AND ATRINPUT.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND ATRINPUT.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00015'LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR AS ATROUTPUT ON ATROUTPUT.ItemID = ITM.ItemID AND ATROUTPUT.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND ATROUTPUT.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00016'LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR AS ATRDEPART ON ATRDEPART.ItemID = ITM.ItemID AND ATRDEPART.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND ATRDEPART.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00017' LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR AS ATRORG ON ATRORG.ItemID = ITM.ItemID AND ATRORG.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND ATRORG.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00010'LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR AS ATRBUSRULE ON ATRBUSRULE.ItemID = ITM.ItemID AND ATRBUSRULE.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND ATRBUSRULE.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00042'LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR AS ATRREMARK ON ATRREMARK.ItemID = ITM.ItemID AND ATRREMARK.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND ATRREMARK.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00006'LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR AS ATRPROG ON ATRPROG.ItemID = ITM.ItemID AND ATRPROG.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND ATRPROG.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00026'LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR AS ATRTCODE ON ATRTCODE.ItemID = ITM.ItemID AND ATRTCODE.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND ATRTCODE.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00014' LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR AS ATRPI ON ATRPI.ItemID = ITM.ItemID AND ATRPI.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND ATRPI.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00053'LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR AS ATRSPEC ON ATRSPEC.ItemID = ITM.ItemID AND ATRSPEC.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND ATRSPEC.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00052'LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR AS ATRCHKPOINT ON ATRCHKPOINT.ItemID = ITM.ItemID AND ATRCHKPOINT.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND ATRCHKPOINT.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00029'LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR AS ATRPROCTYPE ON ATRPROCTYPE.ItemID = ITM.ItemID AND ATRPROCTYPE.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND ATRPROCTYPE.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00036'LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_MEMBER AS AUTHOR ON AUTHOR.MemberID = ITM.AuthorID Where STR.CategoryCode = 'ST1' And ITM.ItemTypeCode = 'OJ00001' AND ITM.ClassCode Not In ('CL01007', 'CL01008') And ITM.Deleted != 1 ) T1 Order by L1Code, Code, Path

SELECT
case when CLS.TypeCode = 'CL01001' then ITM.Identifier else '' end AS L1Code, case when CLS.TypeCode = 'CL01002' then ITM.Identifier else '' end AS L2Code, case when CLS.TypeCode = 'CL01004' then ITM.Identifier else '' end AS L3Code, case when CLS.TypeCode = 'CL01005' then ITM.Identifier else '' end AS L4Code, case when CLS.TypeCode = 'CL01006' then ITM.Identifier else '' end AS L5Code, case when CLS.TypeCode = 'CL01001' then ATRNM.PlainText else '' end AS L1Name, case when CLS.TypeCode = 'CL01002' then ATRNM.PlainText else '' end AS L2Name, case when CLS.TypeCode = 'CL01004' then ATRNM.PlainText else '' end AS L3Name, case when CLS.TypeCode = 'CL01005' then ATRNM.PlainText else '' end AS L4Name, case when CLS.TypeCode = 'CL01006' then ATRNM.PlainText else '' end AS L5Name, RELATEDINPUT.INPUTID, RELATEDINPUT.INPUTNM, RELATEDOUTPUT.OUTPUTID, RELATEDOUTPUT.OUTPUTNM, REPLACE(REPLACE(ATRDESC.PlainText, CHAR(11), ''),'"','"') AS Description, REPLACE(REPLACE(ATRCHAN.PlainText, CHAR(11), ''),'"','"') AS CHAN, REPLACE(REPLACE(ATRUSRMENU1.PlainText, CHAR(11), ''),'"','"') AS USRMENU1, REPLACE(REPLACE(ATRUSRMENU2.PlainText, CHAR(11), ''),'"','"') AS USRMENU2, REPLACE(REPLACE(ATRUSRMENU3.PlainText, CHAR(11), ''),'"','"') AS USRMENU3, REPLACE(REPLACE(ATRUSRMENU4.PlainText, CHAR(11), ''),'"','"') AS USRMENU4, REPLACE(REPLACE(ATRUSRMENU5.PlainText, CHAR(11), ''),'"','"') AS USRMENU5, REPLACE(REPLACE(ATRUSRMENU6.PlainText, CHAR(11), ''),'"','"') AS USRMENU6, REPLACE(REPLACE(ATRUSRMENU7.PlainText, CHAR(11), ''),'"','"') AS USRMENU7, ATRINPUT.PlainText As Input, ATROUTPUT.PlainText As Output, ATRORG.PlainText As ORG, REPLACE(ATRPI.PlainText, CHAR(11), '') As PI, ATRCONSULT.PlainText As CONSULT, APPLTYPE.Value As APPLTYPE, ATRMODULE.PlainText As MODULE, ATRITSYS.PlainText As ITSYS, ATRTCODE.PlainText As TCODE, ATRFITGAP.PlainText As FITGAP, ATRGAPID.PlainText As GAPID, ATRGAPSOL.PlainText As GAPSOL, AUTHOR.name AS Owner, CONVERT(CHAR(10),CONVERT(datetime,ITM.CreationTime ),21) as CreationTime, CONVERT(CHAR(10),CONVERT(datetime,ITM.LastUpdated ),21) as LastUpdated, case when BUSTYPE.LovCode = 'B00' then '●' else '' end AS B00, case when BUSTYPE.LovCode = 'B01' then '●' else '' end AS B01, case when BUSTYPE.LovCode = 'B02' then '●' else '' end AS B02, case when BUSTYPE.LovCode = 'C01' then '●' else '' end AS C01, case when BUSTYPE.LovCode = 'C02' then '●' else '' end AS C02, case when BUSTYPE.LovCode = 'C03' then '●' else '' end AS C03, case when BUSTYPE.LovCode = 'C04' then '●' else '' end AS C04, case when BUSTYPE.LovCode = 'C05' then '●' else '' end AS C05, case when BUSTYPE.LovCode = 'C06' then '●' else '' end AS C06, case when BUSTYPE.LovCode = 'C07' then '●' else '' end AS C07, case when BUSTYPE.LovCode = 'C08' then '●' else '' end AS C08, case when BUSTYPE.LovCode = 'C09' then '●' else '' end AS C09, case when BUSTYPE.LovCode = 'C10' then '●' else '' end AS C10, case when BUSTYPE.LovCode = 'C11' then '●' else '' end AS C11,
(select case when count(*) > 0 then '●' else '' end from XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_DIM WHERE ItemID = ITM.ItemID and DimTypeID = '100840' and DimValueID = 'D01') AS D01, (select case when count(*) > 0 then '●' else '' end from XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_DIM WHERE ItemID = ITM.ItemID and DimTypeID = '100840' and DimValueID = 'D02') AS D02, (select case when count(*) > 0 then '●' else '' end from XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_DIM WHERE ItemID = ITM.ItemID and DimTypeID = '100840' and DimValueID = 'D03') AS D03, (select case when count(*) > 0 then '●' else '' end from XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_DIM WHERE ItemID = ITM.ItemID and DimTypeID = '100840' and DimValueID = 'D04') AS D04, (select case when count(*) > 0 then '●' else '' end from XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_DIM WHERE ItemID = ITM.ItemID and DimTypeID = '100840' and DimValueID = 'D05') AS D05, (select case when count(*) > 0 then '●' else '' end from XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_DIM WHERE ItemID = ITM.ItemID and DimTypeID = '100840' and DimValueID = 'D06') AS D06, (select case when count(*) > 0 then '●' else '' end from XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_DIM WHERE ItemID = ITM.ItemID and DimTypeID = '100840' and DimValueID = 'D07') AS D07, (select case when count(*) > 0 then '●' else '' end from XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_DIM WHERE ItemID = ITM.ItemID and DimTypeID = '100840' and DimValueID = 'D08') AS D08, (select case when count(*) > 0 then '●' else '' end from XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_DIM WHERE ItemID = ITM.ItemID and DimTypeID = '100840' and DimValueID = 'D09') AS D09, (select case when count(*) > 0 then '●' else '' end from XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_DIM WHERE ItemID = ITM.ItemID and DimTypeID = '100840' and DimValueID = 'D10') AS D10, ATRRULESETID.PlainText As RULESETID, ITM.ItemID, RuleIdentifiers, RULENAME, CONTROLIdentifiers, CONTROLNAME, LOVPROGRESS.Value AS PROGRESS, CS.Version AS Version
FROM XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM AS STR LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM AS ITM ON ITM.ItemID = STR.ToItemID LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_DICTIONARY AS CLS ON CLS.TypeCode = ITM.ClassCode AND CLS.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND CLS.Category = 'CLS' LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TW_PROCESS AS PRSUM ON PRSUM.ItemID = ITM.ItemID LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM AS L1ID ON L1ID.ItemID = PRSUM.L1ItemID LEFT OUTER JOIN
XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR AS ATRNM ON ATRNM.ItemID = ITM.ItemID AND ATRNM.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND ATRNM.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00001' LEFT OUTER JOIN
XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR AS ATRDESC ON ATRDESC.ItemID = ITM.ItemID AND ATRDESC.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND ATRDESC.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00003' LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR AS ATRCHAN ON ATRCHAN.ItemID = ITM.ItemID AND ATRCHAN.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND ATRCHAN.AttrTypeCode = 'ZAT0017' LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR AS ATRUSRMENU1 ON ATRUSRMENU1.ItemID = ITM.ItemID AND ATRUSRMENU1.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND ATRUSRMENU1.AttrTypeCode = 'ZAT0018' LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR AS ATRUSRMENU2 ON ATRUSRMENU2.ItemID = ITM.ItemID AND ATRUSRMENU2.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND ATRUSRMENU2.AttrTypeCode = 'ZAT0019' LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR AS ATRUSRMENU3 ON ATRUSRMENU3.ItemID = ITM.ItemID AND ATRUSRMENU3.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND ATRUSRMENU3.AttrTypeCode = 'ZAT0020' LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR AS ATRUSRMENU4 ON ATRUSRMENU4.ItemID = ITM.ItemID AND ATRUSRMENU4.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND ATRUSRMENU4.AttrTypeCode = 'ZAT0021' LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR AS ATRUSRMENU5 ON ATRUSRMENU5.ItemID = ITM.ItemID AND ATRUSRMENU5.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND ATRUSRMENU5.AttrTypeCode = 'ZAT0022' LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR AS ATRUSRMENU6 ON ATRUSRMENU6.ItemID = ITM.ItemID AND ATRUSRMENU6.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND ATRUSRMENU6.AttrTypeCode = 'ZAT0023' LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR AS ATRUSRMENU7 ON ATRUSRMENU7.ItemID = ITM.ItemID AND ATRUSRMENU7.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND ATRUSRMENU7.AttrTypeCode = 'ZAT0024' LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR AS ATRINPUT ON ATRINPUT.ItemID = ITM.ItemID AND ATRINPUT.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND ATRINPUT.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00015'LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR AS ATROUTPUT ON ATROUTPUT.ItemID = ITM.ItemID AND ATROUTPUT.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND ATROUTPUT.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00016'LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR AS ATRORG ON ATRORG.ItemID = ITM.ItemID AND ATRORG.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND ATRORG.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00010'LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR AS ATRPI ON ATRPI.ItemID = ITM.ItemID AND ATRPI.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND ATRPI.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00022'LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR AS ATRCONSULT ON ATRCONSULT.ItemID = ITM.ItemID AND ATRCONSULT.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND ATRCONSULT.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00025'LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR AS ATRAPPLTYPE ON ATRAPPLTYPE.ItemID = ITM.ItemID AND ATRAPPLTYPE.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND ATRAPPLTYPE.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00037'LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ATTR_TYPE_LOV AS APPLTYPE ON APPLTYPE.LovCode = ATRAPPLTYPE.LovCode AND APPLTYPE.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND APPLTYPE.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00037'LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR AS ATRMODULE ON ATRMODULE.ItemID = ITM.ItemID AND ATRMODULE.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND ATRMODULE.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00020'LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR AS ATRITSYS ON ATRITSYS.ItemID = ITM.ItemID AND ATRITSYS.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND ATRITSYS.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00013'LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR AS ATRTCODE ON ATRTCODE.ItemID = ITM.ItemID AND ATRTCODE.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND ATRTCODE.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00014' LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR AS ATRFITGAP ON ATRFITGAP.ItemID = ITM.ItemID AND ATRFITGAP.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND ATRFITGAP.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00046' LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR AS ATRGAPID ON ATRGAPID.ItemID = ITM.ItemID AND ATRGAPID.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND ATRGAPID.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00027' LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR AS ATRGAPSOL ON ATRGAPSOL.ItemID = ITM.ItemID AND ATRGAPSOL.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND ATRGAPSOL.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00049' LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR AS ATRBUSTYPE ON ATRBUSTYPE.ItemID = ITM.ItemID AND ATRBUSTYPE.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND ATRBUSTYPE.AttrTypeCode = 'ZAT0011' LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ATTR_TYPE_LOV AS BUSTYPE ON BUSTYPE.LovCode = ATRBUSTYPE.LovCode AND BUSTYPE.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND BUSTYPE.AttrTypeCode = 'ZAT0011'LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR AS ATRRULESETID ON ATRRULESETID.ItemID = ITM.ItemID AND ATRRULESETID.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND ATRRULESETID.AttrTypeCode = 'ZAT00010' LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_MEMBER AS AUTHOR ON AUTHOR.MemberID = ITM.AuthorID LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR AS ATRPROGRESS ON ATRPROGRESS.ItemID = ITM.ItemID AND ATRPROGRESS.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND ATRPROGRESS.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00026' LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ATTR_TYPE_LOV AS LOVPROGRESS ON LOVPROGRESS.LovCode = ATRPROGRESS.LovCode AND LOVPROGRESS.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND LOVPROGRESS.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00026' LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_CHANGE_SET AS CS ON CS.ChangeSetID = ITM.CurChangeSet LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT ITM.itemID, STRING_AGG(RULESET.Identifier, ', ') AS RuleIdentifiers, STRING_AGG(ATRRULESET.PlainText, ', ') AS RULENAME FROM XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM ITM LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM AS CN ON ITM.ItemID = CN.FromItemID AND CN.ClassCode = 'CNL0107' LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM AS RULESET ON RULESET.itemID = CN.ToItemID LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR AS ATRRULESET ON ATRRULESET.ItemID = RULESET.ItemID AND ATRRULESET.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND ATRRULESET.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00001' LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR AS ATRRULESETSYS ON ATRRULESETSYS.ItemID = RULESET.ItemID AND ATRRULESETSYS.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND ATRRULESETSYS.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00013' WHERE CN.Deleted != 1 GROUP BY ITM.itemID ) AS RULEID on ITM.itemID = RULEID.itemID LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT ITM.itemID, STRING_AGG(INCONTROL.Identifier, ', ') AS CONTROLIdentifiers, STRING_AGG(ATRINCONTROL.PlainText, ', ') AS CONTROLNAME FROM XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM ITM LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM AS CN ON ITM.ItemID = CN.FromItemID AND CN.ClassCode = 'CNL0109' LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM AS INCONTROL ON INCONTROL.itemID = CN.ToItemID LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR AS ATRINCONTROL ON
