ATRINCONTROL.ItemID = INCONTROL.ItemID AND ATRINCONTROL.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND ATRINCONTROL.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00001' LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR AS ATRINCONTROLSYS ON ATRINCONTROLSYS.ItemID = INCONTROL.ItemID AND ATRINCONTROLSYS.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND ATRINCONTROLSYS.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00927' WHERE CN.Deleted != 1 GROUP BY ITM.itemID) AS CONTROLID on ITM.itemID = CONTROLID.itemID OUTER APPLY (SELECT STRING_AGG(INPUTITM.Identifier, ', ') AS INPUTID, STRING_AGG(ATRINPUTNM.PlainText, ', ') AS INPUTNM FROM XBOLTADM.fn_GetPrePostProcess(ITM.ItemID,'PRE') AS INPUT LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM AS INPUTITM ON INPUTITM.ItemID = INPUT.itemID LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR AS ATRINPUTNM ON ATRINPUTNM.ItemID = INPUTITM.ItemID AND ATRINPUTNM.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND ATRINPUTNM.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00001') as RELATEDINPUT OUTER APPLY (SELECT STRING_AGG(OUTPUTITM.Identifier, ', ') AS OUTPUTID, STRING_AGG(ATROUTPUTNM.PlainText, ', ') AS OUTPUTNM FROM XBOLTADM.fn_GetPrePostProcess(ITM.ItemID,'POST') AS OUTPUT LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM AS OUTPUTITM ON OUTPUTITM.ItemID = OUTPUT.itemID LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR AS ATROUTPUTNM ON ATROUTPUTNM.ItemID = OUTPUTITM.ItemID AND ATROUTPUTNM.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND ATROUTPUTNM.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00001') as RELATEDOUTPUT Where STR.CategoryCode = 'ST1' And ITM.ItemTypeCode = 'OJ00001' AND ITM.ClassCode Not In ('CL01007', 'CL01008') AND ITM.Deleted != 1 Order by Case When ITM.Identifier Is Null Then 2 WHEN ITM.Identifier = '' THEN 1 Else 0 End, ITM.Identifier ASC

SELECT case when CLS.TypeCode = 'CL09003' then ITM.Identifier else '' end AS InterConCode, case when CLS.TypeCode = 'CL09003' then ATRNM.PlainText else '' end AS InterConName, DICT.Name AS InterConClass, REPLACE(REPLACE(ATRDESC.PlainText, CHAR(11), ''),'"','"') AS Description, AT910LOV.Value As AT910LOV, AT912.PlainText As AT912, AT903.PlainText As AT903, AT927.PlainText As AT927, AT06.PlainText As AT06, L5ID.L5Identifiers AS L5ID, L5ID.L5NAMEs AS L5NAME, CONVERT(CHAR(10),CONVERT(datetime,ITM.CreationTime ),21) as CreationTime, CONVERT(CHAR(10),CONVERT(datetime,ITM.LastUpdated ),21) as LastUpdated, AUTHOR.name AS Owner, ITM.ItemID
FROM XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM AS STR LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM AS ITM ON ITM.ItemID = STR.ToItemID LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_DICTIONARY AS CLS ON CLS.TypeCode = ITM.ClassCode AND CLS.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND CLS.Category = 'CLS' LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TW_PROCESS AS PRSUM ON PRSUM.ItemID = ITM.ItemID LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM AS L1ID ON L1ID.ItemID = PRSUM.L1ItemID LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR AS ATRNM ON ATRNM.ItemID = ITM.ItemID AND ATRNM.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND ATRNM.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00001' LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_DICTIONARY AS DICT ON DICT.TypeCode = ITM.ClassCode AND DICT.LanguageID = #{languageID} LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR AS ATRDESC ON ATRDESC.ItemID = ITM.ItemID AND ATRDESC.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND ATRDESC.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00003' LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR AS AT910 ON AT910.ItemID = ITM.ItemID AND AT910.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND AT910.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00910' LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ATTR_TYPE_LOV AS AT910LOV ON AT910LOV.LovCode = AT910.LovCode AND AT910LOV.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND AT910LOV.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00910' LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR AS AT912 ON AT912.ItemID = ITM.ItemID AND AT912.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND AT912.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00912' LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR AS AT903 ON AT903.ItemID = ITM.ItemID AND AT903.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND AT903.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00903' LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR AS AT927 ON AT927.ItemID = ITM.ItemID AND AT927.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND AT927.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00927' LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR AS AT06 ON AT06.ItemID = ITM.ItemID AND AT06.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND AT06.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00006' LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT ITM.itemID AS RULEID, STRING_AGG(L5.Identifier, ', ') AS L5Identifiers, STRING_AGG(ATRL5.PlainText, ', ') AS L5NAMEs FROM XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM ITM LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM AS CN ON ITM.ItemID = CN.ToItemID AND CN.ClassCode = 'CNL0109' LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM AS L5 ON L5.itemID = CN.FromItemID LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR AS ATRL5 ON ATRL5.ItemID = L5.ItemID AND ATRL5.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND ATRL5.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00001' WHERE CN.Deleted != 1 AND L5.Deleted != 1 GROUP BY ITM.itemID ) AS L5ID on L5ID.RULEID = ITM.itemID LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_MEMBER AS AUTHOR ON AUTHOR.MemberID = ITM.AuthorID LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR AS ATRPROGRESS ON ATRPROGRESS.ItemID = ITM.ItemID AND ATRPROGRESS.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND ATRPROGRESS.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00026' Where STR.CategoryCode = 'ST1' And ITM.ItemTypeCode = 'OJ00009' AND ITM.ClassCode In ('CL09003') AND ITM.Deleted != 1 Order by Case When ITM.Identifier Is Null Then 2 WHEN ITM.Identifier = '' THEN 1 Else 0 End, ITM.Identifier ASC

SELECT case when CLS.TypeCode = 'CL07002' then ITM.Identifier else '' end AS RuleCode, case when CLS.TypeCode = 'CL07002' then ATRNM.PlainText else '' end AS RuleName, DICT.Name AS RuleClass, REPLACE(REPLACE(ATRDESC.PlainText, CHAR(11), ''),'"','"') AS Description, APPLTYPE.Value As APPLTYPE, ATRITSYS.PlainText As ITSYS, ZAT14LOV.Value As ZAT14, AT06.PlainText As AT06, AT21.PlainText As AT21, L5ID.L5Identifiers AS L5ID, L5ID.L5NAMEs AS L5NAME, CONVERT(CHAR(10),CONVERT(datetime,ITM.CreationTime ),21) as CreationTime, CONVERT(CHAR(10),CONVERT(datetime,ITM.LastUpdated ),21) as LastUpdated, AUTHOR.name AS Owner, ITM.ItemID
FROM XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM AS STR LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM AS ITM ON ITM.ItemID = STR.ToItemID LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_DICTIONARY AS CLS ON CLS.TypeCode = ITM.ClassCode AND CLS.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND CLS.Category = 'CLS' LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TW_PROCESS AS PRSUM ON PRSUM.ItemID = ITM.ItemID LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM AS L1ID ON L1ID.ItemID = PRSUM.L1ItemID LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR AS ATRNM ON ATRNM.ItemID = ITM.ItemID AND ATRNM.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND ATRNM.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00001' LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_DICTIONARY AS DICT ON DICT.TypeCode = ITM.ClassCode AND DICT.LanguageID = #{languageID} LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR AS ATRDESC ON ATRDESC.ItemID = ITM.ItemID AND ATRDESC.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND ATRDESC.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00003' LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR AS ATRAPPLTYPE ON ATRAPPLTYPE.ItemID = ITM.ItemID AND ATRAPPLTYPE.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND ATRAPPLTYPE.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00037' LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ATTR_TYPE_LOV AS APPLTYPE ON APPLTYPE.LovCode = ATRAPPLTYPE.LovCode AND APPLTYPE.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND APPLTYPE.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00037' LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR AS ATRITSYS ON ATRITSYS.ItemID = ITM.ItemID AND ATRITSYS.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND ATRITSYS.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00013' LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR AS ZAT14 ON ZAT14.ItemID = ITM.ItemID AND ZAT14.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND ZAT14.AttrTypeCode = 'ZAT0014' LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ATTR_TYPE_LOV AS ZAT14LOV ON ZAT14LOV.LovCode = ZAT14.LovCode AND ZAT14LOV.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND ZAT14LOV.AttrTypeCode = 'ZAT0014' LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR AS AT06 ON AT06.ItemID = ITM.ItemID AND AT06.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND AT06.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00006' LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR AS AT21 ON AT21.ItemID = ITM.ItemID AND AT21.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND AT21.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00021' LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT ITM.itemID AS RULEID, STRING_AGG(L5.Identifier, ', ') AS L5Identifiers, STRING_AGG(ATRL5.PlainText, ', ') AS L5NAMEs FROM XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM ITM LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM AS CN ON ITM.ItemID = CN.ToItemID AND CN.ClassCode = 'CNL0107' LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM AS L5 ON L5.itemID = CN.FromItemID LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR AS ATRL5 ON ATRL5.ItemID = L5.ItemID AND ATRL5.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND ATRL5.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00001' WHERE CN.Deleted != 1 AND L5.Deleted != 1 GROUP BY ITM.itemID ) AS L5ID on L5ID.RULEID = ITM.itemID LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_MEMBER AS AUTHOR ON AUTHOR.MemberID = ITM.AuthorID LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR AS ATRPROGRESS ON ATRPROGRESS.ItemID = ITM.ItemID AND ATRPROGRESS.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND ATRPROGRESS.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00026' Where STR.CategoryCode = 'ST1' And ITM.ItemTypeCode = 'OJ00007' AND ITM.ClassCode Not In ('CL07000', 'CL07001', 'CL07003') AND ITM.Deleted != 1 Order by Case When ITM.Identifier Is Null Then 2 WHEN ITM.Identifier = '' THEN 1 Else 0 End, ITM.Identifier ASC

Select Row_Number()OVER(ORDER BY T1.L1Code, T1.Code) as RNUM, T1.* From ( SELECT ISNULL(L1ID.Identifier, ITM.Identifier) AS L1Code, ATRNML1.PlainText AS L1Name, ISNULL(L2ID.Identifier, ITM.Identifier) AS L2Code, ATRNML2.PlainText AS L2Name, ISNULL(L3ID.Identifier, ITM.Identifier) AS L3Code, ATRNML3.PlainText AS L3Name, ISNULL(L4ID.Identifier, ITM.Identifier) AS L4Code, ATRNML4.PlainText AS L4Name, ITM.Identifier AS Code, ATRNM.PlainText AS Name, REPLACE(REPLACE(ATRDESC.PlainText, CHAR(11), ''),'"','"') AS Description, ATRINPUT.PlainText As Input, ATROUTPUT.PlainText As Output, ATRORG.PlainText As ORG, ATRDEPART.PlainText AS DePartmentInCharge, ATRCYC.PlainText As Cycle, ATRWORKTIME.PlainText AS WorkTime, APPLTYPE.Value As APPLTYPE, MODUALAPP.PlainText As MODUALAPP, OwnerIT.PlainText AS ownerIT, OwnerCST.PlainText AS ownerCST, ATRISSUE.PlainText AS Issue, ATRIMPROVEOPP.PlainText As IMPROVEOP, ATRKPI.PlainText AS KPI, ATRCHKPOINT.PlainText AS CHKPOINT, ATRSPEC.PlainText AS SPEC, ATRPROCTPYE.PlainText AS PROCTYPE, ATRPIID.PlainText AS PIID, ATRCHGTOBE.PlainText AS CHGTOBE, ATRBUSRULE.PlainText AS BusinessRule, ATRTCODE.PlainText As TCODE, GAPID.PlainText As GAPID, GAPSUM.PlainText As GAPSUM, GAPSLT.PlainText As GAPSLT, AUTHOR.name AS Owner, CONVERT(CHAR(10),CONVERT(datetime,ITM.LastUpdated ),21) as LastUpdated, CS.Version, ITM.ItemID FROM XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM AS STR LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM AS ITM ON ITM.ItemID = STR.ToItemID LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_DICTIONARY AS CLS ON CLS.TypeCode = ITM.ClassCode AND CLS.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND CLS.Category = 'CLS' Inner Join XBOLTADM.TW_PROCESS AS PRSUM ON PRSUM.ItemID = ITM.ItemID Inner Join XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM AS L1ID ON L1ID.ItemID = PRSUM.L1ItemID LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR AS ATRNML1 ON ATRNML1.ItemID = L1ID.ItemID AND ATRNML1.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND ATRNML1.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00001' LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM AS L2ID ON L2ID.ItemID = PRSUM.L2ItemID LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR AS ATRNML2 ON ATRNML2.ItemID = L2ID.ItemID AND ATRNML2.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND ATRNML2.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00001' LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM AS L3ID ON L3ID.ItemID = PRSUM.L3ItemID LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR AS ATRNML3 ON ATRNML3.ItemID = L3ID.ItemID AND ATRNML3.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND ATRNML3.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00001' LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM AS L4ID ON L4ID.ItemID = PRSUM.L4ItemID LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR AS ATRNML4 ON ATRNML4.ItemID = L4ID.ItemID AND ATRNML4.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND ATRNML4.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00001' LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR AS ATRNM ON ATRNM.ItemID = ITM.ItemID AND ATRNM.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND ATRNM.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00001' LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR AS ATRDESC ON ATRDESC.ItemID = ITM.ItemID AND ATRDESC.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND ATRDESC.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00003' LEFT OUTER JOIN
XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR AS ATRINPUT ON ATRINPUT.ItemID = ITM.ItemID AND ATRINPUT.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND ATRINPUT.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00015'LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR AS ATROUTPUT ON ATROUTPUT.ItemID = ITM.ItemID AND ATROUTPUT.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND ATROUTPUT.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00016'LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR AS ATRORG ON ATRORG.ItemID = ITM.ItemID AND ATRORG.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND ATRORG.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00010'LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR AS ATRDEPART ON ATRDEPART.ItemID = ITM.ItemID AND ATRDEPART.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND ATRDEPART.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00017' LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR AS ATRCYC ON ATRCYC.ItemID = ITM.ItemID AND ATRCYC.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND ATRCYC.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00009' LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR AS ATRWORKTIME ON ATRWORKTIME.ItemID = ITM.ItemID AND ATRWORKTIME.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND ATRWORKTIME.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00090' LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR AS ATRAPPLTYPE ON ATRAPPLTYPE.ItemID = ITM.ItemID AND ATRAPPLTYPE.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND ATRAPPLTYPE.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00037'LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ATTR_TYPE_LOV AS APPLTYPE ON APPLTYPE.LovCode = ATRAPPLTYPE.LovCode AND APPLTYPE.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND APPLTYPE.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00037'LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR AS MODUALAPP ON MODUALAPP.ItemID = ITM.ItemID AND MODUALAPP.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND MODUALAPP.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00013'LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR AS OwnerIT ON OwnerIT.ItemID = ITM.ItemID AND OwnerIT.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND OwnerIT.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00022' LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR AS OwnerCST ON OwnerCST.ItemID = ITM.ItemID AND OwnerCST.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND OwnerCST.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00025' LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR AS ATRISSUE ON ATRISSUE.ItemID = ITM.ItemID AND ATRISSUE.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND ATRISSUE.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00030' LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR AS ATRIMPROVEOPP ON ATRIMPROVEOPP.ItemID = ITM.ItemID AND ATRIMPROVEOPP.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND ATRIMPROVEOPP.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00088' LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR AS ATRKPI ON ATRKPI.ItemID = ITM.ItemID AND ATRKPI.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND ATRKPI.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00007' LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR AS ATRCHKPOINT ON ATRCHKPOINT.ItemID = ITM.ItemID AND ATRCHKPOINT.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND ATRCHKPOINT.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00029' LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR AS ATRSPEC ON ATRSPEC.ItemID = ITM.ItemID AND ATRSPEC.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND ATRSPEC.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00052'LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR AS ATRPROCTPYE ON ATRPROCTPYE.ItemID = ITM.ItemID AND ATRPROCTPYE.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND ATRPROCTPYE.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00036'LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR AS ATRPIID ON ATRPIID.ItemID = ITM.ItemID AND ATRPIID.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND ATRPIID.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00053'LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR AS ATRCHGTOBE ON ATRCHGTOBE.ItemID = ITM.ItemID AND ATRCHGTOBE.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND ATRCHGTOBE.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00023'LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR AS ATRBUSRULE ON ATRBUSRULE.ItemID = ITM.ItemID AND ATRBUSRULE.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND ATRBUSRULE.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00008'LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR AS ATRTCODE ON ATRTCODE.ItemID = ITM.ItemID AND ATRTCODE.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND ATRTCODE.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00014' LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR AS GAPID ON GAPID.ItemID = ITM.ItemID AND GAPID.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND GAPID.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00027' LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR AS GAPSUM ON GAPSUM.ItemID = ITM.ItemID AND GAPSUM.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND GAPSUM.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00048' LEFT JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR AS GAPSLT ON GAPSLT.ItemID = ITM.ItemID AND GAPSLT.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND GAPSLT.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00049' LEFT JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_MEMBER AS AUTHOR ON AUTHOR.MemberID = ITM.AuthorID LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_CHANGE_SET AS CS ON CS.ChangeSetID = ITM.CurChangeSet Where STR.CategoryCode = 'ST1' And ITM.ItemTypeCode = 'OJ00001' AND ITM.ClassCode = 'CL01006' And ITM.Deleted != 1 ) T1 Order by L1Code, Code

Select Row_Number()OVER(ORDER BY T1.L1Code, T1.Code ) as RNUM, T1.* From ( SELECT ISNULL(L1ID.Identifier, ITM.Identifier) AS L1Code, ATRNML1.PlainText AS L1Name, ISNULL(L2ID.Identifier, ITM.Identifier) AS L2Code, ATRNML2.PlainText AS L2Name, ISNULL(L3ID.Identifier, ITM.Identifier) AS L3Code, ATRNML3.PlainText AS L3Name, ISNULL(L4ID.Identifier, ITM.Identifier) AS L4Code, ATRNML4.PlainText AS L4Name, ITM.Identifier AS Code, ATRNM.PlainText AS Name, REPLACE(ISNULL(REPLACE(ATRDESC.PlainText, CHAR(11), ''),REPLACE(ATRDESCB.PlainText, CHAR(11), '')),'"','"') AS Description, ATRINPUT.PlainText As Input, ATROUTPUT.PlainText As Output, ATRORG.PlainText As ORG, ATRDEPART.PlainText AS DePartmentInCharge, ATRCYC.PlainText As Cycle, ATRWORKTIME.PlainText AS WorkTime, APPLTYPE.Value As APPLTYPE, MODUALAPP.PlainText As MODUALAPP, OwnerIT.PlainText AS ownerIT, OwnerCST.PlainText AS ownerCST, ATRISSUE.PlainText AS Issue, ATRIMPROVEOPP.PlainText As IMPROVEOP, ATRKPI.PlainText AS KPI, ATRCHKPOINT.PlainText AS CHKPOINT, ATRSPEC.PlainText AS SPEC, ATRPROCTPYE.PlainText AS PROCTPYE, ATRPIID.PlainText AS PIID, ATRCHGTOBE.PlainText AS CHGTOBE, ATRBUSRULE.PlainText AS BusinessRule, ATRTCODE.PlainText As TCODE, GAPID.PlainText As GAPID, GAPSUM.PlainText As GAPSUM, GAPSLT.PlainText As GAPSLT, AUTHOR.name AS Owner, CONVERT(CHAR(10),CONVERT(datetime,ITM.LastUpdated ),21) as LastUpdated, CS.Version, ITM.ItemID FROM XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM AS STR LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM AS ITM ON ITM.ItemID = STR.ToItemID LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_DICTIONARY AS CLS ON CLS.TypeCode = ITM.ClassCode AND CLS.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND CLS.Category = 'CLS' Inner Join XBOLTADM.TW_PROCESS AS PRSUM ON PRSUM.ItemID = ITM.ItemID Inner Join XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM AS L1ID ON L1ID.ItemID = PRSUM.L1ItemID LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR AS ATRNML1 ON ATRNML1.ItemID = L1ID.ItemID AND ATRNML1.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND ATRNML1.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00001' LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM AS L2ID ON L2ID.ItemID = PRSUM.L2ItemID LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR AS ATRNML2 ON ATRNML2.ItemID = L2ID.ItemID AND ATRNML2.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND ATRNML2.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00001' LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM AS L3ID ON L3ID.ItemID = PRSUM.L3ItemID LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR AS ATRNML3 ON ATRNML3.ItemID = L3ID.ItemID AND ATRNML3.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND ATRNML3.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00001' LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM AS L4ID ON L4ID.ItemID = PRSUM.L4ItemID LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR_REV AS ATRNML4 ON ATRNML4.ChangeSetID in (SELECT ChangeSetID FROM XBOLTADM.TB_CHANGE_SET where ProjectID = 3) and ATRNML4.ItemID = ITM.ItemID AND ATRNML4.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND ATRNML4.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00001' LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR_REV AS ATRNM ON ATRNM.ChangeSetID in (SELECT ChangeSetID FROM XBOLTADM.TB_CHANGE_SET where ProjectID = 3) and ATRNM.ItemID = ITM.ItemID AND ATRNM.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND ATRNM.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00001' LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR_REV AS ATRDESC ON ATRDESC.ChangeSetID in (SELECT ChangeSetID FROM XBOLTADM.TB_CHANGE_SET where ProjectID = 3) and ATRDESC.ItemID = ITM.ItemID AND ATRDESC.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND ATRDESC.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00003' LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR AS ATRNMB ON ATRNMB.ItemID = ITM.ItemID AND ATRNMB.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND ATRNMB.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00001' AND ATRNMB.ClassCode in ('CL01001','CL01002','CL01004') LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR AS ATRDESCB ON ATRDESCB.ItemID = ITM.ItemID AND ATRDESCB.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND ATRDESCB.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00003' AND ATRDESCB.ClassCode in ('CL01001','CL01002','CL01004') LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR_REV AS ATRINPUT ON ATRINPUT.ChangeSetID in (SELECT ChangeSetID FROM XBOLTADM.TB_CHANGE_SET where ProjectID = 3) and ATRINPUT.ItemID = ITM.ItemID AND ATRINPUT.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND ATRINPUT.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00015'LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR_REV AS ATROUTPUT ON ATROUTPUT.ChangeSetID in (SELECT ChangeSetID FROM XBOLTADM.TB_CHANGE_SET where ProjectID = 3) and ATROUTPUT.ItemID = ITM.ItemID AND ATROUTPUT.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND ATROUTPUT.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00016'LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR_REV AS ATRORG ON ATRORG.ChangeSetID in (SELECT ChangeSetID FROM XBOLTADM.TB_CHANGE_SET where ProjectID = 3) and ATRORG.ItemID = ITM.ItemID AND ATRORG.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND ATRORG.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00010'LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR_REV AS ATRDEPART ON ATRDEPART.ChangeSetID in (SELECT ChangeSetID FROM XBOLTADM.TB_CHANGE_SET where ProjectID = 3) and ATRDEPART.ItemID = ITM.ItemID AND ATRDEPART.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND ATRDEPART.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00017' LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR_REV AS ATRCYC ON ATRCYC.ChangeSetID in (SELECT ChangeSetID FROM XBOLTADM.TB_CHANGE_SET where ProjectID = 3) and ATRCYC.ItemID = ITM.ItemID AND ATRCYC.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND ATRCYC.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00009' LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR_REV AS ATRWORKTIME ON ATRWORKTIME.ChangeSetID in (SELECT ChangeSetID FROM XBOLTADM.TB_CHANGE_SET where ProjectID = 3) and ATRWORKTIME.ItemID = ITM.ItemID AND ATRWORKTIME.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND ATRWORKTIME.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00090' LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR_REV AS ATRAPPLTYPE ON ATRAPPLTYPE.ChangeSetID in (SELECT ChangeSetID FROM XBOLTADM.TB_CHANGE_SET where ProjectID = 3) and ATRAPPLTYPE.ItemID = ITM.ItemID AND ATRAPPLTYPE.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND ATRAPPLTYPE.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00037'LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ATTR_TYPE_LOV AS APPLTYPE ON APPLTYPE.LovCode = ATRAPPLTYPE.LovCode AND APPLTYPE.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND APPLTYPE.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00037'LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR_REV AS MODUALAPP ON MODUALAPP.ChangeSetID in (SELECT ChangeSetID FROM XBOLTADM.TB_CHANGE_SET where ProjectID = 3) and MODUALAPP.ItemID = ITM.ItemID AND MODUALAPP.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND MODUALAPP.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00013'LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR_REV AS OwnerIT ON OwnerIT.ChangeSetID in (SELECT ChangeSetID FROM XBOLTADM.TB_CHANGE_SET where ProjectID = 3) and OwnerIT.ItemID = ITM.ItemID AND OwnerIT.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND OwnerIT.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00022' LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR_REV AS OwnerCST ON OwnerCST.ChangeSetID in (SELECT ChangeSetID FROM XBOLTADM.TB_CHANGE_SET where ProjectID = 3) and OwnerCST.ItemID = ITM.ItemID AND OwnerCST.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND OwnerCST.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00025' LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR_REV AS ATRISSUE ON ATRISSUE.ChangeSetID in (SELECT ChangeSetID FROM XBOLTADM.TB_CHANGE_SET where ProjectID = 3) and ATRISSUE.ItemID = ITM.ItemID AND ATRISSUE.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND ATRISSUE.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00030' LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR_REV AS ATRIMPROVEOPP ON ATRIMPROVEOPP.ChangeSetID in (SELECT ChangeSetID FROM XBOLTADM.TB_CHANGE_SET where ProjectID = 3) and ATRIMPROVEOPP.ItemID = ITM.ItemID AND ATRIMPROVEOPP.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND ATRIMPROVEOPP.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00088' LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR_REV AS ATRKPI ON ATRKPI.ChangeSetID in (SELECT ChangeSetID FROM XBOLTADM.TB_CHANGE_SET where ProjectID = 3) and ATRKPI.ItemID = ITM.ItemID AND ATRKPI.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND ATRKPI.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00007' LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR_REV AS ATRCHKPOINT ON ATRCHKPOINT.ChangeSetID in (SELECT ChangeSetID FROM XBOLTADM.TB_CHANGE_SET where ProjectID = 3) and ATRCHKPOINT.ItemID = ITM.ItemID AND ATRCHKPOINT.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND ATRCHKPOINT.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00029' LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR_REV AS ATRSPEC ON ATRSPEC.ChangeSetID in (SELECT ChangeSetID FROM XBOLTADM.TB_CHANGE_SET where ProjectID = 3) and ATRSPEC.ItemID = ITM.ItemID AND ATRSPEC.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND ATRSPEC.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00052'LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR_REV AS ATRPROCTPYE ON ATRPROCTPYE.ChangeSetID in (SELECT ChangeSetID FROM XBOLTADM.TB_CHANGE_SET where ProjectID = 3) and ATRPROCTPYE.ItemID = ITM.ItemID AND ATRPROCTPYE.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND ATRPROCTPYE.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00036'LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR_REV AS ATRPIID ON ATRPIID.ChangeSetID in (SELECT ChangeSetID FROM XBOLTADM.TB_CHANGE_SET where ProjectID = 3) and ATRPIID.ItemID = ITM.ItemID AND ATRPIID.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND ATRPIID.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00053'LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR_REV AS ATRCHGTOBE ON ATRCHGTOBE.ChangeSetID in (SELECT ChangeSetID FROM XBOLTADM.TB_CHANGE_SET where ProjectID = 3) and ATRCHGTOBE.ItemID = ITM.ItemID AND ATRCHGTOBE.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND ATRCHGTOBE.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00023'LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR_REV AS ATRBUSRULE ON ATRBUSRULE.ChangeSetID in (SELECT ChangeSetID FROM XBOLTADM.TB_CHANGE_SET where ProjectID = 3) and ATRBUSRULE.ItemID = ITM.ItemID AND ATRBUSRULE.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND ATRBUSRULE.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00008'LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR_REV AS ATRTCODE ON ATRTCODE.ChangeSetID in (SELECT ChangeSetID FROM XBOLTADM.TB_CHANGE_SET where ProjectID = 3) and ATRTCODE.ItemID = ITM.ItemID AND ATRTCODE.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND ATRTCODE.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00014' LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR_REV AS GAPID ON GAPID.ChangeSetID in (SELECT ChangeSetID FROM XBOLTADM.TB_CHANGE_SET where ProjectID = 3) and GAPID.ItemID = ITM.ItemID AND GAPID.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND GAPID.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00027' LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR_REV AS GAPSUM ON GAPSUM.ChangeSetID in (SELECT ChangeSetID FROM XBOLTADM.TB_CHANGE_SET where ProjectID = 3) and GAPSUM.ItemID = ITM.ItemID AND GAPSUM.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND GAPSUM.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00048' LEFT JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR_REV AS GAPSLT ON GAPSLT.ChangeSetID in (SELECT ChangeSetID FROM XBOLTADM.TB_CHANGE_SET where ProjectID = 3) and GAPSLT.ItemID = ITM.ItemID AND GAPSLT.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND GAPSLT.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00049' LEFT JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_MEMBER AS AUTHOR ON AUTHOR.MemberID = ITM.AuthorID LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_CHANGE_SET AS CS ON CS.ItemID = L4ID.ItemID and CS.ProjectID = 3 Where STR.CategoryCode = 'ST1' And ITM.ItemTypeCode = 'OJ00001' AND ITM.ClassCode = 'CL01006' AND ATRNM.PlainText is not null) T1 Order by L1Code, Code

SELECT ATRNM.PlainText AS ItemName, L4.L4itemID, L4.L4itemID AS ItemID, ISNULL(L4Count,0) AS L4Count, ISNULL(그룹공통,0) AS 그룹공통, ISNULL("업종공통(가금)",0) AS "업종공통(가금)", ISNULL("업종공통(축산)",0) AS "업종공통(축산)", ISNULL(사별특화,0) AS 사별특화, ISNULL(L4Count,0) -ISNULL(그룹공통,0)-ISNULL("업종공통(가금)",0)- ISNULL("업종공통(축산)",0) - ISNULL(사별특화,0) AS 선택안함 FROM ( (SELECT ITM.L1ItemID AS L4itemID,COUNT(*) AS L4Count FROM XBOLTADM.TW_PROCESS ITM WHERE ITM.ItemClassCode = 'CL01005' GROUP BY ITM.L1ItemID) AS L4 LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT ITM.L1ItemID AS itemID,COUNT(*) AS 그룹공통 FROM XBOLTADM.TW_PROCESS ITM LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR AS ATRPROGRESS ON ATRPROGRESS.ItemID = ITM.ItemID AND ATRPROGRESS.LanguageID = #{sessionCurrLangType} AND ATRPROGRESS.AttrTypeCode = 'ZAT0011' LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ATTR_TYPE_LOV AS LOVPROGRESS ON LOVPROGRESS.LovCode = ATRPROGRESS.LovCode AND LOVPROGRESS.LanguageID = #{sessionCurrLangType} AND LOVPROGRESS.AttrTypeCode = 'ZAT0011' WHERE ITM.ItemClassCode = 'CL01005' AND LOVPROGRESS.LovCode = 'B00' GROUP BY ITM.L1ItemID) AS B00 on L4.L4itemID =B00.itemID LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT ITM.L1ItemID AS itemID,COUNT(*) AS "업종공통(가금)" FROM XBOLTADM.TW_PROCESS ITM LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR AS ATRPROGRESS ON ATRPROGRESS.ItemID = ITM.ItemID AND ATRPROGRESS.LanguageID = #{sessionCurrLangType} AND ATRPROGRESS.AttrTypeCode = 'ZAT0011' LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ATTR_TYPE_LOV AS LOVPROGRESS ON LOVPROGRESS.LovCode = ATRPROGRESS.LovCode AND LOVPROGRESS.LanguageID = #{sessionCurrLangType} AND LOVPROGRESS.AttrTypeCode = 'ZAT0011' WHERE ITM.ItemClassCode = 'CL01005' AND LOVPROGRESS.LovCode = 'B01' GROUP BY ITM.L1ItemID) B01 on L4.L4itemID =B01.itemID LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT ITM.L1ItemID AS itemID,COUNT(*) AS "업종공통(축산)" FROM XBOLTADM.TW_PROCESS ITM LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR AS ATRPROGRESS ON ATRPROGRESS.ItemID = ITM.ItemID AND ATRPROGRESS.LanguageID = #{sessionCurrLangType} AND ATRPROGRESS.AttrTypeCode = 'ZAT0011' LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ATTR_TYPE_LOV AS LOVPROGRESS ON LOVPROGRESS.LovCode = ATRPROGRESS.LovCode AND LOVPROGRESS.LanguageID = #{sessionCurrLangType} AND LOVPROGRESS.AttrTypeCode = 'ZAT0011' WHERE ITM.ItemClassCode = 'CL01005' AND LOVPROGRESS.LovCode = 'B02' GROUP BY ITM.L1ItemID) AS B02 on L4.L4itemID =B02.itemID LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT ITM.L1ItemID AS itemID,COUNT(*) 사별특화 FROM XBOLTADM.TW_PROCESS ITM LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR AS ATRPROGRESS ON ATRPROGRESS.ItemID = ITM.ItemID AND ATRPROGRESS.LanguageID = #{sessionCurrLangType} AND ATRPROGRESS.AttrTypeCode = 'ZAT0011' LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ATTR_TYPE_LOV AS LOVPROGRESS ON LOVPROGRESS.LovCode = ATRPROGRESS.LovCode AND LOVPROGRESS.LanguageID = #{sessionCurrLangType} AND LOVPROGRESS.AttrTypeCode = 'ZAT0011' WHERE ITM.ItemClassCode = 'CL01005' AND LOVPROGRESS.LovCode like 'C%' GROUP BY ITM.L1ItemID) AS C on L4.L4itemID =C.itemID LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TW_PROCESS AS ITMNM on ITMNM.ItemID = L4.L4itemID LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR AS ATRNM on ATRNM.ItemID = L4.L4itemID AND ATRNM.LanguageID = #{sessionCurrLangType} AND ATRNM.AttrTypeCode ='AT00001' LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR AS ATRTITLE on ATRTITLE.ItemID = L4.L4itemID AND ATRTITLE.LanguageID = #{sessionCurrLangType} AND ATRTITLE.AttrTypeCode ='AT00002' ) WHERE L4.L4itemID !=0 and ATRTITLE.PlainText IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ITMNM.Identifier

SELECT Count(Distinct CXN.FROMItemID) AS CXNCOUNT FROM XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM ITM Inner Join XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM CXN ON CXN.CategoryCode = 'CN' And CXN.ClassCode = #{cxnClassCode} And CXN.FROMItemID = ITM.ItemID
WHERE ITM.ClassCode = 'CL01006' AND ITM.Deleted ! = 1 And CXN.Deleted != 1

SELECT DISTINCT L1.Identifier AS '모듈' ,L1NAME.PlainText AS '모듈명' ,L2.Identifier AS 'L2 프로세스ID' ,L2NAME.PlainText AS 'L2 프로세스명' ,L3.Identifier AS 'L3 프로세스ID' ,L3NAME.PlainText AS 'L3 프로세스명' ,L4.Identifier AS 'L4 프로세스ID' ,L4NAME.PlainText AS 'L4 프로세스명' ,L4AUTHOR.NAME AS '담당자' ,L4AUTHOR.Position AS '직책' ,L4TTXT.Name AS '부서' ,L5.IDENTIFIER AS 'ACTIVITY ID' ,L5NAME.PlainText AS 'ACTIVITY 명' ,CASE WHEN L5SYS.PlainText IS NOT NULL THEN LOV.Value ELSE 'Manual' END AS 'System Type' ,CASE WHEN TCODE.SCRN IS NULL THEN '' ELSE ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY L5.IDENTIFIER ORDER BY TCODE.SCRN) END AS '순번' ,CASE WHEN TCODE.TID IS NULL THEN '' ELSE TSYS.PlainText END AS 'IT System' ,CASE WHEN TCODE.SCRN IS NULL THEN '' ELSE TCODE.SCRN END AS '메뉴코드' ----,CASE ---- WHEN TCODE.TID IS NULL THEN '' ---- ELSE TCODE.TID ---- END AS 'TCODE' ,CASE WHEN TCODE.TID IS NULL THEN '' ELSE TNAME.PlainText END AS '메뉴코드내역' ,CASE WHEN TCODE.TID IS NULL THEN '' ELSE TCODEAUTHOR.Name END AS '시스템 담당자' ,CASE WHEN TCODE.TID IS NULL THEN '' ELSE TCODEAUTHOR.Position END AS '직책' ,CASE WHEN TCODE.TID IS NULL THEN '' ELSE TTXT.Name END AS '부서' ,CASE WHEN TCODE.TID IS NULL THEN '' WHEN US.PlainText IS NULL THEN '' ELSE US.PlainText END AS '사용량(년)' ,CASE WHEN TCODE.TID IS NULL THEN '' WHEN US.PlainText IS NULL THEN '' ELSE '2022' END AS '대상연도' FROM XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM L5 LEFT JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR L5NAME ON L5NAME.ItemID = L5.ItemID AND L5NAME.LanguageID = 1042 AND L5NAME.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00001' LEFT JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM L4ST ON L4ST.ToItemID = L5.ItemID AND L4ST.CategoryCode = 'ST1' AND L4ST.ItemTypeCode = 'CN00001' LEFT JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM L4 ON L4.ItemID = L4ST.FromItemID AND L4.ClassCode = 'CL01005' AND L4.ProjectID = 5 LEFT JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_MEMBER L4AUTHOR ON L4AUTHOR.MemberID = L4.AuthorID LEFT JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_TEAM_TXT L4TTXT ON L4TTXT.TeamID = L4AUTHOR.TeamID AND L4TTXT.LanguageID = 1042 LEFT JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR L4NAME ON L4NAME.ItemID = L4.ItemID AND L4NAME.LanguageID = 1042 AND L4NAME.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00001' LEFT JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM L3ST ON L3ST.ToItemID = L4.ItemID AND L3ST.CategoryCode = 'ST1' AND L3ST.ItemTypeCode = 'CN00001' LEFT JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM L3 ON L3.ItemID = L3ST.FromItemID AND L3.ClassCode = 'CL01004' AND L3.ProjectID = 5 LEFT JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR L3NAME ON L3NAME.ItemID = L3.ItemID AND L3NAME.LanguageID = 1042 AND L3NAME.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00001' LEFT JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM L2ST ON L2ST.ToItemID = L3.ItemID AND L2ST.CategoryCode = 'ST1' AND L2ST.ItemTypeCode = 'CN00001' LEFT JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM L2 ON L2.ItemID = L2ST.FromItemID AND L2.ClassCode = 'CL01002' AND L2.ProjectID = 5 LEFT JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR L2NAME ON L2NAME.ItemID = L2.ItemID AND L2NAME.LanguageID = 1042 AND L2NAME.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00001' LEFT JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM L1ST ON L1ST.ToItemID = L2.ItemID AND L1ST.CategoryCode = 'ST1' AND L1ST.ItemTypeCode = 'CN00001' LEFT JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM L1 ON L1.ItemID = L1ST.FromItemID AND L1.ClassCode = 'CL01001' AND L1.ProjectID = 5 LEFT JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR L1NAME ON L1NAME.ItemID = L1.ItemID AND L1NAME.LanguageID = 1042 AND L1NAME.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00001' LEFT JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR L5SYS ON L5SYS.ItemID = L5.ItemID AND L5SYS.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00037' AND L5SYS.LanguageID = 1042 LEFT JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ATTR_TYPE_LOV LOV ON LOV.LovCode = L5SYS.LovCode AND LOV.LanguageID = 1042 AND LOV.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00037'
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT L5.ITEMID AS ITEM ,L5.IDENTIFIER AS ID ,Split2.items AS SCRN ,TCODE.ItemID AS TITEM ,TCODE.Identifier AS TID ,TCODE.AuthorID AS ATH FROM XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM L5 LEFT JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR SCN ON SCN.ItemID = L5.ItemID AND SCN.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00014' AND SCN.LanguageID = 1042 CROSS APPLY [XBOLTADM].[fn_SplitAndTrim](REPLACE(SCN.PlainText, CHAR(34), ''), ',') AS SplitData CROSS APPLY [XBOLTADM].[fn_SplitAndTrim](REPLACE(SplitData.items, CHAR(13), ''), CHAR(10)) AS Split CROSS APPLY [XBOLTADM].[fn_SplitAndTrim](Split.items, CHAR(32)) AS Split2 LEFT JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM TCODE ON TCODE.Identifier = Split2.items AND (TCODE.ClassCode = 'CL04005' OR TCODE.ClassCode = 'CL04006') AND TCODE.ItemTypeCode = 'OJ00004' WHERE L5.ItemTypeCode = 'OJ00001' AND L5.ClassCode = 'CL01006' AND L5.ProjectID = 5 AND L5.Deleted != 1 AND L5.Identifier IS NOT NULL ) TCODE ON TCODE.ITEM = L5.ItemID
LEFT JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR TSYS ON TSYS.ItemID = TCode.TITEM AND TSYS.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00013' AND TSYS.LanguageID = 1042 LEFT JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR TNAME ON TNAME.ItemID = TCode.TITEM AND TNAME.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00001' AND TNAME.LanguageID = 1042 LEFT JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_MEMBER TCODEAUTHOR ON TCODEAUTHOR.MemberID = TCode.ATH LEFT JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_TEAM_TXT TTXT ON TTXT.TeamID = TCODEAUTHOR.TeamID LEFT JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR US ON US.ItemID = TCODE.TITEM AND US.AttrTypeCode = 'AT99998' AND US.LanguageID = 1042 WHERE L5.ItemTypeCode = 'OJ00001' AND L5.ClassCode = 'CL01006' AND L5.ProjectID = 5 AND L5.Deleted != 1 AND L5.Identifier IS NOT NULL AND L4.Identifier IS NOT NULL AND L3.Identifier IS NOT NULL AND L2.Identifier IS NOT NULL AND L1.Identifier IS NOT NULL ORDER BY L5.Identifier, '순번'

SELECT CASE WHEN TSYS.PlainText != 'NF' THEN TSYS.PlainText ELSE NFTXT.Value END AS 'IT System' ,TCode.ItemID ,TCode.Identifier AS '메뉴코드' ,TNAME.PlainText AS '메뉴코드내역' ,CASE WHEN TSYS.PlainText = 'SAP' AND SAPMN.PlainText IS NOT NULL THEN SAPMN.PlainText WHEN TSYS.PlainText = 'SAP' AND SAPMN.PlainText IS NULL THEN '미지정' WHEN TSYS.PlainText = 'BATCH' AND BATMN.PlainText IS NOT NULL THEN BATMN.PlainText WHEN TSYS.PlainText = 'BATCH' AND BATMN.PlainText IS NULL THEN '미지정' ELSE '' END AS '담당자명' ,CASE WHEN TSYS.PlainText = 'SAP' AND SAPEN.PlainText IS NOT NULL THEN SAPEN.PlainText WHEN TSYS.PlainText = 'BATCH' AND BATEN.PlainText IS NOT NULL THEN BATEN.PlainText WHEN TSYS.PlainText = 'NF' AND NFEN.PlainText IS NOT NULL THEN NFEN.PlainText WHEN TSYS.PlainText = 'NCO' AND NCOEN.AuthorEmpNo IS NOT NULL THEN NCOEN.AuthorEmpNo ELSE '' END AS '담당자사번' ,CASE WHEN TSYS.PlainText = 'EAI' AND IFLMN.PlainText IS NOT NULL THEN IFLMN.PlainText ELSE '' END AS 'Legacy 담당자' ,CASE WHEN TSYS.PlainText = 'EAI' AND IFEMN.PlainText IS NOT NULL THEN IFEMN.PlainText ELSE '' END AS 'ERP 담당자' ,CASE WHEN US.PlainText IS NULL THEN '' ELSE US.PlainText END AS '사용량' ,CASE WHEN USY.PlainText IS NULL THEN '' ELSE USY.PlainText END AS '대상년도' ,CASE WHEN SAPPRO.PlainText IS NULL THEN '' ELSE SAPPRO.PlainText END AS '프로그램 구분' ,CASE WHEN SAPYN.PlainText IS NULL THEN '' ELSE SAPYN.PlainText END AS '배치유무' ,CASE WHEN L5.ProcID IS NULL THEN 'X' ELSE 'O' END AS 'MAP 반영여부' ,CASE WHEN L5.ProcID IS NULL THEN '' ELSE 'L5' END AS '프로세스 레벨' ,CASE WHEN L5.ProcID IS NULL THEN '' ELSE L5.ProcID END AS '프로세스ID' ,CASE WHEN L5.ProcID IS NULL THEN '' ELSE L5.ProcName END AS '프로세스명' ,CASE WHEN L5.ProcID IS NULL THEN '' ELSE L5.ProcAuthor END AS '프로세스담당자' ,CASE WHEN L5.ProcID IS NULL THEN '' ELSE L5.ProcPosition END AS '직책' ,CASE WHEN L5.ProcID IS NULL THEN '' ELSE L5.ProcDept END AS '부서' ,CASE WHEN L5.ProcID IS NOT NULL THEN L5.SystemType ELSE '' END AS 'System Type' FROM XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM TCode LEFT JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR TSYS ON TSYS.ItemID = TCode.ItemID AND TSYS.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00013' AND TSYS.LanguageID = 1042 LEFT JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR NFSYS ON NFSYS.ItemID = TCode.ItemID AND TCode.ProjectID = 9 AND NFSYS.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00037' AND NFSYS.LanguageID = 1042 LEFT JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ATTR_TYPE_LOV NFTXT ON NFTXT.LovCode = NFSYS.LovCode AND NFTXT.LanguageID = 1042 AND NFTXT.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00037' LEFT JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR TNAME ON TNAME.ItemID = TCode.ItemID AND TNAME.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00001' AND TNAME.LanguageID = 1042 LEFT JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR SAPMN ON SAPMN.ItemID = TCode.ItemID AND SAPMN.AttrTypeCode = 'ATSAP01' AND SAPMN.LanguageID = 1042 LEFT JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR SAPEN ON SAPEN.ItemID = TCode.ItemID AND SAPEN.AttrTypeCode = 'ATSAP03' AND SAPEN.LanguageID = 1042 LEFT JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR BATMN ON BATMN.ItemID = TCode.ItemID AND BATMN.AttrTypeCode = 'ATPRD09' AND BATMN.LanguageID = 1042 LEFT JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR BATEN ON BATEN.ItemID = TCode.ItemID AND BATEN.AttrTypeCode = 'ATPRD11' AND BATEN.LanguageID = 1042 LEFT JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR NFEN ON NFEN.ItemID = TCode.ItemID AND NFEN.AttrTypeCode = 'ATNF002' AND NFEN.LanguageID = 1042 LEFT JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR IFLMN ON IFLMN.ItemID = TCode.ItemID AND IFLMN.AttrTypeCode = 'ATEAI04' AND IFLMN.LanguageID = 1042 LEFT JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR IFEMN ON IFEMN.ItemID = TCode.ItemID AND IFEMN.AttrTypeCode = 'ATEAI05' AND IFEMN.LanguageID = 1042 LEFT JOIN XBOLTADM.TI_ITEM_ATTR_IF NCOEN ON NCOEN.ItemID = TCode.ItemID AND NCOEN.SystemType = 'NCO' LEFT JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR US ON US.ItemID = TCode.ItemID AND US.AttrTypeCode = 'AT99998' AND US.LanguageID = 1042 LEFT JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR USY ON USY.ItemID = TCode.ItemID AND USY.AttrTypeCode = 'AT99999' AND USY.LanguageID = 1042 LEFT JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR SAPPRO ON SAPPRO.ItemID = TCode.ItemID AND SAPPRO.AttrTypeCode = 'ATSAP04' AND SAPPRO.LanguageID = 1042 LEFT JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR SAPYN ON SAPYN.ItemID = TCode.ItemID AND SAPYN.AttrTypeCode = 'ATSAP05' AND SAPYN.LanguageID = 1042 LEFT JOIN XBOLTADM.Z_SYS_PROC L5 ON L5.SysItemID = TCode.ItemID WHERE TCode.ItemTypeCode = 'OJ00004' AND TCode.ClassCode IN ('CL04005', 'CL04006') AND TCode.ProjectID NOT IN (3, 5) AND TCode.Deleted != 1 AND TCODE.Identifier NOT LIKE '%)' ORDER BY TSYS.PlainText DESC, TCode.Identifier
mapper.insert: INSERT XBOLTADM.Z_SYS_PROC (SysItemID, ProcItemID, ProcID, ProcName, ProcAuthor, ProcPosition, ProcDept, SystemType) ( SELECT DISTINCT(TCNL.ToItemID) AS TTO ,L5.ItemID AS L5Item ,L5.Identifier AS L5ID ,L5NAME.PlainText AS L5NAME ,TMM2.Name AS L5AUTHOR ,TMM2.Position AS L5POS ,TTXT2.Name AS L5TTXT ,LOV.Value AS L5SYS FROM XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM TCNL LEFT JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM L5 ON L5.ItemID = TCNL.FromItemID AND L5.ClassCode = 'CL01006' AND L5.Deleted != 1 LEFT JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR L5NAME ON L5NAME.ItemID = L5.ItemID AND L5NAME.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00001' AND L5NAME.LanguageID = 1042 LEFT JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_MEMBER TMM2 ON TMM2.MemberID = L5.AuthorID LEFT JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_TEAM_TXT TTXT2 ON TTXT2.TeamID = TMM2.TeamID AND TTXT2.LanguageID = 1042 LEFT JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR L5SYS ON L5SYS.ItemID = L5.ItemID AND L5SYS.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00037' AND L5SYS.LanguageID = 1042 LEFT JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ATTR_TYPE_LOV LOV ON LOV.LovCode = L5SYS.LovCode AND LOV.LanguageID = 1042 AND LOV.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00037' WHERE TCNL.ItemTypeCode = 'CN00104' AND TCNL.ClassCode = 'CNL0104' AND L5.ItemID IS NOT NULL )
mapper.select: SELECT TIO.SystemType AS SYS ,TIO.ObjectID AS ID ,TIO.AT00001 AS ATNCO91 ,TIO.AT00003 AS ATNCO93 ,TIO.ATNCO01 AS ATNCO01 ,TIO.ATNCO02 AS ATNCO02 ,TIO.ATNCO03 AS ATNCO03 ,TIO.ATNCO04 AS ATNCO04 ,TIO.ATNCO05 AS ATNCO05 ,TIO.ATNCO06 AS ATNCO06 ,TIO.ATNCO07 AS ATNCO07 ,'호출' AS Action ,CONVERT(varchar, GETDATE(), 23) AS UpdatedOnDate ,'03:05:00' AS UpdatedOnTime FROM XBOLTADM.TI_ITEM_ATTR_ORG TIO WHERE TIO.SystemType = #{systemType}

SELECT TIL.ItemID AS ItemID ,TIL.SystemType AS SYS
,TIL.Identifier AS ID ,TIL.ATNCO91 AS ATNCO91 ,TIL.ATNCO93 AS ATNCO93 ,TIL.ATNCO01 AS ATNCO01 ,TIL.ATNCO02 AS ATNCO02 ,TIL.ATNCO03 AS ATNCO03 ,TIL.ATNCO04 AS ATNCO04 ,TIL.ATNCO05 AS ATNCO05 ,TIL.ATNCO06 AS ATNCO06 ,TIL.ATNCO07 AS ATNCO07 ,TIL.Action AS Action ,CONVERT(varchar, TIL.UpdatedOn, 23) AS UpdatedOnDate ,CONVERT(varchar, TIL.UpdatedOn, 108) AS UpdatedOnTime
FROM XBOLTADM.TI_ITEM_ATTR_IF_LOG TIL INNER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM TI ON TI.ItemID = TIL.ItemID AND TI.ProjectID = #{projectID} WHERE TIL.ProjectID = #{projectID} AND CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), TIL.UpdatedOn, 120) > CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), DATEADD(DAY, -7, GETDATE()), 120) AND TIL.ItemClassCode = 'CL04005' ORDER BY TIL.UpdatedOn

SELECT TIO.SystemType AS SYS ,TIO.ObjectID AS ID ,CAST(TIO.Seq_NO AS INT) AS ATEAI92 ,TIO.AT00001 AS ATEAI91 ,TIO.ATEAI03 AS ATEAI03 ,TIO.ATNCO02 AS ATEAI04 ,TIO.ATEAI01 AS ATEAI01 ,TIO.ATEAI02 AS ATEAI02 ,TIO.ATNCO03 AS ATEAI05 ,'호출' AS Action ,CONVERT(varchar, GETDATE(), 23) AS UpdatedOnDate ,'04:05:00' AS UpdatedOnTime
FROM XBOLTADM.TI_ITEM_ATTR_ORG TIO WHERE TIO.SystemType = #{systemType}

SELECT TIL.ItemID AS ItemID ,TIL.SystemType AS SYS
,TIL.Identifier AS ID ,TIL.ATEAI92 AS ATEAI92 ,TIL.ATEAI91 AS ATEAI91 ,TIL.ATEAI03 AS ATEAI03 ,TIL.ATEAI04 AS ATEAI04 ,TIL.ATEAI01 AS ATEAI01 ,TIL.ATEAI02 AS ATEAI02 ,TIL.ATEAI05 AS ATEAI05 ,TIL.Action AS Action ,CONVERT(varchar, TIL.UpdatedOn, 23) AS UpdatedOnDate ,CONVERT(varchar, TIL.UpdatedOn, 108) AS UpdatedOnTime
FROM XBOLTADM.TI_ITEM_ATTR_IF_LOG TIL INNER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM TI ON TI.ItemID = TIL.ItemID AND TI.ProjectID = #{projectID} WHERE TIL.ProjectID = #{projectID} AND CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), TIL.UpdatedOn, 120) > CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), DATEADD(DAY, -7, GETDATE()), 120) AND TIL.ItemClassCode = 'CL04006' ORDER BY TIL.UpdatedOn

SELECT TIO.SystemType AS SYS ,TIO.ObjectID AS ID ,CAST(TIO.MenuLvl AS INT) AS ATSAP90 ,TIO.AT00001 AS ATSAP91 ,TIO.AT00003 AS ATSAP93 ,TIO.ATNCO02 AS ATSAP01 ,TIO.ATNCO03 AS ATSAP02 ,TIO.ATNF002 AS ATSAP03 ,TIO.ATPRD07 AS ATSAP04 ,TIO.ATPRD08 AS ATSAP05 ,'호출' AS Action ,CONVERT(varchar, GETDATE(), 23) AS UpdatedOnDate ,'00:05:00' AS UpdatedOnTime
FROM XBOLTADM.TI_ITEM_ATTR_ORG TIO WHERE TIO.SystemType = #{systemType} ORDER BY CAST(TIO.Seq_NO AS INT)

SELECT TIL.ItemID AS ItemID ,TIL.SystemType AS SYS
,TIL.Identifier AS ID ,TIL.ATSAP90 AS ATSAP90 ,TIL.ATSAP91 AS ATSAP91 ,TIL.ATSAP93 AS ATSAP93 ,TIL.ATSAP01 AS ATSAP01 ,TIL.ATSAP02 AS ATSAP02 ,TIL.ATSAP03 AS ATSAP03 ,TIL.ATSAP04 AS ATSAP04 ,TIL.ATSAP05 AS ATSAP05 ,TIL.Action AS Action ,CONVERT(varchar, TIL.UpdatedOn, 23) AS UpdatedOnDate ,CONVERT(varchar, TIL.UpdatedOn, 108) AS UpdatedOnTime
FROM XBOLTADM.TI_ITEM_ATTR_IF_LOG TIL INNER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM TI ON TI.ItemID = TIL.ItemID AND TI.ProjectID = #{projectID} WHERE TIL.ProjectID = #{projectID} AND CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), TIL.UpdatedOn, 120) > CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), DATEADD(DAY, -7, GETDATE()), 120) AND TIL.ItemClassCode = 'CL04005' ORDER BY TIL.UpdatedOn

SELECT TIO.SystemType AS SYS ,TIO.ObjectID AS ID ,CAST(TIO.MenuLvl AS INT) AS ATPRD90 ,TIO.PObjectID AS ParentID -- ,TIO.AT00001 AS ATPRD91 ,TIO.AT00003 AS ATPRD93 ,TIO.ATPRD01 AS ATPRD01 ,TIO.ATPRD02 AS ATPRD02 ,TIO.ATPRD03 AS ATPRD03 ,TIO.ATPRD04 AS ATPRD04 ,TIO.ATPRD05 AS ATPRD05 ,TIO.ATPRD06 AS ATPRD06 ,TIO.ATPRD07 AS ATPRD07 ,TIO.ATPRD08 AS ATPRD08 ,TIO.ATNCO02 AS ATPRD09 ,TIO.ATNCO03 AS ATPRD10 ,TIO.ATNF002 AS ATPRD11 ,'호출' AS Action ,CONVERT(varchar, GETDATE(), 23) AS UpdatedOnDate ,'02:05:00' AS UpdatedOnTime
FROM XBOLTADM.TI_ITEM_ATTR_ORG TIO WHERE TIO.SystemType = #{systemType} ORDER BY CAST(TIO.MenuLvl AS INT)

SELECT TIL.ItemID AS ItemID ,TIL.SystemType AS SYS
,TIL.Identifier AS ID ,TIL.ATPRD90 AS ATPRD90 ,RIGHT(TIL.ParentID, 2) AS ParentID ,TIL.ATPRD91 AS ATPRD91 ,TIL.ATPRD93 AS ATPRD93 ,TIL.ATPRD01 AS ATPRD01 ,TIL.ATPRD02 AS ATPRD02 ,TIL.ATPRD03 AS ATPRD03 ,TIL.ATPRD04 AS ATPRD04 ,TIL.ATPRD05 AS ATPRD05 ,TIL.ATPRD06 AS ATPRD06 ,TIL.ATPRD07 AS ATPRD07 ,TIL.ATPRD08 AS ATPRD08 ,TIL.ATPRD09 AS ATPRD09 ,TIL.ATPRD10 AS ATPRD10 ,TIL.ATPRD11 AS ATPRD11 ,TIL.Action AS Action ,CONVERT(varchar, TIL.UpdatedOn, 23) AS UpdatedOnDate ,CONVERT(varchar, TIL.UpdatedOn, 108) AS UpdatedOnTime
FROM XBOLTADM.TI_ITEM_ATTR_IF_LOG TIL INNER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM TI ON TI.ItemID = TIL.ItemID AND TI.ProjectID = #{projectID} WHERE TIL.ProjectID = #{projectID} AND CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), TIL.UpdatedOn, 120) > CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), DATEADD(DAY, -7, GETDATE()), 120) AND TIL.ItemClassCode = 'CL04005' ORDER BY TIL.UpdatedOn

SELECT TIL.ItemID AS ItemID ,TIL.SystemType AS SYS ,TIL.Identifier AS ID ,TIL.ATNF092 AS ATNF092 ,TIL.ParentID AS ParentID ,TIL.ATNF094 AS ATNF094 ,TIL.ATNF091 AS ATNF091
,TIL.ATNF001 AS ATNF001 ,TIL.ATNF002 AS ATNF002 ,TIL.ATNF003 AS ATNF003 ,TIL.Action AS Action ,CONVERT(varchar, TIL.UpdatedOn, 23) AS UpdatedOnDate ,CONVERT(varchar, TIL.UpdatedOn, 108) AS UpdatedOnTime
FROM XBOLTADM.TI_ITEM_ATTR_IF_LOG TIL INNER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM TI ON TI.ItemID = TIL.ItemID AND TI.ProjectID = #{projectID} WHERE TIL.ProjectID = #{projectID} AND CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), TIL.UpdatedOn, 120) > CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), DATEADD(DAY, -7, GETDATE()), 120) AND TIL.ItemClassCode = 'CL04005' ORDER BY TIL.UpdatedOn
SELECT ProjectID FROM XBOLTADM.TB_PROJECT_TXT WHERE NAME = #{systemType} AND LanguageID = #{languageID}
SELECT ProjectID FROM XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM WHERE itemID = #{itemID}
SELECT CONVERT(VARCHAR, MAX(LASTUPDATED), 120) FROM XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR WHERE ItemID = #{itemID}
SELECT CONVERT(VARCHAR, MAX(LASTUPDATED), 23) FROM XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR_REV WHERE ChangeSetID = #{changeSetID} AND LastUpdated < #{updatedOnDate}
SELECT CONVERT(VARCHAR, MAX(LASTUPDATED), 120) FROM XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR_REV WHERE ChangeSetID = #{changeSetID} AND CONVERT(VARCHAR, LASTUPDATED, 23) = #{lastUpdatedOnDate}
SELECT CONVERT(VARCHAR, MAX(LASTUPDATED), 120) FROM XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR_REV WHERE ChangeSetID = #{changeSetID} AND CONVERT(VARCHAR, LASTUPDATED, 23) = #{updatedOnDate}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO XBOLTADM.TI_ITEM_ATTR_IF (SystemType, ObjectID, MenuLvl, AT00001, AT00003, AT00037, ATSAP01, ATSAP02, ATSAP03, SourceSystem, ATSAP90, ATSAP91, ATSAP93, ATSAP04, ATSAP05) SELECT SystemType, ObjectID, CAST(MenuLvl AS INT), AT00001, AT00003, CASE WHEN ObjectID IS NOT NULL THEN 'ERP' END, ATNCO02, ATNCO03, ATNF002, CONVERT(varchar, GETDATE(), 112), CAST(MenuLvl AS INT), AT00001, AT00003, ATPRD07, ATPRD08 FROM XBOLTADM.TI_ITEM_ATTR_ORG WHERE SystemType = #{systemType} AND USEYN = 'N' ORDER BY CAST(Seq_NO AS INT)

INSERT INTO XBOLTADM.TI_ITEM_ATTR_IF (SystemType, ObjectID, AT00001, AT00003, ATNCO01, ATNCO02, ATNCO03, ATNCO04, ATNCO05, ATNCO06, ATNCO07, SourceSystem, ATNCO91, ATNCO93) SELECT SystemType, ObjectID, AT00001, AT00003, ATNCO01, ATNCO02, ATNCO03, ATNCO04, ATNCO05, ATNCO06, ATNCO07, CONVERT(varchar, GETDATE(), 112), AT00001, AT00003 FROM XBOLTADM.TI_ITEM_ATTR_ORG WHERE SystemType = #{systemType} AND USEYN = 'N' ORDER BY ATNCO04

INSERT INTO XBOLTADM.TI_ITEM_ATTR_IF (SystemType, ObjectID, PObjectID, AT00000, AT00001, AT00003, AT00037, AT00039, ATNF001, ATNF002, ATNF003, SourceSystem, NF_SEQ, ATNF092, ATNF094, ATNF091) SELECT SystemType, CASE WHEN AT00000 IS NOT NULL THEN ObjectID ELSE Seq_NO + '.' + ObjectID END, CASE WHEN PObjectID != 'ROOT' THEN Seq_NO + '.' + PObjectID ELSE PObjectID END, AT00000, AT00001, AT00003 , CASE WHEN Seq_NO = 'shipbuilding' THEN 'NF_BLUE' WHEN Seq_NO = 'bizwork' THEN 'NF_RED' WHEN Seq_NO = 'esanipis' THEN 'NF_NAVY' WHEN Seq_NO = 'hi-conet' THEN 'NF_GREEN' WHEN Seq_No = 'G-HIRPO SCM' THEN 'NF_HIPRO' WHEN Seq_No = 'G-HIRPO SRM' THEN 'NF_HIPRO' WHEN Seq_No = 'G-HIRPO TMS' THEN 'NF_HIPRO' WHEN Seq_No = 'G-HRRPO TMS' THEN 'NF_HIPRO' WHEN Seq_No = 'RMS' THEN 'RMS' END , CASE WHEN AT00000 IS NOT NULL THEN ObjectID ELSE NULL END , ATNF001, ATNF002, ATNF003, CONVERT(varchar, GETDATE(), 112), Seq_NO, Seq_NO, AT00000, AT00001 FROM XBOLTADM.TI_ITEM_ATTR_ORG WHERE SystemType = #{systemType} AND USEYN = 'N' ORDER BY CASE WHEN PObjectID = 'ROOT' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, PObjectID, XBOLTADM.TI_ITEM_ATTR_ORG.Seq_NO

INSERT INTO XBOLTADM.TI_ITEM_ATTR_IF (SystemType, ObjectID, AT00001, ATEAI01, ATEAI02, ATEAI03, ATEAI04, ATEAI05, SourceSystem, ATEAI92, ATEAI91) SELECT SystemType, ObjectID, AT00001, ATEAI01, ATEAI02, ATEAI03, ATNCO02, ATNCO03, CONVERT(varchar, GETDATE(), 112), CAST(Seq_NO AS INT), AT00001 FROM XBOLTADM.TI_ITEM_ATTR_ORG WHERE SystemType = #{systemType} AND USEYN = 'N' ORDER BY CAST(Seq_NO AS INT)

INSERT INTO XBOLTADM.TI_ITEM_ATTR_IF (SystemType, ObjectID, MenuLvl, PObjectID, AT00001, AT00003, ATPRD09, ATPRD10, ATPRD11, ATPRD01, ATPRD02, ATPRD03, ATPRD04, ATPRD05, ATPRD06, ATPRD07, ATPRD08, SourceSystem, ATPRD90, ATPRD91, ATPRD93) SELECT SystemType, ObjectID, CAST(MenuLvl AS INT), PObjectID, AT00001, AT00003, ATNCO02, ATNCO03, ATNF002, ATPRD01, ATPRD02, ATPRD03, CAST(ATPRD04 AS INT), CAST(ATPRD05 AS INT), CAST(ATPRD06 AS INT), CAST(ATPRD07 AS INT), CAST(ATPRD08 AS INT), CONVERT(varchar, GETDATE(), 112), CAST(MenuLvl AS INT), AT00001, AT00003 FROM XBOLTADM.TI_ITEM_ATTR_ORG WHERE SystemType = #{systemType} AND USEYN = 'N' ORDER BY CAST(MenuLvl AS INT)
mapper.update: UPDATE XBOLTADM.TI_ITEM_ATTR_ORG SET USEYN = 'Y' WHERE SystemType = #{systemType} AND USEYN = 'N'

UPDATE XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM SET Deleted = 1, Status = 'DEL1' FROM ( SELECT TI.ItemID ITEM ,ST.ItemID ST FROM XBOLTADM.TI_ITEM_ATTR_IF TIF LEFT JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM TI ON TI.ItemID = TIF.ItemID LEFT JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM ST ON ST.ToItemID = TI.ItemID AND ST.CategoryCode = 'ST1' WHERE TIF.SourceSystem < CONVERT(varchar, GETDATE(), 112) AND TIF.Status = '02' AND TIF.SystemType = #{systemType} AND TI.ItemID IS NOT NULL AND TI.Deleted != 1 ) A WHERE (ItemID = A.ITEM OR ItemID = A.ST)
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM XBOLTADM.TI_ITEM_ATTR_IF WHERE (Identifier IS NULL OR ParentID IS NULL) AND SystemType = #{systemType}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM XBOLTADM.TI_ITEM_ATTR_IF WHERE Status = '00' AND SystemType = #{systemType}
{ CALL XBOLTADM.TI_ITEM_BATCH_RDY }
{ CALL XBOLTADM.TI_ITEM_BATCH }

SELECT TATA.AttrTypeCode AS AttrTypeCode , ISNULL(TD.Name, '') AS Name , TAT.DataType , TAT.HTML FROM XBOLTADM.TB_ATTR_TYPE_ALLOCATION TATA Left Outer Join XBOLTADM.TB_DICTIONARY TD on TATA.AttrTypeCode = TD.TypeCode AND TD.LanguageID = #{languageID} Left Outer Join XBOLTADM.TB_ATTR_TYPE TAT on TATA.AttrTypeCode = TAT.AttrTypeCode WHERE TATA.ItemClassCode = (SELECT ClassCode From XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM WHERE ItemID = #{s_itemID}) AND TATA.AttrTypeCode LIKE CONCAT('AT', #{systemtype}, '%')
ORDER BY TATA.SortNum ASC

Select Row_Number()OVER(ORDER BY TI.Identifier) as RNUM , XBOLTADM.fn_GetPrePostFromElement(TE.ModelID,TE.ObjectID) AS KBN , TE.ElementID , TE.ModelID AS ModelIDofItem , TE.ObjectID , Case when XBOLTADM.fn_GetObjectFromElement(TE.ObjectID,#{ItemID}) > 0 then 'model/display/green_link.png' Else 'model/display/red_link.png' End VrfctnLink , ISNULL(TIA.PlainText, 'Untitled' ) AS Name , TI.Identifier , ISNULL(TMD.Name,'-') AS MTCName , ISNULL(TST.Name,'-') AS StatusName , ISNULL(TB.Name,'-') AS UserName , ISNULL(Convert(nvarchar(20),TM2.LastUpdated, 111),'-') AS LastUpdated , TI.Blocked As ItemBlocked , TM2.MTCategory , Case When TM2.Blocked = '1' Then 'btn_view2.png' When TM2.MTCategory = 'VER' Then 'btn_view2.png' When TI.AuthorID = #{userId} Then 'btn_gedit.png' When TI.LockOwner = #{userId} Then 'btn_gedit.png' When 1 = #{authLev} Then 'btn_gedit.png' Else 'btn_view2.png' End BtnControl , TM2.IsPublic , TI.AuthorID As ItemAuthorID , TM2.Blocked As ModelBlocked , TCD.Name AS ModelTypeName , ISNULL(TMU.URL,'') AS URL , ISNULL(TM2.ChangeSetID,'') AS ChangeSetID , TM2.ModelID From XBOLTADM.TB_ELEMENT TE Left Outer Join XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR TIA On TIA.ItemID = TE.ObjectID And TIA.LanguageID = #{languageID} And TIA.AttrTypeCode='AT00001' Left Outer Join XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM TI On TI.ItemID = TE.ObjectID Left Outer Join XBOLTADM.TB_MODEL TM On TM.ModelID = TE.ModelID Left Outer Join ( select * from( select *, ROW_NUMBER() over(partition by ItemID order by MTCategory) AS tmpMTC From XBOLTADM.TB_MODEL ) as tmpModelTbl where tmpMTC = 1 ) TM2 On TM2.ItemID = TE.ObjectID Left Outer Join XBOLTADM.TB_DICTIONARY TST on TST.TypeCode = TM2.Status AND TST.LanguageID = 1042 AND TST.Category= 'MDLSTS' Left Outer Join XBOLTADM.TB_MEMBER TB on TI.AuthorID = TB.MemberID Left Outer Join XBOLTADM.TB_DICTIONARY TCD on TCD.TypeCode = TM2.ModelTypeCode AND TCD.LanguageID = #{languageID} And TCD.Category = 'MT' Left Outer Join XBOLTADM.TB_MODEL_TYPE TMTYP On TMTYP.ModelTypeCode = TM2.ModelTypeCode Left Outer Join XBOLTADM.TB_MENU TMU ON TMU.MenuID = TMTYP.MenuID Left Outer Join XBOLTADM.TB_DICTIONARY TMD on TMD.TypeCode = TM2.MTCategory AND TMD.LanguageID = #{languageID} Where TE.ModelID =#{ModelID} And TM.ModelTypeCode = #{ModelTypeCode} And TE.SymTypeCode in (Select SymTypeCode From XBOLTADM.TB_SYMTYPE_ALLOCATION Where ModelTypeCode =#{ModelTypeCode} and MdlIF='Y') And TI.Deleted != 1

Select Row_Number()OVER(ORDER BY TI.Identifier) as RNUM , TM.ModelID , TM.ItemID , TI.Identifier AS Identifier , ISNULL(TIA.PlainText,'Untitled') AS Name, TE.ElementID , Case when XBOLTADM.fn_GetExistObjectFromElement( TM.ItemID, #{ModelID}) > 0 then 'model/display/green_link.png' Else 'model/display/red_link.png' End VrfctnLink , XBOLTADM.fn_GetPrePostFromElement(TE.ModelID,TE.ObjectID) AS KBN , TMD.Name AS MTCName , TST.Name AS StatusName , TB.Name AS UserName , Convert(nvarchar(20),TM.LastUpdated, 111) AS LastUpdated , TI.Blocked As ItemBlocked , TM.MTCategory , Case When TM.Blocked = '1' Then 'btn_view2.png' When TM.MTCategory = 'VER' Then 'btn_view2.png' When TI.AuthorID = #{userId} Then 'btn_gedit.png' When TI.LockOwner = #{userId} Then 'btn_gedit.png' When 1 = #{authLev} Then 'btn_gedit.png' Else 'btn_view2.png' End BtnControl , TM.IsPublic , TI.AuthorID As ItemAuthorID , TM.Blocked As ModelBlocked , TCD.Name AS ModelTypeName , ISNULL(TMU.URL,'') AS URL , ISNULL(TM.ChangeSetID,'') AS ChangeSetID From XBOLTADM.TB_MODEL TM Left Outer Join XBOLTADM.TB_ELEMENT TE On TE.ObjectID = #{ItemID} Left Outer Join XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR TIA On TIA.ItemID = TM.ItemID And TIA.LanguageID = #{languageID} And TIA.AttrTypeCode='AT00001' Left Outer Join XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM TI On TI.ItemID = TM.ItemID Left Outer Join XBOLTADM.TB_DICTIONARY TMD on TMD.TypeCode = TM.MTCategory AND TMD.LanguageID = #{languageID} Left Outer Join XBOLTADM.TB_DICTIONARY TST on TST.TypeCode = TM.Status AND TST.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND TST.Category= 'MDLSTS' Left Outer Join XBOLTADM.TB_MEMBER TB on TI.AuthorID = TB.MemberID Left Outer Join XBOLTADM.TB_DICTIONARY TCD on TCD.TypeCode = TM.ModelTypeCode AND TCD.LanguageID = #{languageID} And TCD.Category = 'MT' Left Outer Join XBOLTADM.TB_MODEL_TYPE TMTYP On TMTYP.ModelTypeCode = TM.ModelTypeCode Left Outer Join XBOLTADM.TB_MENU TMU ON TMU.MenuID = TMTYP.MenuID Where TM.ModelID = TE.ModelID AND TM.ModelTypeCode = #{ModelTypeCode} AND TM.MTCategory IN (${InboundChks}) And TE.SymTypeCode in (Select SymTypeCode From XBOLTADM.TB_SYMTYPE_ALLOCATION Where ModelTypeCode =#{ModelTypeCode} and MdlIF='Y') And TI.Deleted != 1
mapper.insert: INSERT XBOLTADM.TI_ITEM_ATTR_IF_LOG SELECT * FROM XBOLTADM.TI_ITEM_ATTR_IF WHERE UpdatedOn > #{todayDate} AND systemtype = #{systemType}
mapper.update: UPDATE XBOLTADM.TI_ITEM_ATTR_IF SET Action = 'D', UpdatedOn = GETDATE() FROM ( SELECT TIF.Seq IFSEQ FROM XBOLTADM.TI_ITEM_ATTR_IF TIF WHERE TIF.SourceSystem < CONVERT(varchar, GETDATE(), 112) AND TIF.Status = '02' AND TIF.SystemType = #{systemType} ) A WHERE Seq = A.IFSEQ
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM XBOLTADM.TI_ITEM_ATTR_IF WHERE Action = 'D' AND SystemType = #{systemType}
mapper.select: SELECT CN.Identifier AS ID FROM XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM TI LEFT JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM CN ON CN.ItemID = TI.ToItemID AND CN.Deleted != 1 AND CN.Identifier NOT LIKE '%)' WHERE TI.FromItemID = #{itemID} AND TI.CategoryCode = 'CN' AND TI.ItemTypeCode = 'CN00104' AND CN.ItemID IS NOT NULL ORDER BY CN.Identifier
SELECT TOP 1 FromItemID FROM XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM WHERE ToItemID = #{s_itemID} AND ClassCode = 'CNL0104' AND Deleted != 1 ORDER BY LastUpdated
mapper.update: UPDATE XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR SET PlainText = #{tcode}, LastUpdated = GETDATE() WHERE ItemID = #{itemID} AND LanguageID = #{languageID} AND AttrTypeCode = 'AT00014'
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(Seq) FROM XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR WHERE ItemID = #{itemID} AND LanguageID = #{languageID} AND AttrTypeCode = 'AT00014'

choose.when: SELECT A.CHKCN AS label ,A.CHKCN AS name ,SUM(CASE WHEN A.CHKMAP = 'O' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS '맵 반영' ,SUM(CASE WHEN A.CHKMAP = 'X' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS '맵 미반영' ,COUNT(*) AS value FROM ( SELECT TCode.ItemID ,TSYS.PlainText AS 'IT System' ,CASE WHEN SAPEN.PlainText IS NOT NULL THEN 'ERP담당자 O' ELSE 'ERP담당자 X' END AS 'CHKCN' ,CASE WHEN A.TTO IS NOT NULL THEN 'O' ELSE 'X' END AS 'CHKMAP' FROM XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM TCODE LEFT JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR TSYS ON TSYS.ItemID = TCode.ItemID AND TSYS.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00013' AND TSYS.LanguageID = 1042 LEFT JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR SAPEN ON SAPEN.ItemID = TCode.ItemID AND SAPEN.AttrTypeCode = 'ATSAP03' AND SAPEN.LanguageID = 1042 LEFT JOIN ( SELECT distinct TCNL.ToItemID AS TTO FROM XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM TCNL WHERE TCNL.ItemTypeCode = 'CN00104' AND TCNL.ClassCode = 'CNL0104' ) A ON A.TTO = TCODE.ItemID WHERE TCODE.ClassCode = 'CL04005' AND TCODE.Deleted != 1 AND TCODE.ProjectID = 7 AND TCode.Identifier NOT LIKE '%)' ) A GROUP BY A.CHKCN

SELECT A.CHKCN AS label ,A.CHKCN AS name ,SUM(CASE WHEN A.CHKMAP = 'O' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS '맵 반영' ,SUM(CASE WHEN A.CHKMAP = 'X' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS '맵 미반영' ,COUNT(*) AS value FROM ( SELECT TCode.ItemID ,TSYS.PlainText AS 'IT System' ,CASE WHEN NFEN.PlainText IS NOT NULL THEN 'NF_BLUE 담당자 O' ELSE 'NF_BLUE 담당자 X' END AS 'CHKCN' ,CASE WHEN A.TTO IS NOT NULL THEN 'O' ELSE 'X' END AS 'CHKMAP' FROM XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM TCODE LEFT JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR TSYS ON TSYS.ItemID = TCode.ItemID AND TSYS.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00013' AND TSYS.LanguageID = 1042 LEFT JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR NFEN ON NFEN.ItemID = TCode.ItemID AND NFEN.AttrTypeCode = 'ATNF002' AND NFEN.LanguageID = 1042 LEFT JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR NFSY ON NFSY.ItemID = TCODE.ItemID AND NFSY.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00037' AND NFSY.LanguageID = 1042 LEFT JOIN ( SELECT distinct TCNL.ToItemID AS TTO FROM XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM TCNL WHERE TCNL.ItemTypeCode = 'CN00104' AND TCNL.ClassCode = 'CNL0104' ) A ON A.TTO = TCODE.ItemID WHERE TCODE.ClassCode = 'CL04005' AND TCODE.Deleted != 1 AND TCODE.ProjectID = 9 AND TCode.Identifier NOT LIKE '%)' AND NFSY.LovCode = 'LV37010' ) A GROUP BY A.CHKCN

SELECT A.CHKCN AS label ,A.CHKCN AS name ,SUM(CASE WHEN A.CHKMAP = 'O' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS '맵 반영' ,SUM(CASE WHEN A.CHKMAP = 'X' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS '맵 미반영' ,COUNT(*) AS value FROM ( SELECT TCode.ItemID ,TSYS.PlainText AS 'IT System' ,CASE WHEN NFEN.PlainText IS NOT NULL THEN 'NF_GREEN 담당자 O' ELSE 'NF_GREEN 담당자 X' END AS 'CHKCN' ,CASE WHEN A.TTO IS NOT NULL THEN 'O' ELSE 'X' END AS 'CHKMAP' FROM XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM TCODE LEFT JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR TSYS ON TSYS.ItemID = TCode.ItemID AND TSYS.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00013' AND TSYS.LanguageID = 1042 LEFT JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR NFEN ON NFEN.ItemID = TCode.ItemID AND NFEN.AttrTypeCode = 'ATNF002' AND NFEN.LanguageID = 1042 LEFT JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR NFSY ON NFSY.ItemID = TCODE.ItemID AND NFSY.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00037' AND NFSY.LanguageID = 1042 LEFT JOIN ( SELECT distinct TCNL.ToItemID AS TTO FROM XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM TCNL WHERE TCNL.ItemTypeCode = 'CN00104' AND TCNL.ClassCode = 'CNL0104' ) A ON A.TTO = TCODE.ItemID WHERE TCODE.ClassCode = 'CL04005' AND TCODE.Deleted != 1 AND TCODE.ProjectID = 9 AND TCode.Identifier NOT LIKE '%)' AND NFSY.LovCode = 'LV37020' ) A GROUP BY A.CHKCN

SELECT A.CHKCN AS label ,A.CHKCN AS name ,SUM(CASE WHEN A.CHKMAP = 'O' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS '맵 반영' ,SUM(CASE WHEN A.CHKMAP = 'X' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS '맵 미반영' ,COUNT(*) AS value FROM ( SELECT TCode.ItemID ,TSYS.PlainText AS 'IT System' ,CASE WHEN NFEN.PlainText IS NOT NULL THEN 'NF_RED 담당자 O' ELSE 'NF_RED 담당자 X' END AS 'CHKCN' ,CASE WHEN A.TTO IS NOT NULL THEN 'O' ELSE 'X' END AS 'CHKMAP' FROM XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM TCODE LEFT JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR TSYS ON TSYS.ItemID = TCode.ItemID AND TSYS.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00013' AND TSYS.LanguageID = 1042 LEFT JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR NFEN ON NFEN.ItemID = TCode.ItemID AND NFEN.AttrTypeCode = 'ATNF002' AND NFEN.LanguageID = 1042 LEFT JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR NFSY ON NFSY.ItemID = TCODE.ItemID AND NFSY.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00037' AND NFSY.LanguageID = 1042 LEFT JOIN ( SELECT distinct TCNL.ToItemID AS TTO FROM XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM TCNL WHERE TCNL.ItemTypeCode = 'CN00104' AND TCNL.ClassCode = 'CNL0104' ) A ON A.TTO = TCODE.ItemID WHERE TCODE.ClassCode = 'CL04005' AND TCODE.Deleted != 1 AND TCODE.ProjectID = 9 AND TCode.Identifier NOT LIKE '%)' AND NFSY.LovCode = 'LV37030' ) A GROUP BY A.CHKCN

SELECT A.CHKCN AS label ,A.CHKCN AS name ,SUM(CASE WHEN A.CHKMAP = 'O' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS '맵 반영' ,SUM(CASE WHEN A.CHKMAP = 'X' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS '맵 미반영' ,COUNT(*) AS value FROM ( SELECT TCode.ItemID ,TSYS.PlainText AS 'IT System' ,CASE WHEN NFEN.PlainText IS NOT NULL THEN 'NF_NAVY 담당자 O' ELSE 'NF_NAVY 담당자 X' END AS 'CHKCN' ,CASE WHEN A.TTO IS NOT NULL THEN 'O' ELSE 'X' END AS 'CHKMAP' FROM XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM TCODE LEFT JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR TSYS ON TSYS.ItemID = TCode.ItemID AND TSYS.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00013' AND TSYS.LanguageID = 1042 LEFT JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR NFEN ON NFEN.ItemID = TCode.ItemID AND NFEN.AttrTypeCode = 'ATNF002' AND NFEN.LanguageID = 1042 LEFT JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR NFSY ON NFSY.ItemID = TCODE.ItemID AND NFSY.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00037' AND NFSY.LanguageID = 1042 LEFT JOIN ( SELECT distinct TCNL.ToItemID AS TTO FROM XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM TCNL WHERE TCNL.ItemTypeCode = 'CN00104' AND TCNL.ClassCode = 'CNL0104' ) A ON A.TTO = TCODE.ItemID WHERE TCODE.ClassCode = 'CL04005' AND TCODE.Deleted != 1 AND TCODE.ProjectID = 9 AND TCode.Identifier NOT LIKE '%)' AND NFSY.LovCode = 'LV37040' ) A GROUP BY A.CHKCN

SELECT A.CHKCN AS label ,A.CHKCN AS name ,SUM(CASE WHEN A.CHKMAP = 'O' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS '맵 반영' ,SUM(CASE WHEN A.CHKMAP = 'X' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS '맵 미반영' ,COUNT(*) AS value FROM ( SELECT TCode.ItemID ,TSYS.PlainText AS 'IT System' ,CASE WHEN NFEN.PlainText IS NOT NULL THEN 'HIPRO 담당자 O' ELSE 'HIPRO 담당자 X' END AS 'CHKCN' ,CASE WHEN A.TTO IS NOT NULL THEN 'O' ELSE 'X' END AS 'CHKMAP' FROM XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM TCODE LEFT JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR TSYS ON TSYS.ItemID = TCode.ItemID AND TSYS.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00013' AND TSYS.LanguageID = 1042 LEFT JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR NFEN ON NFEN.ItemID = TCode.ItemID AND NFEN.AttrTypeCode = 'ATNF002' AND NFEN.LanguageID = 1042 LEFT JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR NFSY ON NFSY.ItemID = TCODE.ItemID AND NFSY.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00037' AND NFSY.LanguageID = 1042 LEFT JOIN ( SELECT distinct TCNL.ToItemID AS TTO FROM XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM TCNL WHERE TCNL.ItemTypeCode = 'CN00104' AND TCNL.ClassCode = 'CNL0104' ) A ON A.TTO = TCODE.ItemID WHERE TCODE.ClassCode = 'CL04005' AND TCODE.Deleted != 1 AND TCODE.ProjectID = 9 AND TCode.Identifier NOT LIKE '%)' AND NFSY.LovCode = 'LV37050' ) A GROUP BY A.CHKCN

mapper.select:
SELECT T.GroupedIdentifier AS label ,T.GroupedIdentifier AS name --,T.TotalL4Count AS value ,( SELECT COUNT(L1ITEMID) FROM XBOLTADM.TW_PROCESS TP WHERE TP.ItemClassCode = 'CL01005' AND TP.Identifier IS NOT NULL AND L1ItemID IS NOT NULL AND L1ItemID = ( SELECT ItemID FROM XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM WHERE Identifier = CONCAT(#{businessType}, T.GroupedIdentifier) )) AS 'value' ,(SELECT COALESCE((SELECT CAST(ItemID AS VARCHAR(50)) FROM XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM WHERE Identifier = CONCAT(#{businessType}, T.GroupedIdentifier)), '') ) AS itemIdList
,( SELECT COUNT(L1ITEMID) FROM XBOLTADM.TW_PROCESS TP WHERE TP.ItemClassCode = 'CL01005' AND TP.Identifier IS NOT NULL AND L1ItemID IS NOT NULL AND L1ItemID = ( SELECT ItemID FROM XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM WHERE Identifier = CONCAT(#{businessType}, T.GroupedIdentifier) )) AS '조선'
,( SELECT COUNT(L1ITEMID) FROM XBOLTADM.TW_PROCESS TP WHERE TP.ItemClassCode = 'CL01005' AND TP.Identifier IS NOT NULL AND L1ItemID IS NOT NULL AND L1ItemID = ( SELECT ItemID FROM XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM WHERE Identifier = CONCAT(#{businessType}, T.GroupedIdentifier) )) AS '특수선'
,( SELECT COUNT(L1ITEMID) FROM XBOLTADM.TW_PROCESS TP WHERE TP.ItemClassCode = 'CL01005' AND TP.Identifier IS NOT NULL AND L1ItemID IS NOT NULL AND L1ItemID = ( SELECT ItemID FROM XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM WHERE Identifier = CONCAT(#{businessType}, T.GroupedIdentifier) )) AS '해양'
,( SELECT COUNT(L1ITEMID) FROM XBOLTADM.TW_PROCESS TP WHERE TP.ItemClassCode = 'CL01005' AND TP.Identifier IS NOT NULL AND L1ItemID IS NOT NULL AND L1ItemID = ( SELECT ItemID FROM XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM WHERE Identifier = CONCAT(#{businessType}, T.GroupedIdentifier) )) AS '공통'
FROM ( SELECT SUBSTRING(Identifier, LEN(Identifier) - 1, 2) AS GroupedIdentifier ,SUM(L4Count) AS TotalL4Count FROM ( SELECT TI.Identifier, CASE WHEN A.L1ITEM IS NOT NULL THEN A.L4COUNT ELSE 0 END AS L4Count FROM XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM TI LEFT JOIN ( SELECT TP.L1ItemID AS L1ITEM, COUNT(*) AS L4COUNT FROM XBOLTADM.TW_PROCESS TP WHERE TP.ItemTypeCode = 'OJ00001' AND TP.ItemClassCode = 'CL01005' AND TP.Identifier IS NOT NULL AND L1ItemID IS NOT NULL GROUP BY TP.L1ItemID ) A ON A.L1ITEM = TI.ItemID WHERE TI.ClassCode = 'CL01001' AND TI.ProjectID = 5 AND TI.Deleted != 1 ) GroupedData GROUP BY SUBSTRING(Identifier, LEN(Identifier) - 1, 2) ) T WHERE T.TotalL4Count != 0 AND ( SELECT COUNT(L1ITEMID) FROM XBOLTADM.TW_PROCESS TP WHERE TP.ItemClassCode = 'CL01005' AND TP.Identifier IS NOT NULL AND L1ItemID IS NOT NULL AND L1ItemID = ( SELECT ItemID FROM XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM WHERE Identifier = CONCAT(#{businessType}, T.GroupedIdentifier)) ) != 0 ORDER BY T.TotalL4Count DESC

SELECT CASE WHEN A.MOD = 'C' THEN '조선' WHEN A.MOD = 'E' THEN '특수선' WHEN A.MOD = 'Q' THEN '해양' WHEN A.MOD = 'X' THEN '공통' END AS label ,A.MOD AS name ,L4.PROCESS_COUNT AS '프로세스' ,COUNT(A.ITEM) AS '전체 ACT' ,SUM(A.ACTSYS) AS '시스템 ACT' ,SUM(A.ACTCNL) AS '시스템' ,COUNT(A.ITEM) AS value
FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT L5.ItemID AS ITEM ,LEFT(L5.Identifier,1) AS MOD ,CASE WHEN L5AT.PlainText != 'LV37099' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS ACTSYS ,CASE WHEN CNL.ItemID IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS ACTCNL FROM XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM L5 LEFT JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR L5AT ON L5AT.ItemID = L5.ItemID AND L5AT.LanguageID = 1042 AND L5AT.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00037' LEFT JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM CNL ON CNL.FromItemID = L5.ItemID AND CNL.ClassCode = 'CNL0104' AND CNL.Deleted != 1 WHERE L5.Deleted != 1 AND L5.ClassCode = 'CL01006' AND L5.ProjectID = 5 AND L5.Identifier IS NOT NULL ) A LEFT JOIN ( SELECT LEFT(L4.Identifier, 1) AS MOD, COUNT(*) AS PROCESS_COUNT FROM XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM L4 WHERE L4.Deleted != 1 AND L4.ClassCode = 'CL01005' AND L4.ProjectID = 5 AND L4.Identifier IS NOT NULL GROUP BY LEFT(L4.Identifier, 1) ) L4 ON A.MOD = L4.MOD GROUP BY A.MOD, L4.PROCESS_COUNT ORDER BY A.MOD

SELECT TATA.AttrTypeCode AS AttrTypeCode , ISNULL(TD.Name, '') AS Name , CASE TAT.IsComLang WHEN '1' THEN (CASE TAT.DataType WHEN 'LOV' THEN ISNULL(TATL.Value, '') ELSE ISNULL(TIA.PlainText, '') END ) ELSE (CASE TAT.DataType WHEN 'LOV' THEN ISNULL(TATL.Value, '') WHEN 'MLOV' THEN ISNULL(TATL.Value, '') ELSE (CASE WHEN TAT.DataType != 'Text' THEN ISNULL(TIA.PlainText, '') ELSE ISNULL(TIA.PlainText, '') END) END ) END PlainText
, CASE TAT.IsComLang WHEN '1' THEN (CASE TAT.DataType WHEN 'LOV' THEN ISNULL(TATL.Value, '') ELSE ISNULL(TIA2.PlainText, '') END ) ELSE (CASE TAT.DataType WHEN 'LOV' THEN ISNULL(TATL.Value, '') WHEN 'MLOV' THEN ISNULL(TATL.Value, '') ELSE (CASE WHEN TAT.DataType != 'Text' THEN ISNULL(TIA2.PlainText, '') ELSE ISNULL(TIA2.PlainText, '') END) END ) END PlainText2
, ISNULL(TIA.LovCode, '') AS LovCode , ISNULL(TATL.AttrTypeCode, '') AS BaseLovCode , TAT.DataType , TAT.IsComLang , TAT.HTML , ISNULL(TATA.AreaHeight, '20') AS AreaHeight , ISNULL(ISNULL(TIA.ItemID, ''),#{ItemID}) AS ItemID , TM.URL FROM XBOLTADM.TB_ATTR_TYPE_ALLOCATION TATA Left Outer Join XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR TIA ON TATA.AttrTypeCode = TIA.AttrTypeCode AND TIA.ItemID = #{ItemID} AND TIA.LanguageID = #{sessionCurrLangType} Left Outer Join XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR TIA2 ON TATA.AttrTypeCode = TIA2.AttrTypeCode AND TIA2.ItemID = #{ItemID} AND TIA2.LanguageID = #{selectLanguageID} Left Outer Join XBOLTADM.TB_DICTIONARY TD on TATA.AttrTypeCode = TD.TypeCode AND TD.LanguageID = #{sessionCurrLangType} Left Outer join XBOLTADM.TB_ATTR_TYPE_LOV TATL on TATA.AttrTypeCode = TATL.AttrTypeCode AND TIA.LovCode = TATL.LovCode AND TATL.LanguageID = #{sessionCurrLangType} Left Outer Join XBOLTADM.TB_ATTR_TYPE TAT on TATA.AttrTypeCode = TAT.AttrTypeCode Left Outer Join XBOLTADM.TB_MENU TM ON TATA.Link = TM.MenuID WHERE TATA.ItemClassCode = (SELECT ClassCode From XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM WHERE ItemID = #{ItemID})
AND TATA.AttrTypeCode LIKE CONCAT('AT', #{systemtype}, '%')
AND TATA.Invisible = 0
ORDER BY TATA.SortNum ASC

SELECT TATA.AttrTypeCode AS AttrTypeCode , ISNULL(TD.Name, '') AS Name , ISNULL(TIA.PlainText, '') AS PlainText FROM XBOLTADM.TB_ATTR_TYPE_ALLOCATION TATA Left Outer Join XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR TIA ON TATA.AttrTypeCode = TIA.AttrTypeCode AND TIA.ItemID = #{itemID} AND TIA.LanguageID = #{languageID} Left Outer Join XBOLTADM.TB_DICTIONARY TD on TATA.AttrTypeCode = TD.TypeCode AND TD.LanguageID = #{languageID} WHERE TATA.ItemClassCode = (SELECT ClassCode From XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM WHERE ItemID = #{itemID}) AND TATA.AttrTypeCode IN ('ATPRD97', 'ATPRD98', 'ATPRD99') ORDER BY TATA.SortNum ASC
SELECT ItemID AS TREE_ID FROM XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM WHERE 1 = 1 AND Deleted != 1 AND ItemTypeCode = #{itemTypeCode} AND ClassCode = #{classCode} AND ProjectID = 12

SELECT count(*) AS Cnt FROM XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM TI Left Outer Join XBOLTADM.tb_ITEM_CLASS CLS ON CLS.ItemClassCode = TI.ClassCode WHERE TI.ItemTypeCode = #{itemTypeCode} AND TI.Deleted != 1 AND CLS.ChangeMgt = 1
AND TI.ProjectID = 5
AND TI.ProjectID IN (7,8,9,10,12)

WITH ItemHierarchy AS ( SELECT ST1.FromItemID AS ParentItemID, ST1.ToItemID AS ItemID, ST1.SortNum, 1 AS Level FROM XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM ST1 WHERE ST1.ToItemID = #{s_itemID} AND ST1.CategoryCode IN ('ST1', 'ST2') AND ST1.Deleted != '1' UNION ALL SELECT IH.ItemID AS ParentItemID, ST1.ToItemID AS ItemID, ST1.SortNum, IH.Level + 1 AS Level FROM ItemHierarchy IH JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM ST1 ON ST1.FromItemID = IH.ItemID WHERE ST1.CategoryCode IN ('ST1', 'ST2') AND ST1.Deleted != '1' ), RankedData AS ( SELECT Row_Number() OVER (PARTITION BY Item.Identifier ORDER BY Item.Identifier ASC) AS RNUM, Item.Identifier, Dic.Name AS ClassName, Dic.TypeCode AS ClassCode, Item.ItemID, [AT00001] AS Activity, [AT00003] AS Outline, [AT00015] AS Input, [AT00016] AS Output, [ZAT02015] AS PerformanceSystem FROM ( SELECT ItemID, AttrTypeCode, PlainText FROM [XBOLTADM].[TB_ITEM_ATTR] WHERE LanguageID = #{languageID} ) AS SourceTable PIVOT ( MAX(PlainText) FOR AttrTypeCode IN ( [AT00001], [AT00003], [ZAT02007], [ZAT02008], [ZAT02009], [ZAT02010], [ZAT02013], [AT00015], [AT00016], [ZAT02014], [ZAT02015]) ) AS ItemAttr JOIN [XBOLTADM].[TB_ITEM] AS Item ON ItemAttr.ItemID = Item.ItemID LEFT JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_CLASS TIC ON Item.ClassCode = TIC.ItemClassCode LEFT JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_DICTIONARY DIC ON Item.ClassCode = DIC.TypeCode AND Dic.LanguageID = #{languageID} WHERE Item.Identifier NOT LIKE '$%' ), FilteredData AS ( SELECT RNUM, Identifier, ClassName, ClassCode, ItemID, Activity, Outline, Input, Output, PerformanceSystem FROM RankedData WHERE RNUM = 1 ), ProcessCXN AS ( SELECT STRING_AGG(CASE WHEN ITEM.ClassCode = 'CNL0201A' THEN ITATR.PlainText END, ', ') AS r_text, STRING_AGG(CASE WHEN ITEM.ClassCode = 'CNL0201A' THEN ITATR.ItemID END, ', ') AS r_ItemID, STRING_AGG( CASE WHEN ITEM.ClassCode = 'CNL0201B' THEN CASE WHEN TATL2.Value IS NOT NULL AND TATL2.Value != '' THEN ITATR.PlainText + ' (' + TATL2.Value + ')' ELSE ITATR.PlainText END END, ', ' ) AS a_text, STRING_AGG(CASE WHEN ITEM.ClassCode = 'CNL0201B' THEN ITATR.ItemID END, ', ') AS a_ItemID, STRING_AGG(CASE WHEN ITEM.ClassCode = 'CNL0201C' THEN ITATR.PlainText END, ', ') AS s_text, STRING_AGG(CASE WHEN ITEM.ClassCode = 'CNL0201C' THEN ITATR.ItemID END, ', ') AS s_ItemID, STRING_AGG(CASE WHEN ITEM.ClassCode = 'CNL0201D' THEN ITATR.PlainText END, ', ') AS i_text, STRING_AGG(CASE WHEN ITEM.ClassCode = 'CNL0201D' THEN ITATR.ItemID END, ', ') AS i_ItemID, STRING_AGG(CASE WHEN ITEM.ClassCode = 'CNL0201E' THEN ITATR.PlainText END, ', ') AS c_text, STRING_AGG(CASE WHEN ITEM.ClassCode = 'CNL0201E' THEN ITATR.ItemID END, ', ') AS c_ItemID, ITEM.ToItemID FROM XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM ITEM LEFT JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR ITATR ON ITEM.FromItemID = ITATR.ItemID AND ITATR.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND ITATR.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00001' AND ITEM.Deleted != '1' LEFT JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR ITATR2 ON ITEM.ItemID = ITATR2.ItemID AND ITATR2.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND ITATR2.AttrTypeCode = 'ZAT02028' AND ITEM.Deleted != '1' LEFT JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ATTR_TYPE_LOV TATL2 ON ITATR2.AttrTypeCode = TATL2.AttrTypeCode AND ITATR2.PlainText = TATL2.LovCode AND ITATR2.LanguageID = TATL2.LanguageID WHERE ITEM.Deleted != '1' GROUP BY ITEM.ToItemID ) SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY IH.Level ASC, IH.SortNum ASC, FD.ClassCode ASC, FD.Identifier ASC) AS NewRNUM, ISNULL(IH.ParentItemID, '') as ParentItemID, ISNULL(IH.ItemID, '') as ItemID, ISNULL(FD.Identifier, '') as Identifier, ISNULL(FD.ClassName, '') as ClassName, ISNULL(FD.ClassCode, '') as ClassCode, ISNULL(FD.Activity, '') as Activity, ISNULL(FD.Outline, '') as Outline, ISNULL(FD.Input, '') as Input, ISNULL(FD.Output, '') as Output, ISNULL(FD.PerformanceSystem, '') as PerformanceSystem, ISNULL(P_CXN.r_text, '') as r_text, ISNULL(P_CXN.r_ItemID, '') as r_ItemID, ISNULL(P_CXN.a_text, '') as a_text, ISNULL(P_CXN.a_ItemID, '') as a_ItemID, ISNULL(P_CXN.s_text, '') as s_text, ISNULL(P_CXN.s_ItemID, '') as s_ItemID, ISNULL(P_CXN.i_text, '') as i_text, ISNULL(P_CXN.i_ItemID, '') as i_ItemID, ISNULL(P_CXN.c_text, '') as c_text, ISNULL(P_CXN.c_ItemID, '') as c_ItemID FROM ItemHierarchy IH LEFT JOIN FilteredData FD ON IH.ItemID = FD.ItemID LEFT JOIN ProcessCXN P_CXN ON IH.ItemID = P_CXN.ToItemID WHERE FD.ClassCode = 'CL01006' ORDER BY IH.Level ASC, IH.SortNum ASC, FD.Identifier ASC, FD.ClassCode ASC;

SELECT TATL.Value AS siteNM , TATL.LovCode AS CODE FROM XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR AS TIA INNER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ATTR_TYPE_LOV AS TATL ON TIA.AttrTypeCode = TATL.AttrTypeCode AND TIA.LovCode = TATL.LovCode AND TIA.AttrTypeCode = 'ZAT01010' AND TATL.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND TIA.LanguageID = '1042' WHERE TIA.ItemID = #{s_itemID}
SELECT LoginID FROM XBOLTADM.TB_MEMBER WHERE Email = #{email}
SELECT ReportCode, BatchName, SenderAcc, SenderName, SenderPwd, EmailSvrDomain, Subject, Body, Receiver,ItemID FROM XBOLTADM.SEND_BATCH_MAIL

SELECT TM.EmployeeNum as olmI, TT.TeamCode as teamCode, C.RefTeamCode as companyCode, CASE WHEN TM.TimeZone = 'Asia/Seoul' THEN '1042' ELSE '1033' END as langCode FROM XBOLTADM.TB_MEMBER TM INNER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_TEAM TT ON TM.TeamID = TT.TeamID INNER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_TEAM C ON TM.CompanyID = C.TeamID AND C.TeamType = 2 WHERE TM.MemberID = #{receiptUserID}

SELECT TATA.AttrTypeCode AS AttrTypeCode, ISNULL(TD.Name, '') AS Name,
CASE TAT.IsComLang WHEN '1' THEN ( CASE TAT.DataType WHEN 'LOV' THEN ISNULL(TATL.Value, '') ELSE ISNULL(TIA.PlainText, '') END ) ELSE ( CASE TAT.DataType WHEN 'LOV' THEN ISNULL(TATL.Value, '') WHEN 'MLOV' THEN ISNULL(TATL.Value, '') ELSE ISNULL(TIA.PlainText, '') END ) END AS PlainText,
CASE TAT.IsComLang WHEN '1' THEN ( CASE TAT.DataType WHEN 'LOV' THEN ISNULL(TATL.Value, '') ELSE ISNULL(TIA2.PlainText, '') END ) ELSE ( CASE TAT.DataType WHEN 'LOV' THEN ISNULL(TATL.Value, '') WHEN 'MLOV' THEN ISNULL(TATL.Value, '') ELSE ISNULL(TIA2.PlainText, '') END ) END AS PlainText2,
ISNULL(TIA.LovCode, '') AS LovCode, ISNULL(TATL.AttrTypeCode, '') AS BaseLovCode, TAT.DataType, TAT.IsComLang, TAT.HTML, ISNULL(TATA.AreaHeight, '20') AS AreaHeight, TI.ItemID AS ItemID, TM.URL
FROM XBOLTADM.Tb_ITEM TI
JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ATTR_TYPE_ALLOCATION TATA ON TATA.ItemClassCode = TI.ClassCode
LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR TIA ON TIA.ItemID = TI.ItemID AND TIA.AttrTypeCode = TATA.AttrTypeCode AND TIA.LanguageID = #{sessionCurrLangType}
LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR TIA2 ON TIA2.ItemID = TI.ItemID AND TIA2.AttrTypeCode = TATA.AttrTypeCode AND TIA2.LanguageID = #{sessionCurrLangType}
LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_DICTIONARY TD ON TD.TypeCode = TATA.AttrTypeCode AND TD.LanguageID = #{sessionCurrLangType}
LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ATTR_TYPE_LOV TATL ON TATL.AttrTypeCode = TATA.AttrTypeCode AND TATL.LovCode = TIA.LovCode AND TATL.LanguageID = #{sessionCurrLangType}
LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ATTR_TYPE TAT ON TAT.AttrTypeCode = TATA.AttrTypeCode
LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_MENU TM ON TM.MenuID = TATA.Link
WHERE
TI.ItemID IN
#{id}
1 = 0
AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM ( SELECT 'ATG00000' AS LovCode UNION SELECT SUBTIA.LovCode FROM XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR SUBTIA LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ATTR_TYPE SUBTAT ON SUBTAT.AttrTypeCode = SUBTIA.AttrTypeCode WHERE
SUBTIA.ItemID IN
#{sid}
1 = 0
AND SUBTAT.Domain = 'ATG' ) G WHERE G.LovCode = TATA.AttrTypeGRCode )
ORDER BY TI.ItemID, TATA.SortNum ASC

SELECT TI.FromItemID AS BaseItemID ,CN.ItemID AS ItemID ,CN.Identifier ,TIA.PlainText AS itemName , TI.ItemTypeCode , TI.ClassCode FROM XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM TI Left outer join XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM CN on TI.FromItemID = CN.ItemID Left outer join XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR TIA on TIA.ItemID = CN.ItemID And TIA.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00001' And TIA.LanguageID = #{sessionCurrLangType} where TI.ToItemID IN
#{id}
And TI.CategoryCode='CN' And TI.ItemTypeCode != 'CN00101' and TI.Deleted != 1
UNION ALL
SELECT TI.FromItemID AS BaseItemID ,CN.ItemID AS ItemID ,CN.Identifier , TIA.PlainText AS itemName , TI.ItemTypeCode , TI.ClassCode FROM XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM TI Left outer join XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM CN on TI.ToItemID = CN.ItemID Left outer join XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR TIA on TIA.ItemID = CN.ItemID And TIA.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00001' And TIA.LanguageID = #{sessionCurrLangType} where TI.FromItemID IN
#{id}
And TI.CategoryCode='CN' And TI.ItemTypeCode != 'CN00101' and TI.Deleted != 1
